# Project: Disparities in Sedation Practice by Patient Preferred Language
# Author: Alex Ortiz
# Date: 05/05/2026

# Setup Step - Setup libraries
```{r setup}
# Install Packages

packages <- c("tidyverse", "zoo", "data.table", "dplyr", "lubridate", "tidyr", "fst", "arrow", "table1", "lme4", "metafor", "yaml", "pscl", "MASS", "htmltools", "car", "WeightIt", "MatchIt", "purrr", "survival", "mediation", "cmprsk", "gfoRmula", "nnet", "medflex", "bruceR", "survey", "ipw", "geepack", "readr", "collapse", "stringr", "rprojroot", "tableone", "lmtest", "broom", "sandwich")
install_if_missing <- function(package) {
  if (!require(package, character.only = TRUE)) {
    install.packages(package, dependencies = TRUE)
    library(package, character.only = TRUE)
  }
}

sapply(packages, install_if_missing)

# Load necessary libraries
library(data.table)
library(dplyr)
library(zoo)  # for na.locf function
library(lubridate)
library(tidyr)
library(fst)
library(arrow)
library(table1)
library(metafor)
library(yaml)
library(htmltools)
library(MASS)
library(pscl)
library(car)
library(stringr)
library(rprojroot)
library(tableone)
library(lmtest)
library(broom)
library(sandwich)


# Define paths
project_root <- file.path(
  find_root(rprojroot::has_dir("deep_sedation_language_final")),
  "deep_sedation_language_final"
)

config_dir <- file.path(project_root, "config")
knitr::opts_knit$set(root.dir = config_dir)

# Look for both .yaml and .yml
config_file <- c(
  file.path(config_dir, "deep_sedation_language_config.yaml"),
  file.path(config_dir, "deep_sedation_language_config.yml")
)

# Keep only existing files
config_file <- config_file[file.exists(config_file)]

# Error if neither exists
if (length(config_file) == 0) {
  stop("No config file found (.yaml or .yml)")
}

# If both exist, take the first (yaml prioritized here)
config <- yaml::read_yaml(config_file[1])

# Define directories based on YAML configuration
data_dir <- config$data_dir
local_dir <- config$local_dir
output_dir <- file.path(local_dir, "output/")
intermediate_dir <- file.path(local_dir, "intermediate_data_DO_NOT_UPLOAD/")  # Define output_dir based on data_dir
final_data_dir <- file.path(output_dir, "FINAL_DATA_UPLOAD_ME/")
cohort_characteristics <- file.path(final_data_dir, "cohort_characteristics/")
sedation_project <- file.path(final_data_dir, "sedation_project/")
sedation_tables_dir <- file.path(sedation_project, "final_tables/")
sedation_final_data <- file.path(sedation_project, "final_data/")
sedation_sensitivity <- file.path(sedation_final_data, "sensitivity_analyses/")
sedation_secondary <- file.path(sedation_final_data, "secondary_analyses/")
sedation_exploratory <- file.path(sedation_final_data, "exploratory_analyses/")
sedation_subgroup <- file.path(sedation_final_data, "subgroup_analyses/")
paralytics_project <- file.path(final_data_dir, "paralytics_project/")
paralytics_tables_dir <- file.path(paralytics_project, "final_tables/")  
paralytics_final_data <- file.path(paralytics_project, "final_data/")
paralytics_exploratory <- file.path(paralytics_final_data, "exploratory_analyses/")
paralytics_exploratory_tables <- file.path(paralytics_tables_dir, "exploratory_tables/")
arf_project <- file.path(final_data_dir, "arf_project/")
arf_tables_dir <- file.path(arf_project, "final_tables/")  
arf_final_data <- file.path(arf_project, "final_data/")
measurements_project <- file.path(final_data_dir, "measurements_project/")
measurements_tables_dir <- file.path(measurements_project, "final_tables/")  
measurements_final_data <- file.path(measurements_project, "final_data/")
measurements_model_data <- file.path(measurements_final_data, "model_data/")

file_type <- config$file_type
institution <- config$institution
time_zone <- config$time_zone

# Create all directories
dirs_to_create <- c(
  output_dir,
  intermediate_dir,
  final_data_dir,
  cohort_characteristics,
  sedation_project,
  sedation_tables_dir,
  sedation_final_data,
  sedation_sensitivity,
  sedation_secondary,
  sedation_exploratory,
  sedation_subgroup,
  paralytics_project,
  paralytics_tables_dir,
  paralytics_final_data,
  paralytics_exploratory,
  paralytics_exploratory_tables,
  arf_project,
  arf_tables_dir,
  arf_final_data,
  measurements_project,
  measurements_tables_dir,
  measurements_final_data,
  measurements_model_data
)

for (dir in dirs_to_create) {
  dir.create(dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
}
```

#Upload Data
```{r}
# Upload Analytic File
total_cohort <- read_parquet(paste0(intermediate_dir, "analytic_file", institution, ".parquet"))
setDT(total_cohort)
total_cohort[
  race_category == "asian",
  race_category := "other/unknown"
]
total_cohort[, observation_year := as.double(observation_year)]
# Upload hospital system language information
language_data <- fread(paste0(cohort_characteristics, "/", institution, "_hospital_system_language_counts", ".csv"))
setDT(language_data)

cat_vars <- c("sex_category", "ethnicity_category", "race_category", "hospital_id", "icu_imv", "location_of_intubation", "admission_type_category", "arf_flag", "aHrf_flag")

cont_vars <- c("age_at_admission", "bmi", "elixhauser_score", "SVM_SCORE", "laps2", "time_to_first_rass", "rass_frequency_hrs", "observation_year", "time_from_begin_imv_to_icu_hours")

```

#Function to Create Table 1s
```{r}
#Function to Create Table 1s
make_table1_federated <- function(dt,
                                  cat_vars = NULL,
                                  cont_vars = NULL,
                                  by = NULL,
                                  site_name = NA_character_) {
  dt <- as.data.table(copy(dt))
  out_list <- list()
  
  #-----------------------------#
  # CATEGORICAL VARIABLES
  #-----------------------------#
  if (!is.null(cat_vars) && length(cat_vars) > 0) {
    for (v in cat_vars) {
      
      if (!is.null(by)) {
        tmp <- dt[, .(n = .N), by = c(by, v)]
        
        totals <- dt[, .(N = .N), by = by]
        
        tmp <- merge(tmp, totals, by = by, all.x = TRUE)
        
        setnames(tmp, old = by, new = "group")
        setnames(tmp, old = v, new = "level")
        
        tmp[, `:=`(
          site = site_name,
          variable = v,
          variable_type = "categorical",
          level = as.character(level),
          pct = 100 * n / N,
          mean = NA_real_,
          sd = NA_real_,
          median = NA_real_,
          p25 = NA_real_,
          p75 = NA_real_
        )]
        
      } else {
        tmp <- dt[, .(n = .N), by = v]
        total_n <- nrow(dt)
        
        setnames(tmp, old = v, new = "level")
        
        tmp[, `:=`(
          site = site_name,
          group = "overall",
          variable = v,
          variable_type = "categorical",
          level = as.character(level),
          N = total_n,
          pct = 100 * n / N,
          mean = NA_real_,
          sd = NA_real_,
          median = NA_real_,
          p25 = NA_real_,
          p75 = NA_real_
        )]
      }
      
      tmp <- tmp[, .(
        site, group, variable, variable_type, level,
        n, N, pct,
        mean, sd, median, p25, p75
      )]
      
      out_list[[paste0("cat_", v)]] <- tmp
    }
  }
  
  #-----------------------------#
  # CONTINUOUS VARIABLES
  #-----------------------------#
  if (!is.null(cont_vars) && length(cont_vars) > 0) {
    for (v in cont_vars) {
      
      if (!is.null(by)) {
        tmp <- dt[, .(
          n      = sum(!is.na(get(v))),
          N      = .N,
          pct    = NA_real_,
          mean   = as.numeric(if (all(is.na(get(v)))) NA_real_ else mean(get(v), na.rm = TRUE)),
          sd     = as.numeric(if (sum(!is.na(get(v))) <= 1) NA_real_ else sd(get(v), na.rm = TRUE)),
          median = as.numeric(if (all(is.na(get(v)))) NA_real_ else median(get(v), na.rm = TRUE)),
          p25    = as.numeric(if (all(is.na(get(v)))) NA_real_ else quantile(get(v), 0.25, na.rm = TRUE)),
          p75    = as.numeric(if (all(is.na(get(v)))) NA_real_ else quantile(get(v), 0.75, na.rm = TRUE))
        ), by = by]
        
        setnames(tmp, old = by, new = "group")
        
        tmp[, `:=`(
          site = site_name,
          variable = v,
          variable_type = "continuous",
          level = NA_character_
        )]
        
      } else {
        tmp <- dt[, .(
          n      = sum(!is.na(get(v))),
          N      = .N,
          pct    = NA_real_,
          mean   = as.numeric(if (all(is.na(get(v)))) NA_real_ else mean(get(v), na.rm = TRUE)),
          sd     = as.numeric(if (sum(!is.na(get(v))) <= 1) NA_real_ else sd(get(v), na.rm = TRUE)),
          median = as.numeric(if (all(is.na(get(v)))) NA_real_ else median(get(v), na.rm = TRUE)),
          p25    = as.numeric(if (all(is.na(get(v)))) NA_real_ else quantile(get(v), 0.25, na.rm = TRUE)),
          p75    = as.numeric(if (all(is.na(get(v)))) NA_real_ else quantile(get(v), 0.75, na.rm = TRUE))
        )]
        
        tmp[, `:=`(
          site = site_name,
          group = "overall",
          variable = v,
          variable_type = "continuous",
          level = NA_character_
        )]
      }
      
      tmp <- tmp[, .(
        site, group, variable, variable_type, level,
        n, N, pct,
        mean, sd, median, p25, p75
      )]
      
      out_list[[paste0("cont_", v)]] <- tmp
    }
  }
  
  out <- rbindlist(out_list, fill = TRUE, use.names = TRUE)
  
  setcolorder(out, c(
    "site", "group", "variable", "variable_type", "level",
    "n", "N", "pct", "mean", "sd", "median", "p25", "p75"
  ))
  
  #-----------------------------#
  # CENSORING
  #-----------------------------#
  out[variable_type == "categorical" & n < 10,
      `:=`(pct = NA_real_)]
  out[variable_type == "categorical",
      n_censored := ifelse(!is.na(n) & n < 10, "<10", as.character(n))]
  out[variable_type == "categorical" & n < 10,
    `:=`(n = NA_real_, N = NA_real_)]
  
  out[variable_type == "continuous" & n < 10,
      `:=`(mean = NA_real_, sd = NA_real_, median = NA_real_,
           p25 = NA_real_, p75 = NA_real_)]
  out[variable_type == "continuous",
      n_censored := ifelse(!is.na(n) & n < 10, "<10", as.character(n))]
  out[variable_type == "continuous" & n < 10,
    `:=`(n = NA_real_, N = NA_real_)] 

  #-----------------------------#
  # COMPLEMENTARY SUPPRESSION
  #-----------------------------#
  cat_out <- out[variable_type == "categorical"]
  if (nrow(cat_out) > 0) {
    suppressed_combos <- unique(cat_out[
      n_censored == "<10",
      .(variable, group)
    ])
    
    if (nrow(suppressed_combos) > 0) {
      suppressed_combos[, suppress_flag := TRUE]
      out <- merge(out, suppressed_combos, by = c("variable", "group"), all.x = TRUE)
      
      out[variable_type == "categorical" & !is.na(suppress_flag),
          `:=`(
            pct        = NA_real_,
            N          = NA_real_,
            n_censored = ifelse(n_censored == "<10", "<10", "suppressed"),
            n          = NA_real_
          )]
      
      out[, suppress_flag := NULL]
    }
  }

  cont_out <- out[variable_type == "continuous"]
  if (nrow(cont_out) > 0) {
    suppressed_cont_vars <- cont_out[
      n_censored == "<10",
      unique(variable)
    ]
    
    if (length(suppressed_cont_vars) > 0) {
      out[variable_type == "continuous" & variable %in% suppressed_cont_vars,
          `:=`(
            mean       = NA_real_,
            sd         = NA_real_,
            median     = NA_real_,
            p25        = NA_real_,
            p75        = NA_real_,
            N          = NA_real_,
            n_censored = ifelse(n_censored == "<10", "<10", "suppressed"),
            n          = NA_real_
          )]
    }
  }
  
  return(out[])
}

make_table1_comparisons <- function(dt, by, cont_vars = NULL, cat_vars = NULL,
                                    site_name = NA_character_, group_levels = NULL,
                                    reference_level = NULL, fisher_if_expected_lt5 = TRUE) {
  dt <- as.data.table(copy(dt))
  
  if (!(by %in% names(dt))) stop(sprintf("Grouping variable '%s' not found in dt.", by))
  dt <- dt[!is.na(get(by))]
  dt[, (by) := as.character(get(by))]
  
  observed_groups <- unique(dt[[by]])
  observed_groups <- observed_groups[!is.na(observed_groups)]
  
  if (!is.null(reference_level)) {
    if (!reference_level %in% observed_groups)
      stop(sprintf("reference_level '%s' not found in data.", reference_level))
    ref <- reference_level
    comparators <- if (!is.null(group_levels)) group_levels[group_levels != ref] else sort(observed_groups[observed_groups != ref])
  } else {
    if (!is.null(group_levels)) {
      if (length(group_levels) != 2) stop("group_levels must have length 2.")
      ref <- group_levels[1]; comparators <- group_levels[2]
    } else {
      if (length(observed_groups) != 2)
        stop(sprintf("Found %s groups — supply reference_level for 3+ groups.", paste(observed_groups, collapse = ", ")))
      grps <- sort(observed_groups); ref <- grps[1]; comparators <- grps[2]
    }
  }

  #--------------------------------------------------#
  # Helper: multilevel categorical SMD
  #--------------------------------------------------#
  calc_multilevel_smd <- function(x, group, g1, g2) {
    dsub <- data.table(x = as.character(x), group = as.character(group))
    dsub <- dsub[!is.na(group) & group %in% c(g1, g2)]
    dsub[is.na(x), x := "missing"]
    levs <- sort(unique(dsub$x))
    if (length(levs) < 2) return(NA_real_)
    ref_lev <- levs[1]
    keep_levs <- levs[levs != ref_lev]
    make_indicator_matrix <- function(vals, levels_keep) {
      out <- sapply(levels_keep, function(lv) as.numeric(vals == lv))
      if (is.null(dim(out))) { out <- matrix(out, ncol = 1); colnames(out) <- levels_keep }
      out
    }
    x1 <- dsub[group == g1, x]; x2 <- dsub[group == g2, x]
    if (length(x1) < 2 || length(x2) < 2) return(NA_real_)
    M1 <- make_indicator_matrix(x1, keep_levs)
    M2 <- make_indicator_matrix(x2, keep_levs)
    p1 <- colMeans(M1); p2 <- colMeans(M2); d <- p2 - p1
    S1 <- stats::cov(M1); S2 <- stats::cov(M2)
    if (is.null(dim(S1))) S1 <- matrix(S1, nrow = 1, ncol = 1)
    if (is.null(dim(S2))) S2 <- matrix(S2, nrow = 1, ncol = 1)
    S_pooled <- (S1 + S2) / 2
    S_inv <- try(solve(S_pooled), silent = TRUE)
    if (inherits(S_inv, "try-error")) {
      if (!requireNamespace("MASS", quietly = TRUE)) return(NA_real_)
      S_inv <- try(MASS::ginv(S_pooled), silent = TRUE)
      if (inherits(S_inv, "try-error")) return(NA_real_)
    }
    as.numeric(sqrt(t(d) %*% S_inv %*% d))
  }

  #--------------------------------------------------#
  # Helper: continuous variable comparison
  #--------------------------------------------------#
  compare_continuous <- function(x, group, var_name, g1, g2, comparison_label) {
    dsub <- data.table(x = x, group = group)
    dsub <- dsub[!is.na(group)]
    
    x1 <- dsub[group == g1, x]
    x2 <- dsub[group == g2, x]
    x1_nonmiss <- x1[!is.na(x1)]
    x2_nonmiss <- x2[!is.na(x2)]
    
    n1 <- length(x1_nonmiss); n2 <- length(x2_nonmiss)
    mean1 <- if (n1 > 0) mean(x1_nonmiss) else NA_real_
    mean2 <- if (n2 > 0) mean(x2_nonmiss) else NA_real_
    sd1   <- if (n1 > 1) sd(x1_nonmiss) else NA_real_
    sd2   <- if (n2 > 1) sd(x2_nonmiss) else NA_real_
    med1  <- if (n1 > 0) median(x1_nonmiss) else NA_real_
    med2  <- if (n2 > 0) median(x2_nonmiss) else NA_real_
    p25_1 <- if (n1 > 0) as.numeric(quantile(x1_nonmiss, 0.25, na.rm = TRUE)) else NA_real_
    p25_2 <- if (n2 > 0) as.numeric(quantile(x2_nonmiss, 0.25, na.rm = TRUE)) else NA_real_
    p75_1 <- if (n1 > 0) as.numeric(quantile(x1_nonmiss, 0.75, na.rm = TRUE)) else NA_real_
    p75_2 <- if (n2 > 0) as.numeric(quantile(x2_nonmiss, 0.75, na.rm = TRUE)) else NA_real_
    
    estimate <- NA_real_; ci_lower <- NA_real_
    ci_upper <- NA_real_; p_value  <- NA_real_
    test_used <- NA_character_
    
    if (n1 >= 2 && n2 >= 2) {
      tt <- try(t.test(x2_nonmiss, x1_nonmiss), silent = TRUE)
      if (!inherits(tt, "try-error")) {
        estimate  <- unname(mean2 - mean1)
        ci_lower  <- unname(tt$conf.int[1])
        ci_upper  <- unname(tt$conf.int[2])
        p_value   <- tt$p.value
        test_used <- "welch_t_test"
      }
    }
    
    pooled_sd <- NA_real_; smd <- NA_real_
    if (n1 >= 2 && n2 >= 2 && !is.na(sd1) && !is.na(sd2)) {
      pooled_sd <- sqrt(((n1 - 1) * sd1^2 + (n2 - 1) * sd2^2) / (n1 + n2 - 2))
      if (!is.na(pooled_sd) && pooled_sd > 0) smd <- (mean2 - mean1) / pooled_sd
    }
    
    data.table(
      site = site_name, variable = var_name, variable_type = "continuous",
      comparison = comparison_label, level = NA_character_,
      group1 = g1, group2 = g2, group1_n = n1, group2_n = n2,
      group1_mean = mean1, group2_mean = mean2,
      group1_sd = sd1, group2_sd = sd2,
      group1_median = med1, group2_median = med2,
      group1_p25 = p25_1, group2_p25 = p25_2,
      group1_p75 = p75_1, group2_p75 = p75_2,
      statistic = "mean_difference", estimate = estimate,
      ci_lower = ci_lower, ci_upper = ci_upper, p_value = p_value,
      smd = smd, effect_measure = "mean_difference",
      test = test_used, note = NA_character_
    )
  }

  #--------------------------------------------------#
  # Helper: categorical variable comparison
  #--------------------------------------------------#
  compare_categorical <- function(x, group, var_name, g1, g2, comparison_label) {
    dsub <- data.table(x = x, group = group)
    dsub <- dsub[!is.na(group)]
    dsub[, x := as.character(x)]
    dsub[is.na(x), x := "missing"]
    
    tab <- table(dsub$x, dsub$group)
    needed_cols <- c(g1, g2)
    if (!all(needed_cols %in% colnames(tab))) {
      full_tab <- matrix(0, nrow = nrow(tab), ncol = 2,
                         dimnames = list(rownames(tab), needed_cols))
      common_cols <- intersect(colnames(tab), needed_cols)
      full_tab[, common_cols] <- tab[, common_cols, drop = FALSE]
      tab <- full_tab
    } else {
      tab <- tab[, needed_cols, drop = FALSE]
    }
    
    n_levels <- nrow(tab)
    n1 <- sum(tab[, g1])
    n2 <- sum(tab[, g2])
    
    overall_smd <- calc_multilevel_smd(dsub$x, dsub$group, g1, g2)
    
    p_value <- NA_real_; test_used <- NA_character_
    if (n_levels >= 1) {
      chisq_try <- try(chisq.test(tab, correct = FALSE), silent = TRUE)
      if (!inherits(chisq_try, "try-error")) {
        expected <- chisq_try$expected
        if (fisher_if_expected_lt5 && any(expected < 5)) {
          fisher_try <- try(fisher.test(tab), silent = TRUE)
          if (!inherits(fisher_try, "try-error")) {
            p_value <- fisher_try$p.value; test_used <- "fisher_exact"
          } else {
            p_value <- chisq_try$p.value; test_used <- "chi_square"
          }
        } else {
          p_value <- chisq_try$p.value; test_used <- "chi_square"
        }
      }
    }
    
    out <- data.table(
      site = site_name, variable = var_name, variable_type = "categorical",
      comparison = comparison_label, level = NA_character_,
      group1 = g1, group2 = g2, group1_n = n1, group2_n = n2,
      group1_mean = NA_real_, group2_mean = NA_real_,
      group1_sd = NA_real_, group2_sd = NA_real_,
      group1_median = NA_real_, group2_median = NA_real_,
      group1_p25 = NA_real_, group2_p25 = NA_real_,
      group1_p75 = NA_real_, group2_p75 = NA_real_,
      statistic = "overall_difference", estimate = NA_real_,
      ci_lower = NA_real_, ci_upper = NA_real_, p_value = p_value,
      smd = overall_smd, effect_measure = "categorical_smd",
      test = test_used, note = NA_character_
    )
    
    if (n_levels == 2) {
      levels_x <- rownames(tab)
      ref_level <- levels_x[1]; target_level <- levels_x[2]
      a <- as.numeric(tab[target_level, g2])
      b <- as.numeric(tab[ref_level,   g2])
      c <- as.numeric(tab[target_level, g1])
      d <- as.numeric(tab[ref_level,   g1])
      p1 <- if ((c + d) > 0) c / (c + d) else NA_real_
      p2 <- if ((a + b) > 0) a / (a + b) else NA_real_
      rd <- if (!is.na(p1) && !is.na(p2)) p2 - p1 else NA_real_
      rd_se <- if (!is.na(p1) && !is.na(p2) && (c + d) > 0 && (a + b) > 0)
        sqrt((p1 * (1 - p1) / (c + d)) + (p2 * (1 - p2) / (a + b))) else NA_real_
      rd_lcl <- if (!is.na(rd_se)) rd - 1.96 * rd_se else NA_real_
      rd_ucl <- if (!is.na(rd_se)) rd + 1.96 * rd_se else NA_real_
      pooled_p <- if (!is.na(p1) && !is.na(p2)) (p1 + p2) / 2 else NA_real_
      smd_binary <- if (!is.na(pooled_p) && pooled_p > 0 && pooled_p < 1)
        (p2 - p1) / sqrt(pooled_p * (1 - pooled_p)) else NA_real_
      
      out_rd <- data.table(
        site = site_name, variable = var_name, variable_type = "categorical",
        comparison = comparison_label, level = target_level,
        group1 = g1, group2 = g2, group1_n = n1, group2_n = n2,
        group1_mean = p1, group2_mean = p2,
        group1_sd = NA_real_, group2_sd = NA_real_,
        group1_median = NA_real_, group2_median = NA_real_,
        group1_p25 = NA_real_, group2_p25 = NA_real_,
        group1_p75 = NA_real_, group2_p75 = NA_real_,
        statistic = "risk_difference", estimate = rd,
        ci_lower = rd_lcl, ci_upper = rd_ucl, p_value = p_value,
        smd = smd_binary, effect_measure = "risk_difference",
        test = test_used,
        note = sprintf("Binary categorical variable. level='%s' treated as event.", target_level)
      )
      out <- rbind(out, out_rd, fill = TRUE)
      
    } else if (n_levels > 2) {
      out[, note := "Multi-level categorical variable: overall p-value and omnibus SMD reported; CI not populated."]
    }
    
    out
  }

  #--------------------------------------------------#
  # Loop over pairwise comparisons
  #--------------------------------------------------#
  all_comparisons <- lapply(comparators, function(comp) {
    g1 <- ref
    g2 <- comp
    comparison_label <- paste0(by, ": ", g2, " vs ", g1)
    dt_pair <- dt[get(by) %in% c(g1, g2)]
    out_list <- list()
    
    if (!is.null(cont_vars)) {
      for (v in cont_vars) {
        if (!(v %in% names(dt_pair))) { warning(sprintf("'%s' not found. Skipping.", v)); next }
        out_list[[paste0("cont_", v)]] <- compare_continuous(dt_pair[[v]], dt_pair[[by]], v, g1, g2, comparison_label)
      }
    }
    
    if (!is.null(cat_vars)) {
      for (v in cat_vars) {
        if (!(v %in% names(dt_pair))) { warning(sprintf("'%s' not found. Skipping.", v)); next }
        out_list[[paste0("cat_", v)]] <- compare_categorical(dt_pair[[v]], dt_pair[[by]], v, g1, g2, comparison_label)
      }
    }
    
    rbindlist(out_list, fill = TRUE, use.names = TRUE)
  })

  out <- rbindlist(all_comparisons, fill = TRUE, use.names = TRUE)
  
  #-----------------------------#
  # CENSORING
  #-----------------------------#
  # Add censored count columns before suppressing raw values
  out[, group1_n_censored := ifelse(group1_n < 10, "<10", as.character(group1_n))]
  out[, group2_n_censored := ifelse(group2_n < 10, "<10", as.character(group2_n))]
  
  # Suppress all statistics when either group is below threshold
  out[group1_n < 10 | group2_n < 10,
      `:=`(
        estimate      = NA_real_,
        ci_lower      = NA_real_,
        ci_upper      = NA_real_,
        p_value       = NA_real_,
        smd           = NA_real_,
        group1_mean   = NA_real_,
        group2_mean   = NA_real_,
        group1_sd     = NA_real_,
        group2_sd     = NA_real_,
        group1_median = NA_real_,
        group2_median = NA_real_,
        group1_p25    = NA_real_,
        group2_p25    = NA_real_,
        group1_p75    = NA_real_,
        group2_p75    = NA_real_,
        note          = "Suppressed: cell size < 10"
      )]
  
  # Suppress raw counts after creating censored versions
  out[group1_n < 10, group1_n := NA_real_]
  out[group2_n < 10, group2_n := NA_real_]

  #-----------------------------#
  # COMPLEMENTARY SUPPRESSION
  #-----------------------------#
  # In the comparisons table, the structure is one row per variable-comparison pair
  # (not per level), so if either group_n is suppressed we suppress the whole
  # variable-comparison combination, which the censoring block above already does.
  # The additional step here suppresses variables entirely if they appear in ANY
  # suppressed comparison, preventing back-calculation across comparisons.

  suppressed_vars <- out[
    group1_n_censored == "<10" | group2_n_censored == "<10",
    unique(variable)
  ]

  if (length(suppressed_vars) > 0) {
    out[variable %in% suppressed_vars,
        `:=`(
          estimate      = NA_real_,
          ci_lower      = NA_real_,
          ci_upper      = NA_real_,
          p_value       = NA_real_,
          smd           = NA_real_,
          group1_mean   = NA_real_,
          group2_mean   = NA_real_,
          group1_sd     = NA_real_,
          group2_sd     = NA_real_,
          group1_median = NA_real_,
          group2_median = NA_real_,
          group1_p25    = NA_real_,
          group2_p25    = NA_real_,
          group1_p75    = NA_real_,
          group2_p75    = NA_real_,
          group1_n_censored = ifelse(group1_n_censored == "<10", "<10", "suppressed"),
          group2_n_censored = ifelse(group2_n_censored == "<10", "<10", "suppressed"),
          group1_n      = NA_real_,
          group2_n      = NA_real_,
          note          = ifelse(
            is.na(note) | note == "",
            "Suppressed: complementary cell size < 10",
            note
          )
        )]
  }

  desired_order <- c(
    "site", "variable", "variable_type", "comparison", "level",
    "group1", "group2", "group1_n", "group1_n_censored",
    "group2_n", "group2_n_censored",
    "group1_mean", "group2_mean", "group1_sd", "group2_sd",
    "group1_median", "group2_median", "group1_p25", "group2_p25",
    "group1_p75", "group2_p75",
    "statistic", "estimate", "ci_lower", "ci_upper",
    "p_value", "smd", "effect_measure", "test", "note"
  )
  existing_order <- desired_order[desired_order %in% names(out)]
  setcolorder(out, existing_order)
  
  return(out[])
}

################################################################################
# Initialize a global log for skipped/failed table1s (with project column)
################################################################################
table1_log <- data.table(
  project         = character(),
  table_name      = character(),
  cohort_name     = character(),
  by_var          = character(),
  table_type      = character(),
  n_rows          = integer(),
  n_groups        = integer(),
  status          = character(),
  reason          = character(),
  output_file     = character()
)

################################################################################
# Wrapper: descriptive table1 with safety checks and logging
################################################################################
make_table1_safe <- function(dt,
                             cat_vars,
                             cont_vars,
                             by,
                             site_name,
                             output_path,
                             table_name,
                             cohort_name,
                             project = NA_character_) {                    # NEW
  
  if (is.null(dt) || nrow(dt) == 0) {
    log_row <- data.table(
      project = project,                                                   # NEW
      table_name = table_name, cohort_name = cohort_name, by_var = by,
      table_type = "descriptive", n_rows = 0L, n_groups = 0L,
      status = "skipped_empty", reason = "Cohort has 0 rows",
      output_file = output_path
    )
    table1_log <<- rbind(table1_log, log_row, fill = TRUE)
    message("Skipping ", table_name, " table1: cohort is empty")
    return(NULL)
  }
  
  if (!by %in% names(dt)) {
    log_row <- data.table(
      project = project,                                                   # NEW
      table_name = table_name, cohort_name = cohort_name, by_var = by,
      table_type = "descriptive", n_rows = nrow(dt), n_groups = 0L,
      status = "failed", reason = paste0("by variable '", by, "' not in data"),
      output_file = output_path
    )
    table1_log <<- rbind(table1_log, log_row, fill = TRUE)
    message("Skipping ", table_name, " table1: by variable '", by, "' not in data")
    return(NULL)
  }
  
  n_groups <- length(unique(dt[[by]][!is.na(dt[[by]])]))
  if (n_groups < 1) {
    log_row <- data.table(
      project = project,                                                   # NEW
      table_name = table_name, cohort_name = cohort_name, by_var = by,
      table_type = "descriptive", n_rows = nrow(dt), n_groups = 0L,
      status = "skipped_empty",
      reason = paste0("by variable '", by, "' has no non-NA values"),
      output_file = output_path
    )
    table1_log <<- rbind(table1_log, log_row, fill = TRUE)
    message("Skipping ", table_name, " table1: by variable has no non-NA values")
    return(NULL)
  }
  
  result <- tryCatch({
    tbl <- make_table1_federated(
      dt = dt, cat_vars = cat_vars, cont_vars = cont_vars,
      by = by, site_name = site_name
    )
    fwrite(tbl, output_path)
    
    log_row <- data.table(
      project = project,                                                   # NEW
      table_name = table_name, cohort_name = cohort_name, by_var = by,
      table_type = "descriptive", n_rows = nrow(dt), n_groups = n_groups,
      status = "success", reason = NA_character_,
      output_file = output_path
    )
    table1_log <<- rbind(table1_log, log_row, fill = TRUE)
    tbl
    
  }, error = function(e) {
    log_row <- data.table(
      project = project,                                                   # NEW
      table_name = table_name, cohort_name = cohort_name, by_var = by,
      table_type = "descriptive", n_rows = nrow(dt), n_groups = n_groups,
      status = "failed", reason = conditionMessage(e),
      output_file = output_path
    )
    table1_log <<- rbind(table1_log, log_row, fill = TRUE)
    message("Skipping ", table_name, " table1: ", conditionMessage(e))
    return(NULL)
  })
  
  return(result)
}

################################################################################
# Wrapper: comparison table1 with safety checks and logging
################################################################################
make_table1_comparisons_safe <- function(dt,
                                         by,
                                         reference_level,
                                         cont_vars,
                                         cat_vars,
                                         site_name,
                                         output_path,
                                         table_name,
                                         cohort_name,
                                         project = NA_character_) {        # NEW
  
  if (is.null(dt) || nrow(dt) == 0) {
    log_row <- data.table(
      project = project,                                                   # NEW
      table_name = table_name, cohort_name = cohort_name, by_var = by,
      table_type = "comparisons", n_rows = 0L, n_groups = 0L,
      status = "skipped_empty", reason = "Cohort has 0 rows",
      output_file = output_path
    )
    table1_log <<- rbind(table1_log, log_row, fill = TRUE)
    message("Skipping ", table_name, " comparisons: cohort is empty")
    return(NULL)
  }
  
  if (!by %in% names(dt)) {
    log_row <- data.table(
      project = project,                                                   # NEW
      table_name = table_name, cohort_name = cohort_name, by_var = by,
      table_type = "comparisons", n_rows = nrow(dt), n_groups = 0L,
      status = "failed", reason = paste0("by variable '", by, "' not in data"),
      output_file = output_path
    )
    table1_log <<- rbind(table1_log, log_row, fill = TRUE)
    message("Skipping ", table_name, " comparisons: by variable '", by, "' not in data")
    return(NULL)
  }
  
  observed_groups <- unique(as.character(dt[[by]]))
  observed_groups <- observed_groups[!is.na(observed_groups)]
  n_groups <- length(observed_groups)
  
  if (n_groups < 2) {
    log_row <- data.table(
      project = project,                                                   # NEW
      table_name = table_name, cohort_name = cohort_name, by_var = by,
      table_type = "comparisons", n_rows = nrow(dt), n_groups = n_groups,
      status = "skipped_empty",
      reason = paste0("Only ", n_groups, " group(s) present; need >=2 for comparisons"),
      output_file = output_path
    )
    table1_log <<- rbind(table1_log, log_row, fill = TRUE)
    message("Skipping ", table_name, " comparisons: only ", n_groups,
            " group(s) in '", by, "'")
    return(NULL)
  }
  
  if (!reference_level %in% observed_groups) {
    log_row <- data.table(
      project = project,                                                   # NEW
      table_name = table_name, cohort_name = cohort_name, by_var = by,
      table_type = "comparisons", n_rows = nrow(dt), n_groups = n_groups,
      status = "skipped_empty",
      reason = paste0("Reference level '", reference_level,
                      "' not present in data. Observed: ",
                      paste(observed_groups, collapse = ", ")),
      output_file = output_path
    )
    table1_log <<- rbind(table1_log, log_row, fill = TRUE)
    message("Skipping ", table_name, " comparisons: reference level '",
            reference_level, "' not in data")
    return(NULL)
  }
  
  result <- tryCatch({
    tbl <- make_table1_comparisons(
      dt = dt, by = by, reference_level = reference_level,
      cont_vars = cont_vars, cat_vars = cat_vars, site_name = site_name
    )
    fwrite(tbl, output_path)
    
    log_row <- data.table(
      project = project,                                                   # NEW
      table_name = table_name, cohort_name = cohort_name, by_var = by,
      table_type = "comparisons", n_rows = nrow(dt), n_groups = n_groups,
      status = "success", reason = NA_character_,
      output_file = output_path
    )
    table1_log <<- rbind(table1_log, log_row, fill = TRUE)
    tbl
    
  }, error = function(e) {
    log_row <- data.table(
      project = project,                                                   # NEW
      table_name = table_name, cohort_name = cohort_name, by_var = by,
      table_type = "comparisons", n_rows = nrow(dt), n_groups = n_groups,
      status = "failed", reason = conditionMessage(e),
      output_file = output_path
    )
    table1_log <<- rbind(table1_log, log_row, fill = TRUE)
    message("Skipping ", table_name, " comparisons: ", conditionMessage(e))
    return(NULL)
  })
  
  return(result)
}

################################################################################
# Combined wrapper: build descriptive + comparison table1s in one call
################################################################################
make_table1_pair <- function(dt,
                             by,
                             reference_level,
                             cat_vars,
                             cont_vars,
                             site_name,
                             tables_dir,
                             institution_prefix,
                             cohort_name,
                             file_stem,
                             project = NA_character_) {                    # NEW
  
  desc_path <- file.path(tables_dir,
                         paste0(institution_prefix, "_table1_", file_stem, "_descriptive.csv"))
  comp_path <- file.path(tables_dir,
                         paste0(institution_prefix, "_table1_", file_stem, "_comparisons.csv"))
  
  desc <- make_table1_safe(
    dt = dt, cat_vars = cat_vars, cont_vars = cont_vars, by = by,
    site_name = site_name, output_path = desc_path,
    table_name = paste0(file_stem, "_descriptive"),
    cohort_name = cohort_name,
    project = project                                                      # NEW
  )
  
  comp <- make_table1_comparisons_safe(
    dt = dt, by = by, reference_level = reference_level,
    cont_vars = cont_vars, cat_vars = cat_vars, site_name = site_name,
    output_path = comp_path,
    table_name = paste0(file_stem, "_comparisons"),
    cohort_name = cohort_name,
    project = project                                                      # NEW
  )
  
  invisible(list(descriptive = desc, comparisons = comp))
}
```

# Function to Run LM and GLM Models
```{r}
# Helper function to extract model results safely
extract_lm_results <- function(model) {
  coef_table <- summary(model)$coefficients
  data.frame(
    term      = rownames(coef_table),
    estimate  = coef_table[, "Estimate"],
    std.error = coef_table[, "Std. Error"],
    variance  = coef_table[, "Std. Error"]^2,
    p.value   = coef_table[, "Pr(>|t|)"]
  )
}

extract_glm_results <- function(model) {
  coef_table <- summary(model)$coefficients
  odds_ratios <- exp(coef_table[, "Estimate"])
  data.frame(
    Variable  = rownames(coef_table),
    Odds_Ratio = odds_ratios,
    Std_Error = coef_table[, "Std. Error"],
    Variance  = coef_table[, "Std. Error"]^2,
    P_Value   = coef_table[, "Pr(>|z|)"]
  )
}

################################################################################
# Initialize a global log for dropped terms (with project column)
################################################################################
model_dropped_terms_log <- data.table(
  project           = character(),
  model_name        = character(),
  outcome           = character(),
  cohort_name       = character(),
  n_obs             = integer(),
  exposure          = character(),
  dropped_terms     = character(),
  dropped_reason    = character(),
  exposure_dropped  = logical(),
  model_skipped     = logical(),
  error_message     = character()
)

################################################################################
# Helper: count non-NA unique levels of a variable
################################################################################
n_levels_nonNA <- function(x) length(unique(x[!is.na(x)]))

################################################################################
# Helper: extract the variable name from a term like "factor(hospital_icu_id)"
# or "race_category" or "lang_cat_6 * race_category"
################################################################################
extract_var_names <- function(term) {
  # Handle factor() wrapper
  cleaned <- gsub("factor\\(([^)]+)\\)", "\\1", term)
  # Handle interactions (split on *, :, and trim)
  parts <- unlist(strsplit(cleaned, "\\s*[\\*:]\\s*"))
  trimws(parts)
}

################################################################################
# Main wrapper: fit a model, dropping zero-variance covariates as needed
################################################################################
fit_model_safe <- function(outcome,
                           exposure = NULL,
                           covariates,
                           data,
                           model_name,
                           cohort_name,
                           project    = NA_character_,   # NEW
                           family     = NULL,
                           weights    = NULL,
                           min_levels = 2) {
  
  # Step 1: identify which covariates have insufficient variance
  drop <- character(0)
  drop_reasons <- character(0)
  
  for (term in covariates) {
    vars <- extract_var_names(term)
    for (v in vars) {
      if (!v %in% names(data)) {
        drop <- c(drop, term)
        drop_reasons <- c(drop_reasons, paste0(term, ": variable not in data"))
        break
      }
      if (n_levels_nonNA(data[[v]]) < min_levels) {
        drop <- c(drop, term)
        drop_reasons <- c(drop_reasons,
                          paste0(term, ": <", min_levels, " unique non-NA levels"))
        break
      }
    }
  }
  drop <- unique(drop)
  
  # Step 2: check the exposure itself (if one was provided)
  exposure_dropped <- FALSE
  if (!is.null(exposure)) {
    exposure_vars <- extract_var_names(exposure)
    for (v in exposure_vars) {
      if (!v %in% names(data) || n_levels_nonNA(data[[v]]) < min_levels) {
        exposure_dropped <- TRUE
        break
      }
    }
  }
  
  # Step 3: if exposure was provided but is degenerate, log and skip
  if (exposure_dropped) {
    log_row <- data.table(
      project          = project,
      model_name       = model_name,
      outcome          = outcome,
      cohort_name      = cohort_name,
      n_obs            = nrow(data),
      exposure         = if (is.null(exposure)) NA_character_ else exposure,
      dropped_terms    = paste(drop, collapse = "; "),
      dropped_reason   = paste(drop_reasons, collapse = "; "),
      exposure_dropped = TRUE,
      model_skipped    = TRUE,
      error_message    = paste0("Exposure '", exposure, "' has <", min_levels, " levels")
    )
    model_dropped_terms_log <<- rbind(model_dropped_terms_log, log_row, fill = TRUE)
    message("Skipping ", model_name, " model: exposure '", exposure,
            "' has <", min_levels, " levels")
    return(NULL)
  }
  
  # Step 4: build formula. If no exposure was provided, use covariates only.
  rhs <- if (is.null(exposure)) {
    setdiff(covariates, drop)
  } else {
    c(exposure, setdiff(covariates, drop))
  }
  
  if (length(rhs) == 0) {
    message("Skipping ", model_name, " model: no surviving terms")
    return(NULL)
  }
  
  fml <- reformulate(rhs, response = outcome)
  
  if (length(drop) > 0) {
    message(model_name, ": dropping ", length(drop), " term(s): ",
            paste(drop, collapse = ", "))
  }
  
  # Step 5: fit
  fit_result <- tryCatch({
    if (is.null(family)) {
      if (is.null(weights)) {
        lm(fml, data = data)
      } else {
        lm(fml, data = data, weights = weights)
      }
    } else {
      # Use do.call so the family argument is evaluated immediately and stored
      # as a concrete object in the model. Without this, pscl::pR2() and other
      # downstream functions can't recover the family later.
      if (is.null(weights)) {
        do.call(glm, list(formula = fml, data = data, family = family))
      } else {
        do.call(glm, list(formula = fml, data = data, family = family, weights = weights))
      }
    }
  }, error = function(e) {
    log_row <- data.table(
      project          = project,                                          # NEW
      model_name       = model_name,
      outcome          = outcome,
      cohort_name      = cohort_name,
      n_obs            = nrow(data),
      exposure = if (is.null(exposure)) NA_character_ else exposure,
      dropped_terms    = paste(drop, collapse = "; "),
      dropped_reason   = paste(drop_reasons, collapse = "; "),
      exposure_dropped = FALSE,
      model_skipped    = TRUE,
      error_message    = conditionMessage(e)
    )
    model_dropped_terms_log <<- rbind(model_dropped_terms_log, log_row, fill = TRUE)
    message("Skipping ", model_name, " model: ", conditionMessage(e))
    return(NULL)
  })
  
  # Step 6: log success
  if (!is.null(fit_result)) {
    log_row <- data.table(
      project          = project,
      model_name       = model_name,
      outcome          = outcome,
      cohort_name      = cohort_name,
      n_obs            = nrow(data),
      exposure         = if (is.null(exposure)) NA_character_ else exposure,   # CHANGED
      dropped_terms    = if (length(drop) > 0) paste(drop, collapse = "; ") else NA_character_,
      dropped_reason   = if (length(drop_reasons) > 0) paste(drop_reasons, collapse = "; ") else NA_character_,
      exposure_dropped = FALSE,
      model_skipped    = FALSE,
      error_message    = NA_character_
    )
    model_dropped_terms_log <<- rbind(model_dropped_terms_log, log_row, fill = TRUE)
  }
  
  return(fit_result)
}

################################################################################
# Standard covariate sets for models
# Defined once so changes to the adjustment set propagate everywhere.
################################################################################
standard_covariates <- c(
  "race_category", "age_category", "sex_category", "bmi",
  "factor(hospital_icu_id)", "elixhauser_score", "SVM_SCORE",
  "laps2", "factor(observation_year)"
)

# For paralytic project models, which omit SVM_SCORE
paralytic_covariates <- c(
  "race_category", "ethnicity_category_final", "age_category", "bmi",
  "sex_category", "factor(hospital_icu_id)", "elixhauser_score",
  "laps2", "factor(observation_year)"
)

# For measurements project models, which use a different set
measurements_covariates <- c(
  "race_category", "age_category", "sex_category", "ethnicity_category_final",
  "bmi", "factor(hospital_icu_id)", "elixhauser_score", "laps2",
  "location_of_intubation", "time_from_begin_imv_to_icu_hours",
  "factor(observation_year)"
)

# For exploratory analyses in sedation project
exploratory_binary_covariates <- c(
  "race_category", "age_category", "sex_category", "bmi",
  "factor(icu_imv)", "elixhauser_score", "SVM_SCORE", "laps2",
  "factor(observation_year)"
)
```

#IPW Calculation for 48-hours of observation
```{r}
ipw_outcome <- total_cohort[, .(
  reached_48h = as.integer(imv_duration_hours_final >= 48)
), by = hospitalization_id]

# Merge the reached_48h flag back to your dataset
ipw_sensitivity_analysis <- merge(total_cohort, ipw_outcome, by = "hospitalization_id")

# Use patient-level covariates to predict censoring
ipw_model <- glm(reached_48h ~ age_at_admission + sex_category + race_category + ethnicity_category + laps2 + factor(hospital_icu_id) + elixhauser_score + factor(observation_year),
                 data = unique(ipw_sensitivity_analysis, by = "hospitalization_id"),
                 family = binomial())

total_cohort[, prob_reach_48h := predict(ipw_model, newdata = total_cohort, type = "response")]
total_cohort[, ipw := 1 / prob_reach_48h]
```

# Build Language Categorizations
```{r}
# 1: English v Non-English
total_cohort[, lang_cat_1 := fifelse(
  language_category == "english", "english",
  fifelse(!is.na(language_category), "non-english", NA_character_)
)]

# 2: English v Spanish v all other non-English
total_cohort[, lang_cat_2 := fcase(
  language_category == "english", "english",
  language_category == "spanish", "spanish",
  !is.na(language_category), "other non-english",
  default = NA_character_
)]

# 3: English v Spanish v third most frequent hospital system wide language - all others NA
# Define third_lang
third_lang <- language_data[
  !trimws(tolower(language_category)) %in% c("english", "spanish", "unknown or na"),
  language_category
][1]

# Standardize the level name for cross-site pooling
third_lang_label <- "third_lang_cat"

# Define the variable
total_cohort[, lang_cat_3 := fcase(
  language_category == "english", "english",
  language_category == "spanish", "spanish",
  language_category == third_lang, third_lang_label,    # <-- use label instead of third_lang
  default = NA_character_
)]

third_lang_crosswalk <- data.table(
  institution        = institution,
  third_lang_cat     = third_lang
)
fwrite(third_lang_crosswalk,
       file.path(cohort_characteristics, 
                 paste0(institution, "_third_lang_crosswalk.csv")))

# 4: English v Spanish v Chinese v Vietnamese (three non-English languages with the most evidence supporting the existence of health disparities) - all others NA
total_cohort[, lang_cat_4 := fcase(
  language_category == "english", "english",
  language_category == "spanish", "spanish",
  language_category == "chinese", "chinese",
  language_category == "vietnamese", "vietnamese",
  default = NA_character_
)]

# 5: English v Spanish v Broad Regional Groupings
# South Asian, East Asian, Southeast Asian, Sub-Saharan African, non-colonial European
# Others that do not fit are NA

# -----------------------------
# Define language groupings
# -----------------------------

south_asian_langs <- c(
  "gujarati",
  "hindi",
  "urdu",
  "punjabi",
  "bengali",
  "nepali, marathi, or other indic languages",
  "telugu",
  "tamil",
  "malayalam, kannada, or other dravidian languages"
)

east_asian_langs <- c(
  "chinese",
  "japanese",
  "korean"
)

southeast_asian_langs <- c(
  "vietnamese",
  "khmer",
  "thai, lao, or other tai-kadai languages"
)

other_asian_langs <- c(
  "other languages of asia",
  "tagalog",
  "ilocano, samoan, hawaiian, or other austronesian languages"
)

sub_saharan_african_langs <- c(
  "amharic, somali, or other afro-asiatic languages",
  "yoruba, twi, igbo, or other languages of western africa",
  "swahili or other languages of central, eastern, and southern africa"
)

continental_european_langs <- c(
  "german",
  "greek",
  "russian",
  "polish",
  "italian",
  "serbo-croatian",
  "ukrainian or other slavic languages",
  "yiddish, pennsylvania dutch, or other west germanic languages",
  "other european indo-european languages")
  
mena_langs <- c(
  "arabic",
  "persian",
  "hebrew",
  "armenian"
)

all_other_langs <- c(
  "french",
  "haitian creole",
  "portuguese",
  "other asian indo-european languages",
  "navajo",
  "other native languages of north america",
  "other and unspecified languages"
)

total_cohort[, lang_cat_5 := fcase(
  language_category == "english", "english",
  language_category == "spanish", "spanish",
  language_category %in% south_asian_langs, "south_asian",
  language_category %in% east_asian_langs, "east_asian",
  language_category %in% southeast_asian_langs, "southeast_asian",
  language_category %in% continental_european_langs, "continental_european_langs",
  language_category %in% mena_langs, "mena",
  default = NA_character_
)]

# 6: English v Spanish - all others NA
total_cohort[, lang_cat_6 := fcase(
  language_category == "english", "english",
  language_category == "spanish", "spanish",
  default = NA_character_
)]

# Broad Regional without "other_asian" and "all_other_langs" groups?
total_cohort[, lang_cat_7 := fcase(
  language_category == "english", "english",
  language_category == "spanish", "spanish",
  language_category %in% south_asian_langs, "south_asian",
  language_category %in% east_asian_langs, "east_asian",
  language_category %in% southeast_asian_langs, "southeast_asian",
  language_category %in% other_asian_langs, "other_asian",
  language_category %in% sub_saharan_african_langs, "sub_saharan_african",
  language_category %in% continental_european_langs, "continental_european_langs",
  language_category %in% mena_langs, "mena",
  language_category %in% all_other_langs, "all_other_langs",
  default = NA_character_
)]

```


# SEDATION PROJECT
# Step 1: Total Cohort for Non-English & Spanish + Non-English Analysis
```{r}
current_project <- "sedation"

# Identify reference points for model
total_cohort$language_category       <- relevel(as.factor(total_cohort$language_category),       ref = "english")
total_cohort$lang_cat_1              <- relevel(as.factor(total_cohort$lang_cat_1),              ref = "english")
total_cohort$lang_cat_2              <- relevel(as.factor(total_cohort$lang_cat_2),              ref = "english")
total_cohort$lang_cat_3              <- relevel(as.factor(total_cohort$lang_cat_3),              ref = "english")
total_cohort$lang_cat_4              <- relevel(as.factor(total_cohort$lang_cat_4),              ref = "english")
total_cohort$lang_cat_5              <- relevel(as.factor(total_cohort$lang_cat_5),              ref = "english")
total_cohort$lang_cat_6              <- relevel(as.factor(total_cohort$lang_cat_6),              ref = "english")
total_cohort$lang_cat_7              <- relevel(as.factor(total_cohort$lang_cat_7),              ref = "english")
total_cohort$sex_category            <- relevel(as.factor(total_cohort$sex_category),            ref = "male")
total_cohort$race_category           <- relevel(as.factor(total_cohort$race_category),           ref = "white")
total_cohort$ethnicity_category      <- relevel(as.factor(total_cohort$ethnicity_category),      ref = "non-hispanic")
total_cohort$ethnicity_category_final <- relevel(as.factor(total_cohort$ethnicity_category_final), ref = "non-hispanic/unknown")

################################################################################
# Eng v Non-Eng
################################################################################
make_table1_pair(
  dt = total_cohort, by = "lang_cat_1", reference_level = "english",
  cat_vars = cat_vars, cont_vars = cont_vars, site_name = institution,
  tables_dir = sedation_tables_dir, institution_prefix = institution,
  cohort_name = "total_cohort", file_stem = "total_cohort_lang_cat_1",
  project     = current_project  
)

sensitivity_model_lang_cat_1 <- fit_model_safe(
  outcome     = "percent_deep_sedation_48",
  exposure    = "lang_cat_1",
  covariates  = standard_covariates,
  data        = total_cohort,
  model_name  = "sensitivity_model_lang_cat_1",
  cohort_name = "total_cohort",
  project     = current_project  
)
if (!is.null(sensitivity_model_lang_cat_1)) {
  fwrite(extract_lm_results(sensitivity_model_lang_cat_1),
         file.path(sedation_sensitivity, paste0(institution, "_sensitivity_analysis_lang_cat_1.csv")))
}

################################################################################
# Eng v Spanish v Other Non-Eng
################################################################################
make_table1_pair(
  dt = total_cohort, by = "lang_cat_2", reference_level = "english",
  cat_vars = cat_vars, cont_vars = cont_vars, site_name = institution,
  tables_dir = sedation_tables_dir, institution_prefix = institution,
  cohort_name = "total_cohort", file_stem = "total_cohort_lang_cat_2",
  project     = current_project  
)

sensitivity_model_lang_cat_2 <- fit_model_safe(
  outcome     = "percent_deep_sedation_48",
  exposure    = "lang_cat_2",
  covariates  = standard_covariates,
  data        = total_cohort,
  model_name  = "sensitivity_model_lang_cat_2",
  cohort_name = "total_cohort",
  project     = current_project  
)
if (!is.null(sensitivity_model_lang_cat_2)) {
  fwrite(extract_lm_results(sensitivity_model_lang_cat_2),
         file.path(sedation_sensitivity, paste0(institution, "_sensitivity_analysis_lang_cat_2.csv")))
}

################################################################################
# Eng v Spanish v Broad Regional Language Groups Including Everyone
################################################################################
make_table1_pair(
  dt = total_cohort, by = "lang_cat_7", reference_level = "english",
  cat_vars = cat_vars, cont_vars = cont_vars, site_name = institution,
  tables_dir = sedation_tables_dir, institution_prefix = institution,
  cohort_name = "total_cohort", file_stem = "total_cohort_lang_cat_7",
  project     = current_project
)

sensitivity_model_lang_cat_7 <- fit_model_safe(
  outcome     = "percent_deep_sedation_48",
  exposure    = "lang_cat_7",
  covariates  = standard_covariates,
  data        = total_cohort,
  model_name  = "sensitivity_model_lang_cat_7",
  cohort_name = "total_cohort",
  project     = current_project
)
if (!is.null(sensitivity_model_lang_cat_7)) {
  fwrite(extract_lm_results(sensitivity_model_lang_cat_7),
         file.path(sedation_sensitivity, paste0(institution, "_sensitivity_analysis_lang_cat_7.csv")))
}
```

# Step 2: English + Spanish + Most Frequent non-spanish/non-english
```{r}
lang_cat_3_cohort <- total_cohort[!is.na(lang_cat_3)]
lang_cat_3_cohort$language_category       <- relevel(as.factor(lang_cat_3_cohort$language_category),       ref = "english")
lang_cat_3_cohort$lang_cat_1              <- relevel(as.factor(lang_cat_3_cohort$lang_cat_1),              ref = "english")
lang_cat_3_cohort$lang_cat_2              <- relevel(as.factor(lang_cat_3_cohort$lang_cat_2),              ref = "english")
lang_cat_3_cohort$lang_cat_3              <- relevel(as.factor(lang_cat_3_cohort$lang_cat_3),              ref = "english")
lang_cat_3_cohort$lang_cat_4              <- relevel(as.factor(lang_cat_3_cohort$lang_cat_4),              ref = "english")
lang_cat_3_cohort$lang_cat_5              <- relevel(as.factor(lang_cat_3_cohort$lang_cat_5),              ref = "english")
lang_cat_3_cohort$lang_cat_6              <- relevel(as.factor(lang_cat_3_cohort$lang_cat_6),              ref = "english")
lang_cat_3_cohort$sex_category            <- relevel(as.factor(lang_cat_3_cohort$sex_category),            ref = "male")
lang_cat_3_cohort$race_category           <- relevel(as.factor(lang_cat_3_cohort$race_category),           ref = "white")
lang_cat_3_cohort$ethnicity_category      <- relevel(as.factor(lang_cat_3_cohort$ethnicity_category),      ref = "non-hispanic")
lang_cat_3_cohort$ethnicity_category_final <- relevel(as.factor(lang_cat_3_cohort$ethnicity_category_final), ref = "non-hispanic/unknown")

make_table1_pair(
  dt = lang_cat_3_cohort, by = "lang_cat_3", reference_level = "english",
  cat_vars = cat_vars, cont_vars = cont_vars, site_name = institution,
  tables_dir = sedation_tables_dir, institution_prefix = institution,
  cohort_name = "lang_cat_3_cohort", file_stem = "total_cohort_lang_cat_3",
  project     = current_project
)

sensitivity_model_lang_cat_3 <- fit_model_safe(
  outcome     = "percent_deep_sedation_48",
  exposure    = "lang_cat_3",
  covariates  = standard_covariates,
  data        = lang_cat_3_cohort,
  model_name  = "sensitivity_model_lang_cat_3",
  cohort_name = "lang_cat_3_cohort",
  project     = current_project
)
if (!is.null(sensitivity_model_lang_cat_3)) {
  fwrite(extract_lm_results(sensitivity_model_lang_cat_3),
         file.path(sedation_sensitivity, paste0(institution, "_sensitivity_analysis_lang_cat_3.csv")))
}
```

# Step 3: Languages with the most evidence of disparities in the medical literature
```{r}
lang_cat_4_cohort <- total_cohort[!is.na(lang_cat_4)]
lang_cat_4_cohort$language_category       <- relevel(as.factor(lang_cat_4_cohort$language_category),       ref = "english")
lang_cat_4_cohort$lang_cat_4              <- relevel(as.factor(lang_cat_4_cohort$lang_cat_4),              ref = "english")
lang_cat_4_cohort$sex_category            <- relevel(as.factor(lang_cat_4_cohort$sex_category),            ref = "male")
lang_cat_4_cohort$race_category           <- relevel(as.factor(lang_cat_4_cohort$race_category),           ref = "white")
lang_cat_4_cohort$ethnicity_category      <- relevel(as.factor(lang_cat_4_cohort$ethnicity_category),      ref = "non-hispanic")
lang_cat_4_cohort$ethnicity_category_final <- relevel(as.factor(lang_cat_4_cohort$ethnicity_category_final), ref = "non-hispanic/unknown")

make_table1_pair(
  dt = lang_cat_4_cohort, by = "lang_cat_4", reference_level = "english",
  cat_vars = cat_vars, cont_vars = cont_vars, site_name = institution,
  tables_dir = sedation_tables_dir, institution_prefix = institution,
  cohort_name = "lang_cat_4_cohort", file_stem = "total_cohort_lang_cat_4",
  project     = current_project
)

sensitivity_model_lang_cat_4 <- fit_model_safe(
  outcome     = "percent_deep_sedation_48",
  exposure    = "lang_cat_4",
  covariates  = standard_covariates,
  data        = lang_cat_4_cohort,
  model_name  = "sensitivity_model_lang_cat_4",
  cohort_name = "lang_cat_4_cohort",
  project     = current_project
)
if (!is.null(sensitivity_model_lang_cat_4)) {
  fwrite(extract_lm_results(sensitivity_model_lang_cat_4),
         file.path(sedation_sensitivity, paste0(institution, "_sensitivity_analysis_lang_cat_4.csv")))
}
```

# Step 4: Broad Regional Language Groupings
```{r}
lang_cat_5_cohort <- total_cohort[!is.na(lang_cat_5)]
lang_cat_5_cohort$language_category       <- relevel(as.factor(lang_cat_5_cohort$language_category),       ref = "english")
lang_cat_5_cohort$lang_cat_5              <- relevel(as.factor(lang_cat_5_cohort$lang_cat_5),              ref = "english")
lang_cat_5_cohort$sex_category            <- relevel(as.factor(lang_cat_5_cohort$sex_category),            ref = "male")
lang_cat_5_cohort$race_category           <- relevel(as.factor(lang_cat_5_cohort$race_category),           ref = "white")
lang_cat_5_cohort$ethnicity_category      <- relevel(as.factor(lang_cat_5_cohort$ethnicity_category),      ref = "non-hispanic")
lang_cat_5_cohort$ethnicity_category_final <- relevel(as.factor(lang_cat_5_cohort$ethnicity_category_final), ref = "non-hispanic/unknown")

make_table1_pair(
  dt = lang_cat_5_cohort, by = "lang_cat_5", reference_level = "english",
  cat_vars = cat_vars, cont_vars = cont_vars, site_name = institution,
  tables_dir = sedation_tables_dir, institution_prefix = institution,
  cohort_name = "lang_cat_5_cohort", file_stem = "total_cohort_lang_cat_5",
  project     = current_project
)

sensitivity_model_lang_cat_5 <- fit_model_safe(
  outcome     = "percent_deep_sedation_48",
  exposure    = "lang_cat_5",
  covariates  = standard_covariates,
  data        = lang_cat_5_cohort,
  model_name  = "sensitivity_model_lang_cat_5",
  cohort_name = "lang_cat_5_cohort",
  project     = current_project
)
if (!is.null(sensitivity_model_lang_cat_5)) {
  fwrite(extract_lm_results(sensitivity_model_lang_cat_5),
         file.path(sedation_sensitivity, paste0(institution, "_sensitivity_analysis_lang_cat_5.csv")))
}

```

# Step 5: Defining the primary cohort, primary analysis, secondary analyses, sensitivity analyses, exploratory analyses
```{r}
primary_cohort_all_icus <- total_cohort[!is.na(lang_cat_6)]
primary_cohort_all_icus$language_category       <- relevel(as.factor(primary_cohort_all_icus$language_category),       ref = "english")
primary_cohort_all_icus$lang_cat_6              <- relevel(as.factor(primary_cohort_all_icus$lang_cat_6),              ref = "english")
primary_cohort_all_icus$sex_category            <- relevel(as.factor(primary_cohort_all_icus$sex_category),            ref = "male")
primary_cohort_all_icus$race_category           <- relevel(as.factor(primary_cohort_all_icus$race_category),           ref = "white")
primary_cohort_all_icus$ethnicity_category      <- relevel(as.factor(primary_cohort_all_icus$ethnicity_category),      ref = "non-hispanic")
primary_cohort_all_icus$ethnicity_category_final <- relevel(as.factor(primary_cohort_all_icus$ethnicity_category_final), ref = "non-hispanic/unknown")

make_table1_pair(
  dt = primary_cohort_all_icus, by = "lang_cat_6", reference_level = "english",
  cat_vars = cat_vars, cont_vars = cont_vars, site_name = institution,
  tables_dir = sedation_tables_dir, institution_prefix = institution,
  cohort_name = "primary_cohort_all_icus", file_stem = "primary_cohort_all_icus",
  project     = current_project
)

sensitivity_model_primary_all_icus <- fit_model_safe(
  outcome     = "percent_deep_sedation_48",
  exposure    = "lang_cat_6",
  covariates  = standard_covariates,
  data        = primary_cohort_all_icus,
  model_name  = "sensitivity_model_primary_all_icus",
  cohort_name = "primary_cohort_all_icus",
  project     = current_project
)
if (!is.null(sensitivity_model_primary_all_icus)) {
  fwrite(extract_lm_results(sensitivity_model_primary_all_icus),
         file.path(sedation_sensitivity, paste0(institution, "_sensitivity_analysis_primary_all_icus.csv")))
}

################################################################################
# Define Primary Cohort
################################################################################
spanish_counts <- primary_cohort_all_icus[lang_cat_6 == "spanish", .N, by = hospital_icu_id]
all_hospitals <- unique(primary_cohort_all_icus$hospital_icu_id)
hospitals_with_spanish <- spanish_counts$hospital_icu_id
hospitals_to_remove <- setdiff(all_hospitals, hospitals_with_spanish)
primary_cohort <- primary_cohort_all_icus[!hospital_icu_id %in% hospitals_to_remove]

primary_cohort$language_category       <- relevel(as.factor(primary_cohort$language_category),       ref = "english")
primary_cohort$lang_cat_1              <- relevel(as.factor(primary_cohort$lang_cat_1),              ref = "english")
primary_cohort$lang_cat_2              <- relevel(as.factor(primary_cohort$lang_cat_2),              ref = "english")
primary_cohort$lang_cat_3              <- relevel(as.factor(primary_cohort$lang_cat_3),              ref = "english")
primary_cohort$lang_cat_4              <- relevel(as.factor(primary_cohort$lang_cat_4),              ref = "english")
primary_cohort$lang_cat_5              <- relevel(as.factor(primary_cohort$lang_cat_5),              ref = "english")
primary_cohort$lang_cat_6              <- relevel(as.factor(primary_cohort$lang_cat_6),              ref = "english")
primary_cohort$sex_category            <- relevel(as.factor(primary_cohort$sex_category),            ref = "male")
primary_cohort$race_category           <- relevel(as.factor(primary_cohort$race_category),           ref = "white")
primary_cohort$ethnicity_category      <- relevel(as.factor(primary_cohort$ethnicity_category),      ref = "non-hispanic")
primary_cohort$ethnicity_category_final <- relevel(as.factor(primary_cohort$ethnicity_category_final), ref = "non-hispanic/unknown")
primary_cohort$continuous_nmba_48      <- relevel(as.factor(primary_cohort$continuous_nmba_48),      ref = "0")
primary_cohort$icu_imv <- relevel(as.factor(primary_cohort$icu_imv), ref = "medical_icu")

################################################################################
# Primary Cohort - Table 1s
################################################################################
make_table1_pair(
  dt = primary_cohort, by = "lang_cat_6", reference_level = "english",
  cat_vars = cat_vars, cont_vars = cont_vars, site_name = institution,
  tables_dir = sedation_tables_dir, institution_prefix = institution,
  cohort_name = "primary_cohort", file_stem = "primary_cohort",
  project     = current_project
)

# Ethnicity and Race Counts by Language Group
spanish_race_counts      <- primary_cohort[lang_cat_6 == "spanish", .N, by = race_category]
spanish_ethnicity_counts <- primary_cohort[lang_cat_6 == "spanish", .N, by = ethnicity_category]
spanish_race_counts[,      N_censored := ifelse(N < 10, "<10", as.character(N))]
spanish_ethnicity_counts[, N_censored := ifelse(N < 10, "<10", as.character(N))]
spanish_race_counts[,      N := NULL]
spanish_ethnicity_counts[, N := NULL]
fwrite(spanish_race_counts,
       file.path(cohort_characteristics, paste0(institution, "_spanish_race_cell_counts.csv")))
fwrite(spanish_ethnicity_counts,
       file.path(cohort_characteristics, paste0(institution, "_spanish_ethnicity_cell_counts.csv")))

################################################################################
# Primary Analysis - Unadjusted and Adjusted
################################################################################
primary_model_unadjusted <- fit_model_safe(
  outcome     = "percent_deep_sedation_48",
  exposure    = "lang_cat_6",
  covariates  = character(0),
  data        = primary_cohort,
  model_name  = "primary_model_unadjusted",
  cohort_name = "primary_cohort",
  project     = current_project
)
if (!is.null(primary_model_unadjusted)) {
  fwrite(extract_lm_results(primary_model_unadjusted),
         file.path(sedation_final_data, paste0(institution, "_primary_model_unadjusted.csv")))
}

primary_model_adjusted <- fit_model_safe(
  outcome     = "percent_deep_sedation_48",
  exposure    = "lang_cat_6",
  covariates  = standard_covariates,
  data        = primary_cohort,
  model_name  = "primary_model_adjusted",
  cohort_name = "primary_cohort",
  project     = current_project
)
if (!is.null(primary_model_adjusted)) {
  fwrite(extract_lm_results(primary_model_adjusted),
         file.path(sedation_final_data, paste0(institution, "_primary_model_adjusted.csv")))
}

################################################################################
# Secondary Analyses
################################################################################
secondary_model_vfd <- fit_model_safe(
  outcome     = "vent_free_days_28",
  exposure    = "lang_cat_6",
  covariates  = standard_covariates,
  data        = primary_cohort,
  model_name  = "secondary_model_vfd",
  cohort_name = "primary_cohort",
  project     = current_project
)
if (!is.null(secondary_model_vfd)) {
  fwrite(extract_lm_results(secondary_model_vfd),
         file.path(sedation_secondary, paste0(institution, "_secondary_analysis_vfd.csv")))
}

secondary_model_imv_time <- fit_model_safe(
  outcome     = "imv_duration_hours_final",
  exposure    = "lang_cat_6",
  covariates  = standard_covariates,
  data        = primary_cohort,
  model_name  = "secondary_model_imv_time",
  cohort_name = "primary_cohort",
  project     = current_project
)
if (!is.null(secondary_model_imv_time)) {
  fwrite(extract_lm_results(secondary_model_imv_time),
         file.path(sedation_secondary, paste0(institution, "_secondary_analysis_imv_time.csv")))
}

secondary_model_trach <- fit_model_safe(
  outcome     = "trached",
  exposure    = "lang_cat_6",
  covariates  = standard_covariates,
  data        = primary_cohort,
  model_name  = "secondary_model_trach",
  cohort_name = "primary_cohort",
  family      = binomial(link = "logit"),
  project     = current_project
)
if (!is.null(secondary_model_trach)) {
  fwrite(extract_glm_results(secondary_model_trach),
         file.path(sedation_secondary, paste0(institution, "_secondary_analysis_trach.csv")))
}

secondary_model_6mhfd <- fit_model_safe(
  outcome     = "hospital_free_days_6mo",
  exposure    = "lang_cat_6",
  covariates  = standard_covariates,
  data        = primary_cohort,
  model_name  = "secondary_model_6mhfd",
  cohort_name = "primary_cohort",
  project     = current_project
)
if (!is.null(secondary_model_6mhfd)) {
  fwrite(extract_lm_results(secondary_model_6mhfd),
         file.path(sedation_secondary, paste0(institution, "_secondary_analysis_6mhfd.csv")))
}

secondary_model_28day_mortality <- fit_model_safe(
  outcome     = "mortality_28day",
  exposure    = "lang_cat_6",
  covariates  = standard_covariates,
  data        = primary_cohort,
  model_name  = "secondary_model_28day_mortality",
  cohort_name = "primary_cohort",
  family      = binomial(link = "logit"),
  project     = current_project
)
if (!is.null(secondary_model_28day_mortality)) {
  fwrite(extract_glm_results(secondary_model_28day_mortality),
         file.path(sedation_secondary, paste0(institution, "_secondary_analysis_28_day_mortality.csv")))
}

secondary_model_reintubation <- fit_model_safe(
  outcome     = "reintubation_final",
  exposure    = "lang_cat_6",
  covariates  = standard_covariates,
  data        = primary_cohort,
  model_name  = "secondary_model_reintubation",
  cohort_name = "primary_cohort",
  family      = binomial(link = "logit"),
  project     = current_project
)
if (!is.null(secondary_model_reintubation)) {
  fwrite(extract_glm_results(secondary_model_reintubation),
         file.path(sedation_secondary, paste0(institution, "_secondary_analysis_reintubation.csv")))
}

secondary_model_inhospital_mortality <- fit_model_safe(
  outcome     = "death_during_admission",
  exposure    = "lang_cat_6",
  covariates  = standard_covariates,
  data        = primary_cohort,
  model_name  = "secondary_model_inhospital_mortality",
  cohort_name = "primary_cohort",
  family      = binomial(link = "logit"),
  project     = current_project
)
if (!is.null(secondary_model_inhospital_mortality)) {
  fwrite(extract_glm_results(secondary_model_inhospital_mortality),
         file.path(sedation_secondary, paste0(institution, "_secondary_analysis_in_hospital_mortality.csv")))
}

secondary_model_hfd_28d <- fit_model_safe(
  outcome     = "hospital_free_days_28",
  exposure    = "lang_cat_6",
  covariates  = standard_covariates,
  data        = primary_cohort,
  model_name  = "secondary_model_hfd_28d",
  cohort_name = "primary_cohort",
  project     = current_project
)
if (!is.null(secondary_model_hfd_28d)) {
  fwrite(extract_lm_results(secondary_model_hfd_28d),
         file.path(sedation_secondary, paste0(institution, "_secondary_analysis_hfd_28d.csv")))
}

secondary_model_icufd <- fit_model_safe(
  outcome     = "icu_free_days_28",
  exposure    = "lang_cat_6",
  covariates  = standard_covariates,
  data        = primary_cohort,
  model_name  = "secondary_model_icufd",
  cohort_name = "primary_cohort",
  project     = current_project
)
if (!is.null(secondary_model_icufd)) {
  fwrite(extract_lm_results(secondary_model_icufd),
         file.path(sedation_secondary, paste0(institution, "_secondary_analysis_icufd.csv")))
}

secondary_model_vfd_alt <- fit_model_safe(
  outcome     = "vent_free_days_28_alt",
  exposure    = "lang_cat_6",
  covariates  = standard_covariates,
  data        = primary_cohort,
  model_name  = "secondary_model_vfd_alt",
  cohort_name = "primary_cohort",
  project     = current_project
)
if (!is.null(secondary_model_vfd_alt)) {
  fwrite(extract_lm_results(secondary_model_vfd_alt),
         file.path(sedation_secondary, paste0(institution, "_secondary_analysis_vfd_alt.csv")))
}

secondary_model_vfd_hours <- fit_model_safe(
  outcome     = "vent_free_days_28_hours",
  exposure    = "lang_cat_6",
  covariates  = standard_covariates,
  data        = primary_cohort,
  model_name  = "secondary_model_vfd_hours",
  cohort_name = "primary_cohort",
  project     = current_project
)
if (!is.null(secondary_model_vfd_hours)) {
  fwrite(extract_lm_results(secondary_model_vfd_hours),
         file.path(sedation_secondary, paste0(institution, "_secondary_analysis_vfd_hours.csv")))
}

################################################################################
# Sensitivity Analyses
################################################################################
sensitivity_model_alt_outcome_definition_1 <- fit_model_safe(
  outcome     = "deep_sedation_weighted",
  exposure    = "lang_cat_6",
  covariates  = standard_covariates,
  data        = primary_cohort,
  model_name  = "sensitivity_model_weighted_deep_sedation",
  cohort_name = "primary_cohort",
  family      = binomial(link = "logit"),
  project     = current_project
)
if (!is.null(sensitivity_model_alt_outcome_definition_1)) {
  fwrite(extract_glm_results(sensitivity_model_alt_outcome_definition_1),
         file.path(sedation_sensitivity, paste0(institution, "_sensitivity_analysis_weighted_deep_sedation.csv")))
}

sensitivity_model_alt_outcome_definition_2 <- fit_model_safe(
  outcome     = "deep_sedation_count_total_48",
  exposure    = "lang_cat_6",
  covariates  = standard_covariates,
  data        = primary_cohort,
  model_name  = "sensitivity_model_total_hours_deep_sedation",
  cohort_name = "primary_cohort",
  project     = current_project
)
if (!is.null(sensitivity_model_alt_outcome_definition_2)) {
  fwrite(extract_lm_results(sensitivity_model_alt_outcome_definition_2),
         file.path(sedation_sensitivity, paste0(institution, "_sensitivity_analysis_total_hours_deep_sedation.csv")))
}

sensitivity_model_alt_outcome_definition_3 <- fit_model_safe(
  outcome     = "sedation_index_score",
  exposure    = "lang_cat_6",
  covariates  = standard_covariates,
  data        = primary_cohort,
  model_name  = "sensitivity_model_sedation_index",
  cohort_name = "primary_cohort",
  project     = current_project
)
if (!is.null(sensitivity_model_alt_outcome_definition_3)) {
  fwrite(extract_lm_results(sensitivity_model_alt_outcome_definition_3),
         file.path(sedation_sensitivity, paste0(institution, "_sensitivity_analysis_sedation_index.csv")))
}

sensitivity_model_alt_outcome_definition_4 <- fit_model_safe(
  outcome     = "sedation_index_tertiles",
  exposure    = "lang_cat_6",
  covariates  = standard_covariates,
  data        = primary_cohort,
  model_name  = "sensitivity_model_sedation_index_tertiles",
  cohort_name = "primary_cohort",
  project     = current_project
)
if (!is.null(sensitivity_model_alt_outcome_definition_4)) {
  fwrite(extract_lm_results(sensitivity_model_alt_outcome_definition_4),
         file.path(sedation_sensitivity, paste0(institution, "_sensitivity_analysis_sedation_index_tertiles.csv")))
}

sensitivity_model_alt_rass_imp <- fit_model_safe(
  outcome     = "percent_deep_sedation_48_sensitivity",
  exposure    = "lang_cat_6",
  covariates  = standard_covariates,
  data        = primary_cohort,
  model_name  = "sensitivity_model_rass_imputation",
  cohort_name = "primary_cohort",
  project     = current_project
)
if (!is.null(sensitivity_model_alt_rass_imp)) {
  fwrite(extract_lm_results(sensitivity_model_alt_rass_imp),
         file.path(sedation_sensitivity, paste0(institution, "_sensitivity_analysis_rass_imputation.csv")))
}

sensitivity_model_72h_obs <- fit_model_safe(
  outcome     = "percent_deep_sedation_72",
  exposure    = "lang_cat_6",
  covariates  = standard_covariates,
  data        = primary_cohort,
  model_name  = "sensitivity_model_72hr_obs",
  cohort_name = "primary_cohort",
  project     = current_project
)
if (!is.null(sensitivity_model_72h_obs)) {
  fwrite(extract_lm_results(sensitivity_model_72h_obs),
         file.path(sedation_sensitivity, paste0(institution, "_sensitivity_analysis_72hr_obs.csv")))
}

sensitivity_model_ethnicity_inclusion <- fit_model_safe(
  outcome     = "percent_deep_sedation_48",
  exposure    = "lang_cat_6",
  covariates  = c(standard_covariates, "ethnicity_category"),
  data        = primary_cohort,
  model_name  = "sensitivity_model_ethnicity_inclusion",
  cohort_name = "primary_cohort",
  project     = current_project
)
if (!is.null(sensitivity_model_ethnicity_inclusion)) {
  fwrite(extract_lm_results(sensitivity_model_ethnicity_inclusion),
         file.path(sedation_sensitivity, paste0(institution, "_sensitivity_analysis_ethnicity_inclusion.csv")))
}

sensitivity_model_paralytic_inclusion <- fit_model_safe(
  outcome     = "percent_deep_sedation_48",
  exposure    = "lang_cat_6",
  covariates  = c(standard_covariates, "continuous_nmba_48"),
  data        = primary_cohort,
  model_name  = "sensitivity_model_paralytic_inclusion",
  cohort_name = "primary_cohort",
  project     = current_project
)
if (!is.null(sensitivity_model_paralytic_inclusion)) {
  fwrite(extract_lm_results(sensitivity_model_paralytic_inclusion),
         file.path(sedation_sensitivity, paste0(institution, "_sensitivity_analysis_paralytic_inclusion.csv")))
}

# Race x Language Interaction
primary_model_race_language_interaction <- fit_model_safe(
  outcome     = "percent_deep_sedation_48",
  exposure    = "lang_cat_6 * race_category",
  covariates  = c(setdiff(standard_covariates, "race_category"), "ethnicity_category"),
  data        = primary_cohort,
  model_name  = "primary_model_race_language_interaction",
  cohort_name = "primary_cohort",
  project     = current_project
)
if (!is.null(primary_model_race_language_interaction)) {
  fwrite(extract_lm_results(primary_model_race_language_interaction),
         file.path(sedation_final_data, paste0(institution, "_primary_model_race_language_interaction.csv")))
}

# Ethnicity x Language Interaction
primary_model_ethnicity_language_interaction <- fit_model_safe(
  outcome     = "percent_deep_sedation_48",
  exposure    = "lang_cat_6 * ethnicity_category",
  covariates  = standard_covariates,
  data        = primary_cohort,
  model_name  = "primary_model_ethnicity_language_interaction",
  cohort_name = "primary_cohort",
  project     = current_project
)
if (!is.null(primary_model_ethnicity_language_interaction)) {
  fwrite(extract_lm_results(primary_model_ethnicity_language_interaction),
         file.path(sedation_final_data, paste0(institution, "_primary_model_ethnicity_language_interaction.csv")))
}

################################################################################
# Exploratory Analyses - Medications
################################################################################
exploratory_model_benzo_odds <- fit_model_safe(
  outcome     = "cont_benzos_receipt",
```
