```{r}
  exposure    = "lang_cat_6",
  covariates  = exploratory_binary_covariates,
  data        = primary_cohort,
  model_name  = "exploratory_model_benzo_odds",
  cohort_name = "primary_cohort",
  family      = binomial(link = "logit"),
  project     = current_project
)
if (!is.null(exploratory_model_benzo_odds)) {
  fwrite(extract_glm_results(exploratory_model_benzo_odds),
         file.path(sedation_exploratory, paste0(institution, "_exploratory_analysis_benzo_odds.csv")))
}

exploratory_model_total_benzos_received <- fit_model_safe(
  outcome     = "lorazepam_equiv_total_48",
  exposure    = "lang_cat_6",
  covariates  = standard_covariates,
  data        = primary_cohort,
  model_name  = "exploratory_model_total_benzos_received",
  cohort_name = "primary_cohort",
  project     = current_project
)
if (!is.null(exploratory_model_total_benzos_received)) {
  fwrite(extract_lm_results(exploratory_model_total_benzos_received),
         file.path(sedation_exploratory, paste0(institution, "_exploratory_analysis_total_benzos_48.csv")))
}

exploratory_model_propofol <- fit_model_safe(
  outcome     = "propofol_avg_mcgkgmin_48",
  exposure    = "lang_cat_6",
  covariates  = standard_covariates,
  data        = primary_cohort,
  model_name  = "exploratory_model_propofol",
  cohort_name = "primary_cohort",
  project     = current_project
)
if (!is.null(exploratory_model_propofol)) {
  fwrite(extract_lm_results(exploratory_model_propofol),
         file.path(sedation_exploratory, paste0(institution, "_exploratory_analysis_propofol.csv")))
}

exploratory_model_precedex <- fit_model_safe(
  outcome     = "dexmedetomidine_avg_mcgkghr_48",
  exposure    = "lang_cat_6",
  covariates  = standard_covariates,
  data        = primary_cohort,
  model_name  = "exploratory_model_precedex",
  cohort_name = "primary_cohort",
  project     = current_project
)
if (!is.null(exploratory_model_precedex)) {
  fwrite(extract_lm_results(exploratory_model_precedex),
         file.path(sedation_exploratory, paste0(institution, "_exploratory_analysis_precedex.csv")))
}

exploratory_model_opioid_only_analgesia <- fit_model_safe(
  outcome     = "cont_analgesia_only",
  exposure    = "lang_cat_6",
  covariates  = exploratory_binary_covariates,
  data        = primary_cohort,
  model_name  = "exploratory_model_opioid_only_analgesia",
  cohort_name = "primary_cohort",
  family      = binomial(link = "logit"),
  project     = current_project
)
if (!is.null(exploratory_model_opioid_only_analgesia)) {
  fwrite(extract_glm_results(exploratory_model_opioid_only_analgesia),
         file.path(sedation_exploratory, paste0(institution, "_exploratory_analysis_opioid_only.csv")))
}

exploratory_model_mme <- fit_model_safe(
  outcome     = "total_mme",
  exposure    = "lang_cat_6",
  covariates  = standard_covariates,
  data        = primary_cohort,
  model_name  = "exploratory_model_mme",
  cohort_name = "primary_cohort",
  project     = current_project
)
if (!is.null(exploratory_model_mme)) {
  fwrite(extract_lm_results(exploratory_model_mme),
         file.path(sedation_exploratory, paste0(institution, "_exploratory_analysis_mme_total.csv")))
}
```

# Step 6: Sensitivity and Sub-Group Analyses That Require Filtering Primary Cohort
```{r}
# Helper for the cohort-filtering subgroup pattern. Each subgroup needs:
#   1. Filter the primary cohort
#   2. Re-level factors (subset can change which levels are present)
#   3. Build descriptive + comparison table1s
#   4. Fit the standard sedation model
#   5. Write model output if it succeeded
relevel_subgroup <- function(dt) {
  if (is.null(dt) || nrow(dt) == 0) return(dt)
  dt$lang_cat_6   <- relevel(as.factor(dt$lang_cat_6),   ref = "english")
  dt$sex_category <- relevel(as.factor(dt$sex_category), ref = "male")
  dt$race_category <- relevel(as.factor(dt$race_category), ref = "white")
  dt$ethnicity_category <- relevel(as.factor(dt$ethnicity_category), ref = "non-hispanic")
  dt$ethnicity_category_final <- relevel(as.factor(dt$ethnicity_category_final), ref = "non-hispanic/unknown")
  dt
}

################################################################################
# Hispanic Sub-Group Analysis
################################################################################
hispanic_cohort <- relevel_subgroup(primary_cohort[ethnicity_category == "hispanic"])

make_table1_pair(
  dt = hispanic_cohort, by = "lang_cat_6", reference_level = "english",
  cat_vars = cat_vars, cont_vars = cont_vars, site_name = institution,
  tables_dir = sedation_tables_dir, institution_prefix = institution,
  cohort_name = "hispanic_cohort", file_stem = "hispanic_cohort",
  project     = current_project
)

subgroup_model_hispanic <- fit_model_safe(
  outcome     = "percent_deep_sedation_48",
  exposure    = "lang_cat_6",
  covariates  = standard_covariates,
  data        = hispanic_cohort,
  model_name  = "subgroup_model_hispanic",
  cohort_name = "hispanic_cohort",
  project     = current_project
)
if (!is.null(subgroup_model_hispanic)) {
  fwrite(extract_lm_results(subgroup_model_hispanic),
         file.path(sedation_subgroup, paste0(institution, "_subgroup_analysis_hispanic.csv")))
}

################################################################################
# Non-Hispanic Sub-Group Analysis
################################################################################
non_hispanic_cohort <- relevel_subgroup(primary_cohort[ethnicity_category == "non-hispanic"])

make_table1_pair(
  dt = non_hispanic_cohort, by = "lang_cat_6", reference_level = "english",
  cat_vars = cat_vars, cont_vars = cont_vars, site_name = institution,
  tables_dir = sedation_tables_dir, institution_prefix = institution,
  cohort_name = "non_hispanic_cohort", file_stem = "non_hispanic_cohort",
  project     = current_project
)

subgroup_model_non_hispanic <- fit_model_safe(
  outcome     = "percent_deep_sedation_48",
  exposure    = "lang_cat_6",
  covariates  = standard_covariates,
  data        = non_hispanic_cohort,
  model_name  = "subgroup_model_non_hispanic",
  cohort_name = "non_hispanic_cohort",
  project     = current_project
)
if (!is.null(subgroup_model_non_hispanic)) {
  fwrite(extract_lm_results(subgroup_model_non_hispanic),
         file.path(sedation_subgroup, paste0(institution, "_subgroup_analysis_non_hispanic.csv")))
}

################################################################################
# MICU Sub-Group Analysis
# Note: fit_model_safe handles dropping zero-variance hospital_icu_id /
# observation_year automatically, so the special-case dynamic formula from the
# old script is no longer needed.
################################################################################
micu_cohort <- relevel_subgroup(primary_cohort[icu_imv == "medical_icu"])

make_table1_pair(
  dt = micu_cohort, by = "lang_cat_6", reference_level = "english",
  cat_vars = cat_vars, cont_vars = cont_vars, site_name = institution,
  tables_dir = sedation_tables_dir, institution_prefix = institution,
  cohort_name = "micu_cohort", file_stem = "micu_cohort",
  project     = current_project
)

subgroup_model_micu_cohort <- fit_model_safe(
  outcome     = "percent_deep_sedation_48",
  exposure    = "lang_cat_6",
  covariates  = standard_covariates,
  data        = micu_cohort,
  model_name  = "subgroup_model_micu_cohort",
  cohort_name = "micu_cohort",
  project     = current_project
)
if (!is.null(subgroup_model_micu_cohort)) {
  fwrite(extract_lm_results(subgroup_model_micu_cohort),
         file.path(sedation_subgroup, paste0(institution, "_subgroup_analysis_micu.csv")))
}

################################################################################
# ARF Subgroup
################################################################################
arf_cohort <- relevel_subgroup(primary_cohort[arf_flag == TRUE])

make_table1_pair(
  dt = arf_cohort, by = "lang_cat_6", reference_level = "english",
  cat_vars = cat_vars, cont_vars = cont_vars, site_name = institution,
  tables_dir = sedation_tables_dir, institution_prefix = institution,
  cohort_name = "arf_cohort", file_stem = "arf_cohort",
  project     = current_project
)

subgroup_model_arf_cohort <- fit_model_safe(
  outcome     = "percent_deep_sedation_48",
  exposure    = "lang_cat_6",
  covariates  = standard_covariates,
  data        = arf_cohort,
  model_name  = "subgroup_model_arf_cohort",
  cohort_name = "arf_cohort",
  project     = current_project
)
if (!is.null(subgroup_model_arf_cohort)) {
  fwrite(extract_lm_results(subgroup_model_arf_cohort),
         file.path(sedation_subgroup, paste0(institution, "_subgroup_analysis_arf.csv")))
}

################################################################################
# aHRF Subgroup
################################################################################
aHrf_cohort <- relevel_subgroup(primary_cohort[aHrf_flag == TRUE])

make_table1_pair(
  dt = aHrf_cohort, by = "lang_cat_6", reference_level = "english",
  cat_vars = cat_vars, cont_vars = cont_vars, site_name = institution,
  tables_dir = sedation_tables_dir, institution_prefix = institution,
  cohort_name = "aHrf_cohort", file_stem = "aHrf_cohort",
  project     = current_project
)

subgroup_model_aHrf_cohort <- fit_model_safe(
  outcome     = "percent_deep_sedation_48",
  exposure    = "lang_cat_6",
  covariates  = standard_covariates,
  data        = aHrf_cohort,
  model_name  = "subgroup_model_aHrf_cohort",
  cohort_name = "aHrf_cohort",
  project     = current_project
)
if (!is.null(subgroup_model_aHrf_cohort)) {
  fwrite(extract_lm_results(subgroup_model_aHrf_cohort),
         file.path(sedation_subgroup, paste0(institution, "_subgroup_analysis_aHrf.csv")))
}

################################################################################
# Non-ARF Subgroup
################################################################################
non_arf_cohort <- relevel_subgroup(primary_cohort[arf_flag == FALSE])

make_table1_pair(
  dt = non_arf_cohort, by = "lang_cat_6", reference_level = "english",
  cat_vars = cat_vars, cont_vars = cont_vars, site_name = institution,
  tables_dir = sedation_tables_dir, institution_prefix = institution,
  cohort_name = "non_arf_cohort", file_stem = "non_arf_cohort",
  project     = current_project
)

subgroup_model_non_arf_cohort <- fit_model_safe(
  outcome     = "percent_deep_sedation_48",
  exposure    = "lang_cat_6",
  covariates  = standard_covariates,
  data        = non_arf_cohort,
  model_name  = "subgroup_model_non_arf_cohort",
  cohort_name = "non_arf_cohort",
  project     = current_project
)
if (!is.null(subgroup_model_non_arf_cohort)) {
  fwrite(extract_lm_results(subgroup_model_non_arf_cohort),
         file.path(sedation_subgroup, paste0(institution, "_subgroup_analysis_non_arf.csv")))
}

################################################################################
# Pre-Pandemic Subgroup
################################################################################
pre_pandemic_cohort <- relevel_subgroup(
  primary_cohort[admission_dttm < as.POSIXct("2020-03-01 00:00:00")]
)

make_table1_pair(
  dt = pre_pandemic_cohort, by = "lang_cat_6", reference_level = "english",
  cat_vars = cat_vars, cont_vars = cont_vars, site_name = institution,
  tables_dir = sedation_tables_dir, institution_prefix = institution,
  cohort_name = "pre_pandemic_cohort", file_stem = "pre_pandemic_cohort",
  project     = current_project
)

subgroup_model_pre_pandemic_cohort <- fit_model_safe(
  outcome     = "percent_deep_sedation_48",
  exposure    = "lang_cat_6",
  covariates  = standard_covariates,
  data        = pre_pandemic_cohort,
  model_name  = "subgroup_model_pre_pandemic_cohort",
  cohort_name = "pre_pandemic_cohort",
  project     = current_project
)
if (!is.null(subgroup_model_pre_pandemic_cohort)) {
  fwrite(extract_lm_results(subgroup_model_pre_pandemic_cohort),
         file.path(sedation_subgroup, paste0(institution, "_subgroup_analysis_pre_pandemic.csv")))
}

################################################################################
# Pandemic Subgroup
################################################################################
pandemic_cohort <- relevel_subgroup(
  primary_cohort[admission_dttm >= as.POSIXct("2020-03-01 00:00:00") &
                 admission_dttm <= as.POSIXct("2021-12-31 23:59:59")]
)

make_table1_pair(
  dt = pandemic_cohort, by = "lang_cat_6", reference_level = "english",
  cat_vars = cat_vars, cont_vars = cont_vars, site_name = institution,
  tables_dir = sedation_tables_dir, institution_prefix = institution,
  cohort_name = "pandemic_cohort", file_stem = "pandemic_cohort",
  project     = current_project
)

subgroup_model_pandemic_cohort <- fit_model_safe(
  outcome     = "percent_deep_sedation_48",
  exposure    = "lang_cat_6",
  covariates  = standard_covariates,
  data        = pandemic_cohort,
  model_name  = "subgroup_model_pandemic_cohort",
  cohort_name = "pandemic_cohort",
  project     = current_project
)
if (!is.null(subgroup_model_pandemic_cohort)) {
  fwrite(extract_lm_results(subgroup_model_pandemic_cohort),
         file.path(sedation_subgroup, paste0(institution, "_subgroup_analysis_pandemic.csv")))
}

################################################################################
# Endemic Subgroup
################################################################################
endemic_cohort <- relevel_subgroup(
  primary_cohort[admission_dttm > as.POSIXct("2021-12-31 23:59:59")]
)

make_table1_pair(
  dt = endemic_cohort, by = "lang_cat_6", reference_level = "english",
  cat_vars = cat_vars, cont_vars = cont_vars, site_name = institution,
  tables_dir = sedation_tables_dir, institution_prefix = institution,
  cohort_name = "endemic_cohort", file_stem = "endemic_cohort",
  project     = current_project
)

subgroup_model_endemic_cohort <- fit_model_safe(
  outcome     = "percent_deep_sedation_48",
  exposure    = "lang_cat_6",
  covariates  = standard_covariates,
  data        = endemic_cohort,
  model_name  = "subgroup_model_endemic_cohort",
  cohort_name = "endemic_cohort",
  project     = current_project
)
if (!is.null(subgroup_model_endemic_cohort)) {
  fwrite(extract_lm_results(subgroup_model_endemic_cohort),
         file.path(sedation_subgroup, paste0(institution, "_subgroup_analysis_endemic.csv")))
}

################################################################################
# RASS within 2 hours
################################################################################
rass_2hrs_cohort <- relevel_subgroup(primary_cohort[time_to_first_rass <= 2])

make_table1_pair(
  dt = rass_2hrs_cohort, by = "lang_cat_6", reference_level = "english",
  cat_vars = cat_vars, cont_vars = cont_vars, site_name = institution,
  tables_dir = sedation_tables_dir, institution_prefix = institution,
  cohort_name = "rass_2hrs_cohort", file_stem = "rass_2hrs_cohort",
  project     = current_project
)

sensitivity_model_rass_2hrs_cohort <- fit_model_safe(
  outcome     = "percent_deep_sedation_48",
  exposure    = "lang_cat_6",
  covariates  = standard_covariates,
  data        = rass_2hrs_cohort,
  model_name  = "sensitivity_model_rass_2hrs_cohort",
  cohort_name = "rass_2hrs_cohort",
  project     = current_project
)
if (!is.null(sensitivity_model_rass_2hrs_cohort)) {
  fwrite(extract_lm_results(sensitivity_model_rass_2hrs_cohort),
         file.path(sedation_sensitivity, paste0(institution, "_sensitivity_analysis_rass_2hrs.csv")))
}

################################################################################
# No Neuro ICU
################################################################################
no_neuro_cohort <- relevel_subgroup(
  primary_cohort[
    !icu_imv %in% c("neuro_icu", "neurosurgical_icu", "mixed_neuro_icu") &
      hospital_icu_id != "UMMC_general_icu"
  ]
)

make_table1_pair(
  dt = no_neuro_cohort, by = "lang_cat_6", reference_level = "english",
  cat_vars = cat_vars, cont_vars = cont_vars, site_name = institution,
  tables_dir = sedation_tables_dir, institution_prefix = institution,
  cohort_name = "no_neuro_cohort", file_stem = "no_neuro_cohort",
  project     = current_project
)

sensitivity_model_no_neuro_cohort <- fit_model_safe(
  outcome     = "percent_deep_sedation_48",
  exposure    = "lang_cat_6",
  covariates  = standard_covariates,
  data        = no_neuro_cohort,
  model_name  = "sensitivity_model_no_neuro_cohort",
  cohort_name = "no_neuro_cohort",
  project     = current_project
)
if (!is.null(sensitivity_model_no_neuro_cohort)) {
  fwrite(extract_lm_results(sensitivity_model_no_neuro_cohort),
         file.path(sedation_sensitivity, paste0(institution, "_sensitivity_analysis_no_neuro.csv")))
}

################################################################################
# No Continuous or Push Paralytics
################################################################################
no_nmba_cohort <- relevel_subgroup(
  primary_cohort[continuous_nmba_48 == 0][push_paralytics == 0]
)

make_table1_pair(
  dt = no_nmba_cohort, by = "lang_cat_6", reference_level = "english",
  cat_vars = cat_vars, cont_vars = cont_vars, site_name = institution,
  tables_dir = sedation_tables_dir, institution_prefix = institution,
  cohort_name = "no_nmba_cohort", file_stem = "no_nmba_cohort",
  project     = current_project
)

sensitivity_model_no_nmba_cohort <- fit_model_safe(
  outcome     = "percent_deep_sedation_48",
  exposure    = "lang_cat_6",
  covariates  = standard_covariates,
  data        = no_nmba_cohort,
  model_name  = "sensitivity_model_no_nmba_cohort",
  cohort_name = "no_nmba_cohort",
  project     = current_project
)
if (!is.null(sensitivity_model_no_nmba_cohort)) {
  fwrite(extract_lm_results(sensitivity_model_no_nmba_cohort),
         file.path(sedation_sensitivity, paste0(institution, "_sensitivity_analysis_no_nmba.csv")))
}

################################################################################
# No Continuous Paralytics
################################################################################
no_cont_nmba_cohort <- relevel_subgroup(primary_cohort[continuous_nmba_48 == 0])

make_table1_pair(
  dt = no_cont_nmba_cohort, by = "lang_cat_6", reference_level = "english",
  cat_vars = cat_vars, cont_vars = cont_vars, site_name = institution,
  tables_dir = sedation_tables_dir, institution_prefix = institution,
  cohort_name = "no_cont_nmba_cohort", file_stem = "no_cont_nmba_cohort",
  project     = current_project
)

sensitivity_model_no_cont_nmba_cohort <- fit_model_safe(
  outcome     = "percent_deep_sedation_48",
  exposure    = "lang_cat_6",
  covariates  = standard_covariates,
  data        = no_cont_nmba_cohort,
  model_name  = "sensitivity_model_no_cont_nmba_cohort",
  cohort_name = "no_cont_nmba_cohort",
  project     = current_project
)
if (!is.null(sensitivity_model_no_cont_nmba_cohort)) {
  fwrite(extract_lm_results(sensitivity_model_no_cont_nmba_cohort),
         file.path(sedation_sensitivity, paste0(institution, "_sensitivity_analysis_no_cont_nmba.csv")))
}

################################################################################
# Only Continuous Paralytics
################################################################################
only_cont_nmba_cohort <- relevel_subgroup(primary_cohort[continuous_nmba_48 == 1])

make_table1_pair(
  dt = only_cont_nmba_cohort, by = "lang_cat_6", reference_level = "english",
  cat_vars = cat_vars, cont_vars = cont_vars, site_name = institution,
  tables_dir = sedation_tables_dir, institution_prefix = institution,
  cohort_name = "only_cont_nmba_cohort", file_stem = "only_cont_nmba_cohort",
  project     = current_project
)

sensitivity_model_only_cont_nmba_cohort <- fit_model_safe(
  outcome     = "percent_deep_sedation_48",
  exposure    = "lang_cat_6",
  covariates  = standard_covariates,
  data        = only_cont_nmba_cohort,
  model_name  = "sensitivity_model_only_cont_nmba_cohort",
  cohort_name = "only_cont_nmba_cohort",
  project     = current_project
)
if (!is.null(sensitivity_model_only_cont_nmba_cohort)) {
  fwrite(extract_lm_results(sensitivity_model_only_cont_nmba_cohort),
         file.path(sedation_sensitivity, paste0(institution, "_sensitivity_analysis_only_cont_nmba.csv")))
}

################################################################################
# Ethnicity Reclassification
################################################################################
ethnicity_reclass_cohort <- copy(primary_cohort)
ethnicity_reclass_cohort[ethnicity_category == "unknown"      & language_category == "spanish", ethnicity_category := "hispanic"]
ethnicity_reclass_cohort[ethnicity_category == "unknown"      & language_category == "english", ethnicity_category := "non-hispanic"]
ethnicity_reclass_cohort[ethnicity_category == "non-hispanic" & language_category == "spanish", ethnicity_category := "hispanic"]
ethnicity_reclass_cohort <- relevel_subgroup(ethnicity_reclass_cohort)
ethnicity_reclass_cohort$ethnicity_category <- relevel(as.factor(ethnicity_reclass_cohort$ethnicity_category), ref = "non-hispanic")

make_table1_pair(
  dt = ethnicity_reclass_cohort, by = "lang_cat_6", reference_level = "english",
  cat_vars = cat_vars, cont_vars = cont_vars, site_name = institution,
  tables_dir = sedation_tables_dir, institution_prefix = institution,
  cohort_name = "ethnicity_reclass_cohort", file_stem = "ethnicity_reclass_cohort",
  project     = current_project
)

sensitivity_model_ethnicity_reclass_cohort <- fit_model_safe(
  outcome     = "percent_deep_sedation_48",
  exposure    = "lang_cat_6",
  covariates  = c(standard_covariates, "ethnicity_category"),
  data        = ethnicity_reclass_cohort,
  model_name  = "sensitivity_model_ethnicity_reclass_cohort",
  cohort_name = "ethnicity_reclass_cohort",
  project     = current_project
)
if (!is.null(sensitivity_model_ethnicity_reclass_cohort)) {
  fwrite(extract_lm_results(sensitivity_model_ethnicity_reclass_cohort),
         file.path(sedation_sensitivity, paste0(institution, "_sensitivity_analysis_ethnicity_reclass.csv")))
}

################################################################################
# Remove Unknown Ethnicity
################################################################################
no_unknown_ethnicity_cohort <- relevel_subgroup(primary_cohort[ethnicity_category != "unknown"])
no_unknown_ethnicity_cohort$ethnicity_category <- relevel(as.factor(no_unknown_ethnicity_cohort$ethnicity_category), ref = "non-hispanic")

make_table1_pair(
  dt = no_unknown_ethnicity_cohort, by = "lang_cat_6", reference_level = "english",
  cat_vars = cat_vars, cont_vars = cont_vars, site_name = institution,
  tables_dir = sedation_tables_dir, institution_prefix = institution,
  cohort_name = "no_unknown_ethnicity_cohort", file_stem = "no_unknown_ethnicity_cohort",
  project     = current_project
)

sensitivity_model_no_unknown_ethnicity_cohort <- fit_model_safe(
  outcome     = "percent_deep_sedation_48",
  exposure    = "lang_cat_6",
  covariates  = c(standard_covariates, "ethnicity_category"),
  data        = no_unknown_ethnicity_cohort,
  model_name  = "sensitivity_model_no_unknown_ethnicity_cohort",
  cohort_name = "no_unknown_ethnicity_cohort",
  project     = current_project
)
if (!is.null(sensitivity_model_no_unknown_ethnicity_cohort)) {
  fwrite(extract_lm_results(sensitivity_model_no_unknown_ethnicity_cohort),
         file.path(sedation_sensitivity, paste0(institution, "_sensitivity_analysis_no_unknown_ethnicity.csv")))
}

################################################################################
# Special Sensitivity Analysis for RUSH
################################################################################
no_bilingual_cohort <- relevel_subgroup(primary_cohort[!language_name %in% c("Bilingual/Spanish", "bilingual/spanish")])

make_table1_pair(
  dt = no_bilingual_cohort, by = "lang_cat_6", reference_level = "english",
  cat_vars = cat_vars, cont_vars = cont_vars, site_name = institution,
  tables_dir = sedation_tables_dir, institution_prefix = institution,
  cohort_name = "no_bilingual_cohort", file_stem = "no_bilingual_cohort",
  project     = current_project
)

sensitivity_model_no_bilingual_cohort <- fit_model_safe(
  outcome     = "percent_deep_sedation_48",
  exposure    = "lang_cat_6",
  covariates  = c(standard_covariates),
  data        = no_bilingual_cohort,
  model_name  = "sensitivity_model_no_bilingual_cohort",
  cohort_name = "no_bilingual_cohort",
  project     = current_project
)
if (!is.null(sensitivity_model_no_bilingual_cohort)) {
  fwrite(extract_lm_results(sensitivity_model_no_bilingual_cohort),
         file.path(sedation_sensitivity, paste0(institution, "_sensitivity_analysis_no_bilingual.csv")))
}


################################################################################
# Full 48 Hours - IPW Weighted with Sandwich SEs
# This one stays mostly custom because the SE extraction differs (sandwich-based
# coeftest output instead of an lm summary).
# Also fixes an inherited bug: the comparisons fwrite was writing the wrong
# object to the full_48hr file.
################################################################################
full_48hr_cohort <- primary_cohort[hours_mechanically_ventilated_72 >= 48]
full_48hr_cohort <- full_48hr_cohort[is.finite(ipw) & !is.na(ipw)]
ipw_q <- quantile(full_48hr_cohort$ipw, c(0.01, 0.99), na.rm = TRUE)
full_48hr_cohort[, ipw := pmin(pmax(ipw, ipw_q[1]), ipw_q[2])]
full_48hr_cohort <- relevel_subgroup(full_48hr_cohort)

make_table1_pair(
  dt = full_48hr_cohort, by = "lang_cat_6", reference_level = "english",
  cat_vars = cat_vars, cont_vars = cont_vars, site_name = institution,
  tables_dir = sedation_tables_dir, institution_prefix = institution,
  cohort_name = "full_48hr_cohort", file_stem = "full_48hr_cohort",
  project     = current_project
)

sensitivity_model_full_48 <- fit_model_safe(
  outcome     = "percent_deep_sedation_48",
  exposure    = "lang_cat_6",
  covariates  = standard_covariates,
  data        = full_48hr_cohort,
  weights     = full_48hr_cohort$ipw,
  model_name  = "sensitivity_model_full_48",
  cohort_name = "full_48hr_cohort",
  project     = current_project
)

if (!is.null(sensitivity_model_full_48)) {
  tryCatch({
    robust_se <- tryCatch(
      vcovHC(sensitivity_model_full_48, type = "HC3"),
      error = function(e) NULL
    )
    if (is.null(robust_se) || anyNA(robust_se)) {
      warning("HC3 robust SE failed at this site; falling back to HC0.")
      robust_se <- vcovHC(sensitivity_model_full_48, type = "HC0")
    }
    
    sensitivity_model_full_48_sandwich <- coeftest(sensitivity_model_full_48, vcov = robust_se)
    
    sensitivity_model_full_48_results <- data.frame(
      term      = rownames(sensitivity_model_full_48_sandwich),
      estimate  = sensitivity_model_full_48_sandwich[, "Estimate"],
      std.error = sensitivity_model_full_48_sandwich[, "Std. Error"],
      variance  = sensitivity_model_full_48_sandwich[, "Std. Error"]^2,
      p.value   = sensitivity_model_full_48_sandwich[, "Pr(>|t|)"]
    )
    fwrite(sensitivity_model_full_48_results,
           file.path(sedation_sensitivity, paste0(institution, "_sensitivity_analysis_full_48hr.csv")))
  }, error = function(e) {
    message("Skipping sensitivity_model_full_48 sandwich SE step: ", conditionMessage(e))
  })
}
```

# Step 7: Cohort Cleaning Summary from Analysis
```{r}
# Step 0: initial count
n_start <- nrow(total_cohort)

# Step 1: Removed for speaking languages other than English or Spanish
n_after_step1 <- nrow(primary_cohort_all_icus)
n_removed_step1 <- n_start - n_after_step1

# Step 2: Removed for being admitted to ICUs without Spanish speakers
n_after_step2 <- nrow(primary_cohort)
n_removed_step2 <- n_after_step1 - n_after_step2

# Tabulation of exclusions
filter_tab_sedation_project <- data.table(
  step = c(
    "Total IMV Patients",
    "Removed for language other than English or Spanish",
    "Removed for admission to ICU without Spanish speakers",
    "Final"
  ),
  n_remaining = c(
    n_start,
    n_after_step1,
    n_after_step2,
    n_after_step2
  ),
  n_removed_this_step = c(
    0,
    n_removed_step1,
    n_removed_step2,
    0
  )
)

filter_tab_sedation_project

fwrite(filter_tab_sedation_project, 
       file.path(cohort_characteristics, paste0(institution, "_01_analysis_cleaning_summary.csv")))
```

#PARALYTIC PROJECT
# Step 1: All IMV patients
```{r}
current_project <- "paralytic"
################################################################################
# Lang Cat 1 - All IMV patients
################################################################################
make_table1_pair(
  dt = total_cohort, by = "lang_cat_1", reference_level = "english",
  cat_vars = cat_vars, cont_vars = cont_vars, site_name = institution,
  tables_dir = paralytics_tables_dir, institution_prefix = institution,
  cohort_name = "total_cohort", file_stem = "total_cohort_lang_cat_1",
  project = current_project
)

lang_cat_1_nmbas <- fit_model_safe(
  outcome     = "continuous_nmba_48",
  exposure    = "lang_cat_1",
  covariates  = paralytic_covariates,
  data        = total_cohort,
  model_name  = "lang_cat_1_nmbas",
  cohort_name = "total_cohort",
  project     = current_project,
  family      = binomial(link = "logit")
)
if (!is.null(lang_cat_1_nmbas)) {
  fwrite(extract_glm_results(lang_cat_1_nmbas),
         file.path(paralytics_final_data, paste0(institution, "_paralysis_lang_cat_1.csv")))
}

################################################################################
# Lang Cat 2 - All IMV Patients
################################################################################
make_table1_pair(
  dt = total_cohort, by = "lang_cat_2", reference_level = "english",
  cat_vars = cat_vars, cont_vars = cont_vars, site_name = institution,
  tables_dir = paralytics_tables_dir, institution_prefix = institution,
  cohort_name = "total_cohort", file_stem = "total_cohort_lang_cat_2",
  project = current_project
)

lang_cat_2_nmbas <- fit_model_safe(
  outcome     = "continuous_nmba_48",
  exposure    = "lang_cat_2",
  covariates  = paralytic_covariates,
  data        = total_cohort,
  model_name  = "lang_cat_2_nmbas",
  cohort_name = "total_cohort",
  project     = current_project,
  family      = binomial(link = "logit")
)
if (!is.null(lang_cat_2_nmbas)) {
  fwrite(extract_glm_results(lang_cat_2_nmbas),
         file.path(paralytics_final_data, paste0(institution, "_paralysis_lang_cat_2.csv")))
}

################################################################################
# Lang Cat 3 - All IMV patients
################################################################################
make_table1_pair(
  dt = lang_cat_3_cohort, by = "lang_cat_3", reference_level = "english",
  cat_vars = cat_vars, cont_vars = cont_vars, site_name = institution,
  tables_dir = paralytics_tables_dir, institution_prefix = institution,
  cohort_name = "lang_cat_3_cohort", file_stem = "total_cohort_lang_cat_3",
  project = current_project
)

lang_cat_3_nmbas <- fit_model_safe(
  outcome     = "continuous_nmba_48",
  exposure    = "lang_cat_3",
  covariates  = paralytic_covariates,
  data        = lang_cat_3_cohort,
  model_name  = "lang_cat_3_nmbas",
  cohort_name = "lang_cat_3_cohort",
  project     = current_project,
  family      = binomial(link = "logit")
)
if (!is.null(lang_cat_3_nmbas)) {
  fwrite(extract_glm_results(lang_cat_3_nmbas),
         file.path(paralytics_final_data, paste0(institution, "_paralysis_lang_cat_3.csv")))
}

################################################################################
# Lang Cat 4 - All IMV Patients
################################################################################
make_table1_pair(
  dt = lang_cat_4_cohort, by = "lang_cat_4", reference_level = "english",
  cat_vars = cat_vars, cont_vars = cont_vars, site_name = institution,
  tables_dir = paralytics_tables_dir, institution_prefix = institution,
  cohort_name = "lang_cat_4_cohort", file_stem = "total_cohort_lang_cat_4",
  project = current_project
)

lang_cat_4_nmbas <- fit_model_safe(
  outcome     = "continuous_nmba_48",
  exposure    = "lang_cat_4",
  covariates  = paralytic_covariates,
  data        = lang_cat_4_cohort,
  model_name  = "lang_cat_4_nmbas",
  cohort_name = "lang_cat_4_cohort",
  project     = current_project,
  family      = binomial(link = "logit")
)
if (!is.null(lang_cat_4_nmbas)) {
  fwrite(extract_glm_results(lang_cat_4_nmbas),
         file.path(paralytics_final_data, paste0(institution, "_paralysis_lang_cat_4.csv")))
}

################################################################################
# Lang Cat 5 - All IMV Patients
################################################################################
make_table1_pair(
  dt = lang_cat_5_cohort, by = "lang_cat_5", reference_level = "english",
  cat_vars = cat_vars, cont_vars = cont_vars, site_name = institution,
  tables_dir = paralytics_tables_dir, institution_prefix = institution,
  cohort_name = "lang_cat_5_cohort", file_stem = "total_cohort_lang_cat_5",
  project = current_project
)

lang_cat_5_nmbas <- fit_model_safe(
  outcome     = "continuous_nmba_48",
  exposure    = "lang_cat_5",
  covariates  = paralytic_covariates,
  data        = lang_cat_5_cohort,
  model_name  = "lang_cat_5_nmbas",
  cohort_name = "lang_cat_5_cohort",
  project     = current_project,
  family      = binomial(link = "logit")
)
if (!is.null(lang_cat_5_nmbas)) {
  fwrite(extract_glm_results(lang_cat_5_nmbas),
         file.path(paralytics_final_data, paste0(institution, "_paralysis_lang_cat_5.csv")))
}

################################################################################
# Lang Cat 6 - All IMV Patients
################################################################################
make_table1_pair(
  dt = primary_cohort_all_icus, by = "lang_cat_6", reference_level = "english",
  cat_vars = cat_vars, cont_vars = cont_vars, site_name = institution,
  tables_dir = paralytics_tables_dir, institution_prefix = institution,
  cohort_name = "primary_cohort_all_icus", file_stem = "total_cohort_lang_cat_6",
  project = current_project
)

lang_cat_6_nmbas <- fit_model_safe(
  outcome     = "continuous_nmba_48",
  exposure    = "lang_cat_6",
  covariates  = paralytic_covariates,
  data        = primary_cohort_all_icus,
  model_name  = "lang_cat_6_nmbas",
  cohort_name = "primary_cohort_all_icus",
  project     = current_project,
  family      = binomial(link = "logit")
)
if (!is.null(lang_cat_6_nmbas)) {
  fwrite(extract_glm_results(lang_cat_6_nmbas),
         file.path(paralytics_final_data, paste0(institution, "_paralysis_lang_cat_6.csv")))
}

################################################################################
# Lang Cat 7 - All IMV Patients
################################################################################
make_table1_pair(
  dt = total_cohort, by = "lang_cat_7", reference_level = "english",
  cat_vars = cat_vars, cont_vars = cont_vars, site_name = institution,
  tables_dir = paralytics_tables_dir, institution_prefix = institution,
  cohort_name = "total_cohort", file_stem = "total_cohort_lang_cat_7",
  project = current_project
)

lang_cat_7_nmbas <- fit_model_safe(
  outcome     = "continuous_nmba_48",
  exposure    = "lang_cat_7",
  covariates  = paralytic_covariates,
  data        = total_cohort,
  model_name  = "lang_cat_7_nmbas",
  cohort_name = "total_cohort",
  project     = current_project,
  family      = binomial(link = "logit")
)
if (!is.null(lang_cat_7_nmbas)) {
  fwrite(extract_glm_results(lang_cat_7_nmbas),
         file.path(paralytics_final_data, paste0(institution, "_paralysis_lang_cat_7.csv")))
}
```

# Step 2: ARF Sub-Groups - Odds of Continuous NMBAs for Different Language Groups
```{r}
# Helper for the paralytic project's ARF/non-ARF subgroups: each cohort needs
# the same set of factor relevels.
relevel_paralytic_subgroup <- function(dt) {
  if (is.null(dt) || nrow(dt) == 0) return(dt)
  dt$sex_category       <- relevel(as.factor(dt$sex_category),       ref = "male")
  dt$race_category      <- relevel(as.factor(dt$race_category),      ref = "white")
  dt$ethnicity_category <- relevel(as.factor(dt$ethnicity_category), ref = "non-hispanic")
  dt$ethnicity_category_final <- relevel(as.factor(dt$ethnicity_category_final), ref = "non-hispanic/unknown")
  dt
}

################################################################################
# lang_cat_1 - Only ARF Patients
################################################################################
lang_cat_1_2_arf_cohort <- relevel_paralytic_subgroup(total_cohort[arf_flag == TRUE])
lang_cat_1_2_arf_cohort$lang_cat_1 <- relevel(as.factor(lang_cat_1_2_arf_cohort$lang_cat_1), ref = "english")
lang_cat_1_2_arf_cohort$lang_cat_2 <- relevel(as.factor(lang_cat_1_2_arf_cohort$lang_cat_2), ref = "english")

make_table1_pair(
  dt = lang_cat_1_2_arf_cohort, by = "lang_cat_1", reference_level = "english",
  cat_vars = cat_vars, cont_vars = cont_vars, site_name = institution,
  tables_dir = paralytics_tables_dir, institution_prefix = institution,
  cohort_name = "lang_cat_1_2_arf_cohort", file_stem = "lang_cat_1_arf_cohort",
  project = current_project
)

arf_lang_cat_1_nmbas <- fit_model_safe(
  outcome     = "continuous_nmba_48",
  exposure    = "lang_cat_1",
  covariates  = paralytic_covariates,
  data        = lang_cat_1_2_arf_cohort,
  model_name  = "arf_lang_cat_1_nmbas",
  cohort_name = "lang_cat_1_2_arf_cohort",
  project     = current_project,
  family      = binomial(link = "logit")
)
if (!is.null(arf_lang_cat_1_nmbas)) {
  fwrite(extract_glm_results(arf_lang_cat_1_nmbas),
         file.path(paralytics_final_data, paste0(institution, "_paralysis_lang_cat_1_arf.csv")))
}

################################################################################
# lang_cat_2 - Only ARF Patients (reuses lang_cat_1_2_arf_cohort)
################################################################################
make_table1_pair(
  dt = lang_cat_1_2_arf_cohort, by = "lang_cat_2", reference_level = "english",
  cat_vars = cat_vars, cont_vars = cont_vars, site_name = institution,
  tables_dir = paralytics_tables_dir, institution_prefix = institution,
  cohort_name = "lang_cat_1_2_arf_cohort", file_stem = "lang_cat_2_arf_cohort",
  project = current_project
)

arf_lang_cat_2_nmbas <- fit_model_safe(
  outcome     = "continuous_nmba_48",
  exposure    = "lang_cat_2",
  covariates  = paralytic_covariates,
  data        = lang_cat_1_2_arf_cohort,
  model_name  = "arf_lang_cat_2_nmbas",
  cohort_name = "lang_cat_1_2_arf_cohort",
  project     = current_project,
  family      = binomial(link = "logit")
)
if (!is.null(arf_lang_cat_2_nmbas)) {
  fwrite(extract_glm_results(arf_lang_cat_2_nmbas),
         file.path(paralytics_final_data, paste0(institution, "_paralysis_lang_cat_2_arf.csv")))
}

################################################################################
# Lang Cat 3 - Only ARF Patients
################################################################################
lang_cat_3_arf_cohort <- relevel_paralytic_subgroup(lang_cat_3_cohort[arf_flag == TRUE])
lang_cat_3_arf_cohort$lang_cat_3 <- relevel(as.factor(lang_cat_3_arf_cohort$lang_cat_3), ref = "english")

make_table1_pair(
  dt = lang_cat_3_arf_cohort, by = "lang_cat_3", reference_level = "english",
  cat_vars = cat_vars, cont_vars = cont_vars, site_name = institution,
  tables_dir = paralytics_tables_dir, institution_prefix = institution,
  cohort_name = "lang_cat_3_arf_cohort", file_stem = "lang_cat_3_arf_cohort",
  project = current_project
)

arf_lang_cat_3_nmbas <- fit_model_safe(
  outcome     = "continuous_nmba_48",
  exposure    = "lang_cat_3",
  covariates  = paralytic_covariates,
  data        = lang_cat_3_arf_cohort,
  model_name  = "arf_lang_cat_3_nmbas",
  cohort_name = "lang_cat_3_arf_cohort",
  project     = current_project,
  family      = binomial(link = "logit")
)
if (!is.null(arf_lang_cat_3_nmbas)) {
  fwrite(extract_glm_results(arf_lang_cat_3_nmbas),
         file.path(paralytics_final_data, paste0(institution, "_paralysis_lang_cat_3_arf.csv")))
}

################################################################################
# Lang Cat 4 - Only ARF Patients
################################################################################
lang_cat_4_arf_cohort <- relevel_paralytic_subgroup(lang_cat_4_cohort[arf_flag == TRUE])
lang_cat_4_arf_cohort$lang_cat_4 <- relevel(as.factor(lang_cat_4_arf_cohort$lang_cat_4), ref = "english")

make_table1_pair(
  dt = lang_cat_4_arf_cohort, by = "lang_cat_4", reference_level = "english",
  cat_vars = cat_vars, cont_vars = cont_vars, site_name = institution,
  tables_dir = paralytics_tables_dir, institution_prefix = institution,
  cohort_name = "lang_cat_4_arf_cohort", file_stem = "lang_cat_4_arf_cohort",
  project = current_project
)

arf_lang_cat_4_nmbas <- fit_model_safe(
  outcome     = "continuous_nmba_48",
  exposure    = "lang_cat_4",
  covariates  = paralytic_covariates,
  data        = lang_cat_4_arf_cohort,
  model_name  = "arf_lang_cat_4_nmbas",
  cohort_name = "lang_cat_4_arf_cohort",
  project     = current_project,
  family      = binomial(link = "logit")
)
if (!is.null(arf_lang_cat_4_nmbas)) {
  fwrite(extract_glm_results(arf_lang_cat_4_nmbas),
         file.path(paralytics_final_data, paste0(institution, "_paralysis_lang_cat_4_arf.csv")))
}

################################################################################
# Lang Cat 5 - Only ARF Patients
################################################################################
lang_cat_5_arf_cohort <- relevel_paralytic_subgroup(lang_cat_5_cohort[arf_flag == TRUE])
lang_cat_5_arf_cohort$lang_cat_5 <- relevel(as.factor(lang_cat_5_arf_cohort$lang_cat_5), ref = "english")

make_table1_pair(
  dt = lang_cat_5_arf_cohort, by = "lang_cat_5", reference_level = "english",
  cat_vars = cat_vars, cont_vars = cont_vars, site_name = institution,
  tables_dir = paralytics_tables_dir, institution_prefix = institution,
  cohort_name = "lang_cat_5_arf_cohort", file_stem = "lang_cat_5_arf_cohort",
  project = current_project
)

arf_lang_cat_5_nmbas <- fit_model_safe(
  outcome     = "continuous_nmba_48",
  exposure    = "lang_cat_5",
  covariates  = paralytic_covariates,
  data        = lang_cat_5_arf_cohort,
  model_name  = "arf_lang_cat_5_nmbas",
  cohort_name = "lang_cat_5_arf_cohort",
  project     = current_project,
  family      = binomial(link = "logit")
)
if (!is.null(arf_lang_cat_5_nmbas)) {
  fwrite(extract_glm_results(arf_lang_cat_5_nmbas),
         file.path(paralytics_final_data, paste0(institution, "_paralysis_lang_cat_5_arf.csv")))
}

################################################################################
# Lang Cat 6 - Only ARF Patients
################################################################################
lang_cat_6_arf_cohort <- relevel_paralytic_subgroup(primary_cohort_all_icus[arf_flag == TRUE])
lang_cat_6_arf_cohort$lang_cat_6 <- relevel(as.factor(lang_cat_6_arf_cohort$lang_cat_6), ref = "english")

make_table1_pair(
  dt = lang_cat_6_arf_cohort, by = "lang_cat_6", reference_level = "english",
  cat_vars = cat_vars, cont_vars = cont_vars, site_name = institution,
  tables_dir = paralytics_tables_dir, institution_prefix = institution,
  cohort_name = "lang_cat_6_arf_cohort", file_stem = "lang_cat_6_arf_cohort",
  project = current_project
)

arf_lang_cat_6_nmbas <- fit_model_safe(
  outcome     = "continuous_nmba_48",
  exposure    = "lang_cat_6",
  covariates  = paralytic_covariates,
  data        = lang_cat_6_arf_cohort,
  model_name  = "arf_lang_cat_6_nmbas",
  cohort_name = "lang_cat_6_arf_cohort",
  project     = current_project,
  family      = binomial(link = "logit")
)
if (!is.null(arf_lang_cat_6_nmbas)) {
  fwrite(extract_glm_results(arf_lang_cat_6_nmbas),
         file.path(paralytics_final_data, paste0(institution, "_paralysis_lang_cat_6_arf.csv")))
}

################################################################################
# lang_cat_7 - Only ARF Patients
################################################################################
lang_cat_7_arf_cohort <- relevel_paralytic_subgroup(total_cohort[arf_flag == TRUE])
lang_cat_7_arf_cohort$lang_cat_7 <- relevel(as.factor(lang_cat_7_arf_cohort$lang_cat_7), ref = "english")

make_table1_pair(
  dt = lang_cat_7_arf_cohort, by = "lang_cat_7", reference_level = "english",
  cat_vars = cat_vars, cont_vars = cont_vars, site_name = institution,
  tables_dir = paralytics_tables_dir, institution_prefix = institution,
  cohort_name = "lang_cat_7_arf_cohort", file_stem = "lang_cat_7_arf_cohort",
  project = current_project
)

arf_lang_cat_7_nmbas <- fit_model_safe(
  outcome     = "continuous_nmba_48",
  exposure    = "lang_cat_7",
  covariates  = paralytic_covariates,
  data        = lang_cat_7_arf_cohort,
  model_name  = "arf_lang_cat_7_nmbas",
  cohort_name = "lang_cat_7_arf_cohort",
  project     = current_project,
  family      = binomial(link = "logit")
)
if (!is.null(arf_lang_cat_7_nmbas)) {
  fwrite(extract_glm_results(arf_lang_cat_7_nmbas),
         file.path(paralytics_final_data, paste0(institution, "_paralysis_lang_cat_7_arf.csv")))
}
```

# Step 3: Non-ARF Cohort - Odds of continuous NMBAs
```{r}
################################################################################
# lang_cat_1 - Only non-ARF Patients
################################################################################
lang_cat_1_2_non_arf_cohort <- relevel_paralytic_subgroup(total_cohort[arf_flag == FALSE])
lang_cat_1_2_non_arf_cohort$lang_cat_1 <- relevel(as.factor(lang_cat_1_2_non_arf_cohort$lang_cat_1), ref = "english")
lang_cat_1_2_non_arf_cohort$lang_cat_2 <- relevel(as.factor(lang_cat_1_2_non_arf_cohort$lang_cat_2), ref = "english")

make_table1_pair(
  dt = lang_cat_1_2_non_arf_cohort, by = "lang_cat_1", reference_level = "english",
  cat_vars = cat_vars, cont_vars = cont_vars, site_name = institution,
  tables_dir = paralytics_tables_dir, institution_prefix = institution,
  cohort_name = "lang_cat_1_2_non_arf_cohort", file_stem = "lang_cat_1_non_arf_cohort",
  project = current_project
)

non_arf_lang_cat_1_nmbas <- fit_model_safe(
  outcome     = "continuous_nmba_48",
  exposure    = "lang_cat_1",
  covariates  = paralytic_covariates,
  data        = lang_cat_1_2_non_arf_cohort,
  model_name  = "non_arf_lang_cat_1_nmbas",
  cohort_name = "lang_cat_1_2_non_arf_cohort",
  project     = current_project,
  family      = binomial(link = "logit")
)
if (!is.null(non_arf_lang_cat_1_nmbas)) {
  fwrite(extract_glm_results(non_arf_lang_cat_1_nmbas),
         file.path(paralytics_final_data, paste0(institution, "_paralysis_lang_cat_1_non_arf.csv")))
}

################################################################################
# lang_cat_2 - Only non-ARF Patients (reuses lang_cat_1_2_non_arf_cohort)
################################################################################
make_table1_pair(
  dt = lang_cat_1_2_non_arf_cohort, by = "lang_cat_2", reference_level = "english",
  cat_vars = cat_vars, cont_vars = cont_vars, site_name = institution,
  tables_dir = paralytics_tables_dir, institution_prefix = institution,
  cohort_name = "lang_cat_1_2_non_arf_cohort", file_stem = "lang_cat_2_non_arf_cohort",
  project = current_project
)

non_arf_lang_cat_2_nmbas <- fit_model_safe(
  outcome     = "continuous_nmba_48",
  exposure    = "lang_cat_2",
  covariates  = paralytic_covariates,
  data        = lang_cat_1_2_non_arf_cohort,
  model_name  = "non_arf_lang_cat_2_nmbas",
  cohort_name = "lang_cat_1_2_non_arf_cohort",
  project     = current_project,
  family      = binomial(link = "logit")
)
if (!is.null(non_arf_lang_cat_2_nmbas)) {
  fwrite(extract_glm_results(non_arf_lang_cat_2_nmbas),
         file.path(paralytics_final_data, paste0(institution, "_paralysis_lang_cat_2_non_arf.csv")))
}

################################################################################
# Lang Cat 3 - Only non-ARF Patients
################################################################################
lang_cat_3_non_arf_cohort <- relevel_paralytic_subgroup(lang_cat_3_cohort[arf_flag == FALSE])
lang_cat_3_non_arf_cohort$lang_cat_3 <- relevel(as.factor(lang_cat_3_non_arf_cohort$lang_cat_3), ref = "english")

make_table1_pair(
  dt = lang_cat_3_non_arf_cohort, by = "lang_cat_3", reference_level = "english",
  cat_vars = cat_vars, cont_vars = cont_vars, site_name = institution,
  tables_dir = paralytics_tables_dir, institution_prefix = institution,
  cohort_name = "lang_cat_3_non_arf_cohort", file_stem = "lang_cat_3_non_arf_cohort",
  project = current_project
)

non_arf_lang_cat_3_nmbas <- fit_model_safe(
  outcome     = "continuous_nmba_48",
  exposure    = "lang_cat_3",
  covariates  = paralytic_covariates,
  data        = lang_cat_3_non_arf_cohort,
  model_name  = "non_arf_lang_cat_3_nmbas",
  cohort_name = "lang_cat_3_non_arf_cohort",
  project     = current_project,
  family      = binomial(link = "logit")
)
if (!is.null(non_arf_lang_cat_3_nmbas)) {
  fwrite(extract_glm_results(non_arf_lang_cat_3_nmbas),
         file.path(paralytics_final_data, paste0(institution, "_paralysis_lang_cat_3_non_arf.csv")))
}

################################################################################
# Lang Cat 4 - Only non-ARF Patients
################################################################################
lang_cat_4_non_arf_cohort <- relevel_paralytic_subgroup(lang_cat_4_cohort[arf_flag == FALSE])
lang_cat_4_non_arf_cohort$lang_cat_4 <- relevel(as.factor(lang_cat_4_non_arf_cohort$lang_cat_4), ref = "english")

make_table1_pair(
  dt = lang_cat_4_non_arf_cohort, by = "lang_cat_4", reference_level = "english",
  cat_vars = cat_vars, cont_vars = cont_vars, site_name = institution,
  tables_dir = paralytics_tables_dir, institution_prefix = institution,
  cohort_name = "lang_cat_4_non_arf_cohort", file_stem = "lang_cat_4_non_arf_cohort",
  project = current_project
)

non_arf_lang_cat_4_nmbas <- fit_model_safe(
  outcome     = "continuous_nmba_48",
  exposure    = "lang_cat_4",
  covariates  = paralytic_covariates,
  data        = lang_cat_4_non_arf_cohort,
  model_name  = "non_arf_lang_cat_4_nmbas",
  cohort_name = "lang_cat_4_non_arf_cohort",
  project     = current_project,
  family      = binomial(link = "logit")
)
if (!is.null(non_arf_lang_cat_4_nmbas)) {
  fwrite(extract_glm_results(non_arf_lang_cat_4_nmbas),
         file.path(paralytics_final_data, paste0(institution, "_paralysis_lang_cat_4_non_arf.csv")))
}

################################################################################
# Lang Cat 5 - Only non-ARF Patients
################################################################################
lang_cat_5_non_arf_cohort <- relevel_paralytic_subgroup(lang_cat_5_cohort[arf_flag == FALSE])
lang_cat_5_non_arf_cohort$lang_cat_5 <- relevel(as.factor(lang_cat_5_non_arf_cohort$lang_cat_5), ref = "english")

make_table1_pair(
  dt = lang_cat_5_non_arf_cohort, by = "lang_cat_5", reference_level = "english",
  cat_vars = cat_vars, cont_vars = cont_vars, site_name = institution,
  tables_dir = paralytics_tables_dir, institution_prefix = institution,
  cohort_name = "lang_cat_5_non_arf_cohort", file_stem = "lang_cat_5_non_arf_cohort",
  project = current_project
)

non_arf_lang_cat_5_nmbas <- fit_model_safe(
  outcome     = "continuous_nmba_48",
  exposure    = "lang_cat_5",
  covariates  = paralytic_covariates,
  data        = lang_cat_5_non_arf_cohort,
  model_name  = "non_arf_lang_cat_5_nmbas",
  cohort_name = "lang_cat_5_non_arf_cohort",
  project     = current_project,
  family      = binomial(link = "logit")
)
if (!is.null(non_arf_lang_cat_5_nmbas)) {
  fwrite(extract_glm_results(non_arf_lang_cat_5_nmbas),
         file.path(paralytics_final_data, paste0(institution, "_paralysis_lang_cat_5_non_arf.csv")))
}

################################################################################
# Lang Cat 6 - Only non-ARF Patients
################################################################################
lang_cat_6_non_arf_cohort <- relevel_paralytic_subgroup(primary_cohort_all_icus[arf_flag == FALSE])
lang_cat_6_non_arf_cohort$lang_cat_6 <- relevel(as.factor(lang_cat_6_non_arf_cohort$lang_cat_6), ref = "english")

make_table1_pair(
  dt = lang_cat_6_non_arf_cohort, by = "lang_cat_6", reference_level = "english",
  cat_vars = cat_vars, cont_vars = cont_vars, site_name = institution,
  tables_dir = paralytics_tables_dir, institution_prefix = institution,
  cohort_name = "lang_cat_6_non_arf_cohort", file_stem = "lang_cat_6_non_arf_cohort",
  project = current_project
)

non_arf_lang_cat_6_nmbas <- fit_model_safe(
  outcome     = "continuous_nmba_48",
  exposure    = "lang_cat_6",
  covariates  = paralytic_covariates,
  data        = lang_cat_6_non_arf_cohort,
  model_name  = "non_arf_lang_cat_6_nmbas",
  cohort_name = "lang_cat_6_non_arf_cohort",
  project     = current_project,
  family      = binomial(link = "logit")
)
if (!is.null(non_arf_lang_cat_6_nmbas)) {
  fwrite(extract_glm_results(non_arf_lang_cat_6_nmbas),
         file.path(paralytics_final_data, paste0(institution, "_paralysis_lang_cat_6_non_arf.csv")))
}

################################################################################
# lang_cat_7 - Only non-ARF Patients
################################################################################
lang_cat_7_non_arf_cohort <- relevel_paralytic_subgroup(total_cohort[arf_flag == FALSE])
lang_cat_7_non_arf_cohort$lang_cat_7 <- relevel(as.factor(lang_cat_7_non_arf_cohort$lang_cat_7), ref = "english")

make_table1_pair(
  dt = lang_cat_7_non_arf_cohort, by = "lang_cat_7", reference_level = "english",
  cat_vars = cat_vars, cont_vars = cont_vars, site_name = institution,
  tables_dir = paralytics_tables_dir, institution_prefix = institution,
  cohort_name = "lang_cat_7_non_arf_cohort", file_stem = "lang_cat_7_non_arf_cohort",
  project = current_project
)

non_arf_lang_cat_7_nmbas <- fit_model_safe(
  outcome     = "continuous_nmba_48",
  exposure    = "lang_cat_7",
  covariates  = paralytic_covariates,
  data        = lang_cat_7_non_arf_cohort,
  model_name  = "non_arf_lang_cat_7_nmbas",
  cohort_name = "lang_cat_7_non_arf_cohort",
  project     = current_project,
  family      = binomial(link = "logit")
)
if (!is.null(non_arf_lang_cat_7_nmbas)) {
  fwrite(extract_glm_results(non_arf_lang_cat_7_nmbas),
         file.path(paralytics_final_data, paste0(institution, "_paralysis_lang_cat_7_non_arf.csv")))
}
```

# Step 4: ARF Pre-Pandemic, Pandemic, and Endemic for lang_cat_1, 5, 6, 7
```{r}
################################################################################
# Define pandemic-period cohorts for each language category × time period
# combination. Each base cohort gets filtered by admission_dttm.
################################################################################
pandemic_periods <- list(
  pre_pandemic = list(filter = function(dt) dt[admission_dttm < as.POSIXct("2020-03-01 00:00:00")]),
  pandemic     = list(filter = function(dt) dt[admission_dttm >= as.POSIXct("2020-03-01 00:00:00") &
                                               admission_dttm <= as.POSIXct("2021-12-31 23:59:59")]),
  endemic      = list(filter = function(dt) dt[admission_dttm > as.POSIXct("2021-12-31 23:59:59")])
)

# Map of which lang_cat to use and which base ARF cohort to filter from
pandemic_specs <- list(
  list(lang_var = "lang_cat_1", base_cohort = lang_cat_1_2_arf_cohort),
  list(lang_var = "lang_cat_2", base_cohort = lang_cat_1_2_arf_cohort),
  list(lang_var = "lang_cat_3", base_cohort = lang_cat_3_arf_cohort),
  list(lang_var = "lang_cat_4", base_cohort = lang_cat_4_arf_cohort),
  list(lang_var = "lang_cat_5", base_cohort = lang_cat_5_arf_cohort),
  list(lang_var = "lang_cat_6", base_cohort = lang_cat_6_arf_cohort),
  list(lang_var = "lang_cat_7", base_cohort = lang_cat_7_arf_cohort)
)

for (spec in pandemic_specs) {
  for (period_name in names(pandemic_periods)) {
    
    cohort_name <- paste0(spec$lang_var, "_arf_", period_name, "_cohort")
    file_stem   <- paste0(spec$lang_var, "_arf_", period_name, "_cohort")
    model_name  <- paste0(spec$lang_var, "_arf_", period_name, "_nmbas")
    out_file    <- paste0(institution, "_paralysis_", spec$lang_var, "_arf_", period_name, ".csv")
    
    # Build cohort: filter by period, then re-level
    period_cohort <- pandemic_periods[[period_name]]$filter(spec$base_cohort)
    period_cohort <- relevel_paralytic_subgroup(period_cohort)
    period_cohort[[spec$lang_var]] <- relevel(
      as.factor(period_cohort[[spec$lang_var]]), ref = "english"
    )
    
    make_table1_pair(
      dt = period_cohort, by = spec$lang_var, reference_level = "english",
      cat_vars = cat_vars, cont_vars = cont_vars, site_name = institution,
      tables_dir = paralytics_tables_dir, institution_prefix = institution,
      cohort_name = cohort_name, file_stem = file_stem,
      project = current_project
    )
    
    fit <- fit_model_safe(
      outcome     = "continuous_nmba_48",
      exposure    = spec$lang_var,
      covariates  = paralytic_covariates,
      data        = period_cohort,
      model_name  = model_name,
      cohort_name = cohort_name,
      project     = current_project,
      family      = binomial(link = "logit")
    )
    if (!is.null(fit)) {
      fwrite(extract_glm_results(fit),
             file.path(paralytics_final_data, out_file))
    }
    
    # Save the cohort to the global env so downstream sections (ARF project)
    # can reference it by the original variable name
    assign(cohort_name, period_cohort)
  }
}
```

# Step 5: Exploratory Analyses for Racial, Ethnic, Gender Disparities in Paralytic Use
```{r}
paralytic_exploratory_analysis <- read_parquet(paste0(intermediate_dir, "analytic_file", institution, ".parquet"))
setDT(paralytic_exploratory_analysis)

paralytic_exploratory_analysis[, lang_cat_1 := fifelse(
  language_category == "english", "english",
  fifelse(!is.na(language_category), "non-english", NA_character_)
)]

paralytic_exploratory_analysis$lang_cat_1               <- relevel(as.factor(paralytic_exploratory_analysis$lang_cat_1),               ref = "english")
paralytic_exploratory_analysis$sex_category             <- relevel(as.factor(paralytic_exploratory_analysis$sex_category),             ref = "male")
paralytic_exploratory_analysis$race_category            <- relevel(as.factor(paralytic_exploratory_analysis$race_category),            ref = "white")
paralytic_exploratory_analysis$ethnicity_category       <- relevel(as.factor(paralytic_exploratory_analysis$ethnicity_category),       ref = "non-hispanic")
paralytic_exploratory_analysis$ethnicity_category_final <- relevel(as.factor(paralytic_exploratory_analysis$ethnicity_category_final), ref = "non-hispanic/unknown")

arf_paralytic_exploratory_analysis <- paralytic_exploratory_analysis[arf_flag == TRUE]
arf_paralytic_exploratory_analysis$lang_cat_1               <- relevel(as.factor(arf_paralytic_exploratory_analysis$lang_cat_1),               ref = "english")
arf_paralytic_exploratory_analysis$sex_category             <- relevel(as.factor(arf_paralytic_exploratory_analysis$sex_category),             ref = "male")
arf_paralytic_exploratory_analysis$race_category            <- relevel(as.factor(arf_paralytic_exploratory_analysis$race_category),            ref = "white")
arf_paralytic_exploratory_analysis$ethnicity_category       <- relevel(as.factor(arf_paralytic_exploratory_analysis$ethnicity_category),       ref = "non-hispanic")
arf_paralytic_exploratory_analysis$ethnicity_category_final <- relevel(as.factor(arf_paralytic_exploratory_analysis$ethnicity_category_final), ref = "non-hispanic/unknown")

non_arf_paralytic_exploratory_analysis <- paralytic_exploratory_analysis[arf_flag == FALSE]
non_arf_paralytic_exploratory_analysis$lang_cat_1               <- relevel(as.factor(non_arf_paralytic_exploratory_analysis$lang_cat_1),               ref = "english")
non_arf_paralytic_exploratory_analysis$sex_category             <- relevel(as.factor(non_arf_paralytic_exploratory_analysis$sex_category),             ref = "male")
non_arf_paralytic_exploratory_analysis$race_category            <- relevel(as.factor(non_arf_paralytic_exploratory_analysis$race_category),            ref = "white")
non_arf_paralytic_exploratory_analysis$ethnicity_category       <- relevel(as.factor(non_arf_paralytic_exploratory_analysis$ethnicity_category),       ref = "non-hispanic")
non_arf_paralytic_exploratory_analysis$ethnicity_category_final <- relevel(as.factor(non_arf_paralytic_exploratory_analysis$ethnicity_category_final), ref = "non-hispanic/unknown")

cont_vars_explore <- c("age_at_admission", "bmi", "elixhauser_score", "SVM_SCORE",
                       "laps2", "time_to_first_rass", "rass_frequency_hrs",
                       "observation_year")

# Covariate set used for all exploratory disparity models — note no SVM_SCORE,
# matches what the original code used.
exploratory_covariates_paralytic <- c(
  "race_category", "lang_cat_1", "age_category", "bmi", "sex_category",
  "factor(hospital_icu_id)", "elixhauser_score", "laps2",
  "factor(observation_year)"
)

################################################################################
# Ethnic Disparities — All IMV / ARF / Non-ARF
################################################################################
# cat_vars used in this block excludes ethnicity_category since it's the `by`
cat_vars_explore_ethn <- c("sex_category", "race_category", "lang_cat_1",
                           "hospital_id", "icu_imv", "location_of_intubation",
                           "admission_type_category", "arf_flag", "aHrf_flag")

# Run the same pattern across the three subcohorts
ethnicity_specs <- list(
  list(name = "all_imv", data = paralytic_exploratory_analysis,         model_name = "ethnicity_all_imv_nmbas"),
  list(name = "arf",     data = arf_paralytic_exploratory_analysis,     model_name = "ethnicity_arf_nmbas"),
  list(name = "non_arf", data = non_arf_paralytic_exploratory_analysis, model_name = "ethnicity_non_arf_nmbas")
)

for (spec in ethnicity_specs) {
  make_table1_pair(
    dt = spec$data, by = "ethnicity_category", reference_level = "non-hispanic",
    cat_vars = cat_vars_explore_ethn, cont_vars = cont_vars_explore,
    site_name = institution,
    tables_dir = paralytics_exploratory_tables, institution_prefix = institution,
    cohort_name = paste0("paralytic_ethnicity_", spec$name),
    file_stem   = paste0("ethnicity_", spec$name),
    project     = current_project
  )
  
  # For ethnicity model, ethnicity is the exposure — drop it from covariates
  fit <- fit_model_safe(
    outcome     = "continuous_nmba_48",
    exposure    = "ethnicity_category",
    covariates  = exploratory_covariates_paralytic,
    data        = spec$data,
    model_name  = spec$model_name,
    cohort_name = paste0("paralytic_ethnicity_", spec$name),
    project     = current_project,
    family      = binomial(link = "logit")
  )
  if (!is.null(fit)) {
    fwrite(extract_glm_results(fit),
           file.path(paralytics_exploratory,
                     paste0(institution, "_paralysis_ethnicity_", spec$name, ".csv")))
  }
}

################################################################################
# Racial Disparities — All IMV / ARF / Non-ARF
################################################################################
cat_vars_explore_race <- c("sex_category", "ethnicity_category", "lang_cat_1",
                           "hospital_id", "icu_imv", "location_of_intubation",
                           "admission_type_category", "arf_flag", "aHrf_flag")

# Race covariates: race is exposure, so use ethnicity_category in covariates instead
race_covariates_paralytic <- c(
  "ethnicity_category", "lang_cat_1", "age_category", "bmi", "sex_category",
  "factor(hospital_icu_id)", "elixhauser_score", "laps2",
  "factor(observation_year)"
)

race_specs <- list(
  list(name = "all_imv", data = paralytic_exploratory_analysis,         model_name = "race_all_imv_nmbas"),
  list(name = "arf",     data = arf_paralytic_exploratory_analysis,     model_name = "race_arf_nmbas"),
  list(name = "non_arf", data = non_arf_paralytic_exploratory_analysis, model_name = "race_non_arf_nmbas")
)

for (spec in race_specs) {
  make_table1_pair(
    dt = spec$data, by = "race_category", reference_level = "white",
    cat_vars = cat_vars_explore_race, cont_vars = cont_vars_explore,
    site_name = institution,
    tables_dir = paralytics_exploratory_tables, institution_prefix = institution,
    cohort_name = paste0("paralytic_race_", spec$name),
    file_stem   = paste0("race_", spec$name),
    project     = current_project
  )
  
  fit <- fit_model_safe(
    outcome     = "continuous_nmba_48",
    exposure    = "race_category",
    covariates  = race_covariates_paralytic,
    data        = spec$data,
    model_name  = spec$model_name,
    cohort_name = paste0("paralytic_race_", spec$name),
    project     = current_project,
    family      = binomial(link = "logit")
  )
  if (!is.null(fit)) {
    fwrite(extract_glm_results(fit),
           file.path(paralytics_exploratory,
                     paste0(institution, "_paralysis_race_", spec$name, ".csv")))
  }
}

################################################################################
# Sex Disparities — All IMV / ARF / Non-ARF
################################################################################
cat_vars_explore_sex <- c("ethnicity_category", "race_category", "lang_cat_1",
                          "hospital_id", "icu_imv", "location_of_intubation",
                          "admission_type_category", "arf_flag", "aHrf_flag")

# Sex covariates: sex is exposure, race + ethnicity stay as covariates
sex_covariates_paralytic <- c(
  "race_category", "ethnicity_category", "lang_cat_1", "age_category", "bmi",
  "factor(hospital_icu_id)", "elixhauser_score", "laps2",
  "factor(observation_year)"
)

sex_specs <- list(
  list(name = "all_imv", data = paralytic_exploratory_analysis,         model_name = "sex_all_imv_nmbas"),
  list(name = "arf",     data = arf_paralytic_exploratory_analysis,     model_name = "sex_arf_nmbas"),
  list(name = "non_arf", data = non_arf_paralytic_exploratory_analysis, model_name = "sex_non_arf_nmbas")
)

for (spec in sex_specs) {
  make_table1_pair(
    dt = spec$data, by = "sex_category", reference_level = "male",
    cat_vars = cat_vars_explore_sex, cont_vars = cont_vars_explore,
    site_name = institution,
    tables_dir = paralytics_exploratory_tables, institution_prefix = institution,
    cohort_name = paste0("paralytic_sex_", spec$name),
    file_stem   = paste0("sex_", spec$name),
    project     = current_project
  )
  
  fit <- fit_model_safe(
    outcome     = "continuous_nmba_48",
    exposure    = "sex_category",
    covariates  = sex_covariates_paralytic,
    data        = spec$data,
    model_name  = spec$model_name,
    cohort_name = paste0("paralytic_sex_", spec$name),
    project     = current_project,
    family      = binomial(link = "logit")
  )
  if (!is.null(fit)) {
    fwrite(extract_glm_results(fit),
           file.path(paralytics_exploratory,
                     paste0(institution, "_paralysis_sex_", spec$name, ".csv")))
  }
}

################################################################################
# Race and Language Interaction
################################################################################

# Total Cohort
# Race x Language Interaction
paralytic_model_total_cohort_race_language_interaction <- fit_model_safe(
  outcome     = "continuous_nmba_48",
  exposure    = "lang_cat_1 * race_category",
  covariates  = c(setdiff(paralytic_covariates, "race_category")),
  data        = total_cohort,
  model_name  = "paralytic_model_total_cohort_race_language_interaction",
  cohort_name = "total_cohort",
  project     = current_project,
  family      = binomial(link = "logit")
)
if (!is.null(paralytic_model_total_cohort_race_language_interaction)) {
  fwrite(extract_glm_results(paralytic_model_total_cohort_race_language_interaction),
         file.path(paralytics_exploratory, paste0(institution, "_paralytic_model_total_cohort_race_language_interaction.csv")))
}

# Ethnicity x Language Interaction
paralytic_model_total_cohort_ethnicity_language_interaction <- fit_model_safe(
  outcome     = "continuous_nmba_48",
  exposure    = "lang_cat_1 * ethnicity_category_final",
  covariates  = c(setdiff(paralytic_covariates, "ethnicity_category_final")),
  data        = total_cohort,
  model_name  = "paralytic_model_total_cohort_ethnicity_language_interaction",
  cohort_name = "total_cohort",
  project     = current_project,
  family      = binomial(link = "logit")
)
if (!is.null(paralytic_model_total_cohort_ethnicity_language_interaction)) {
  fwrite(extract_glm_results(paralytic_model_total_cohort_ethnicity_language_interaction),
         file.path(paralytics_exploratory, paste0(institution, "_paralytic_model_total_cohort_ethnicity_language_interaction.csv")))
}

# ARF Cohort
# Race x Language Interaction
paralytic_model_arf_cohort_race_language_interaction <- fit_model_safe(
  outcome     = "continuous_nmba_48",
  exposure    = "lang_cat_1 * race_category",
  covariates  = c(setdiff(paralytic_covariates, "race_category")),
  data        = lang_cat_1_2_arf_cohort,
  model_name  = "paralytic_model_total_cohort_race_language_interaction",
  cohort_name = "lang_cat_1_2_arf_cohort",
  project     = current_project,
  family      = binomial(link = "logit")
)
if (!is.null(paralytic_model_arf_cohort_race_language_interaction)) {
  fwrite(extract_glm_results(paralytic_model_arf_cohort_race_language_interaction),
         file.path(paralytics_exploratory, paste0(institution, "_paralytic_model_arf_cohort_race_language_interaction.csv")))
}

# Ethnicity x Language Interaction
paralytic_model_arf_cohort_ethnicity_language_interaction <- fit_model_safe(
  outcome     = "continuous_nmba_48",
  exposure    = "lang_cat_1 * ethnicity_category_final",
  covariates  = c(setdiff(paralytic_covariates, "ethnicity_category_final")),
  data        = lang_cat_1_2_arf_cohort,
  model_name  = "paralytic_model_total_cohort_ethnicity_language_interaction",
  cohort_name = "lang_cat_1_2_arf_cohort",
  project     = current_project,
  family      = binomial(link = "logit")
)
if (!is.null(paralytic_model_arf_cohort_ethnicity_language_interaction)) {
  fwrite(extract_glm_results(paralytic_model_arf_cohort_ethnicity_language_interaction),
         file.path(paralytics_exploratory, paste0(institution, "_paralytic_model_arf_cohort_ethnicity_language_interaction.csv")))
}

```

# ARF PROJECT
# Step 1: Explore lang_cat_5 group - all ARF, pandemic groupings, no paralytics
```{r}
current_project <- "arf"
# Helper for the ARF project's no-paralytic subgroups: each cohort needs the
# same set of factor relevels.
relevel_arf_subgroup <- function(dt) {
  if (is.null(dt) || nrow(dt) == 0) return(dt)
  dt$sex_category       <- relevel(as.factor(dt$sex_category),       ref = "male")
  dt$race_category      <- relevel(as.factor(dt$race_category),      ref = "white")
  dt$ethnicity_category <- relevel(as.factor(dt$ethnicity_category), ref = "non-hispanic")
  dt$ethnicity_category_final <- relevel(as.factor(dt$ethnicity_category_final), ref = "non-hispanic/unknown")
  dt
}

# ARF project models include ethnicity as a covariate (paralytic_covariates
# already does this — we'll reuse it but the variable list matches the
# original ARF code).
arf_covariates <- c(
  "race_category", "age_category", "ethnicity_category_final", "bmi", "sex_category",
  "factor(hospital_icu_id)", "elixhauser_score", "SVM_SCORE", "laps2",
  "factor(observation_year)"
)

################################################################################
# lang_cat_5 - All ARF Patients
################################################################################
make_table1_pair(
  dt = lang_cat_5_arf_cohort, by = "lang_cat_5", reference_level = "english",
  cat_vars = cat_vars, cont_vars = cont_vars, site_name = institution,
  tables_dir = arf_tables_dir, institution_prefix = institution,
  cohort_name = "lang_cat_5_arf_cohort", file_stem = "lang_cat_5_arf_cohort",
  project = current_project
)

lang_cat_5_arf_all_deep_sedation <- fit_model_safe(
  outcome     = "percent_deep_sedation_48",
  exposure    = "lang_cat_5",
  covariates  = arf_covariates,
  data        = lang_cat_5_arf_cohort,
  model_name  = "lang_cat_5_arf_all_deep_sedation",
  cohort_name = "lang_cat_5_arf_cohort",
  project     = current_project
)
if (!is.null(lang_cat_5_arf_all_deep_sedation)) {
  fwrite(extract_lm_results(lang_cat_5_arf_all_deep_sedation),
         file.path(arf_final_data, paste0(institution, "_lang_cat_5_arf_all_deep_sedation.csv")))
}

################################################################################
# lang_cat_5 - No Continuous Paralytics
################################################################################
lang_cat_5_arf_no_cont_nmba_cohort <- relevel_arf_subgroup(
  lang_cat_5_arf_cohort[continuous_nmba_48 == 0]
)
lang_cat_5_arf_no_cont_nmba_cohort$lang_cat_5 <- relevel(
  as.factor(lang_cat_5_arf_no_cont_nmba_cohort$lang_cat_5), ref = "english"
)

make_table1_pair(
  dt = lang_cat_5_arf_no_cont_nmba_cohort, by = "lang_cat_5", reference_level = "english",
  cat_vars = cat_vars, cont_vars = cont_vars, site_name = institution,
  tables_dir = arf_tables_dir, institution_prefix = institution,
  cohort_name = "lang_cat_5_arf_no_cont_nmba_cohort",
  file_stem   = "lang_cat_5_arf_no_cont_nmba_cohort",
  project = current_project
)

sensitivity_model_arf_no_cont_nmba_deep_sedation <- fit_model_safe(
  outcome     = "percent_deep_sedation_48",
  exposure    = "lang_cat_5",
  covariates  = arf_covariates,
  data        = lang_cat_5_arf_no_cont_nmba_cohort,
  model_name  = "sensitivity_model_arf_no_cont_nmba_deep_sedation",
  cohort_name = "lang_cat_5_arf_no_cont_nmba_cohort",
  project     = current_project
)
if (!is.null(sensitivity_model_arf_no_cont_nmba_deep_sedation)) {
  fwrite(extract_lm_results(sensitivity_model_arf_no_cont_nmba_deep_sedation),
         file.path(arf_final_data, paste0(institution, "_sensitivity_analysis_lang_cat_5_arf_no_cont_nmba.csv")))
}

################################################################################
# lang_cat_5 - No Continuous or Push Paralytics
################################################################################
lang_cat_5_arf_no_nmba_cohort <- relevel_arf_subgroup(
  lang_cat_5_arf_cohort[continuous_nmba_48 == 0][push_paralytics == 0]
)
lang_cat_5_arf_no_nmba_cohort$lang_cat_5 <- relevel(
  as.factor(lang_cat_5_arf_no_nmba_cohort$lang_cat_5), ref = "english"
)

make_table1_pair(
  dt = lang_cat_5_arf_no_nmba_cohort, by = "lang_cat_5", reference_level = "english",
  cat_vars = cat_vars, cont_vars = cont_vars, site_name = institution,
  tables_dir = arf_tables_dir, institution_prefix = institution,
  cohort_name = "lang_cat_5_arf_no_nmba_cohort",
  file_stem   = "lang_cat_5_arf_no_nmba_cohort",
  project = current_project
)

sensitivity_model_lang_cat_5_arf_no_nmba_cohort <- fit_model_safe(
  outcome     = "percent_deep_sedation_48",
  exposure    = "lang_cat_5",
  covariates  = arf_covariates,
  data        = lang_cat_5_arf_no_nmba_cohort,
  model_name  = "sensitivity_model_lang_cat_5_arf_no_nmba_cohort",
  cohort_name = "lang_cat_5_arf_no_nmba_cohort",
  project     = current_project
)
if (!is.null(sensitivity_model_lang_cat_5_arf_no_nmba_cohort)) {
  fwrite(extract_lm_results(sensitivity_model_lang_cat_5_arf_no_nmba_cohort),
         file.path(arf_final_data, paste0(institution, "_sensitivity_analysis_lang_cat_5_arf_no_nmba.csv")))
}

################################################################################
# lang_cat_5 - Pre-Pandemic / Pandemic / Endemic
# Cohorts already exist from the paralytic project Step 4 loop
################################################################################
period_specs_5 <- list(
  list(period = "pre_pandemic", cohort = lang_cat_5_arf_pre_pandemic_cohort,
       cohort_name = "lang_cat_5_arf_pre_pandemic_cohort",
       model_name  = "lang_cat_5_arf_pre_pandemic_deep_sedation",
       out_file    = "_lang_cat_5_arf_pre_pandemic_deep_sedation.csv"),
  list(period = "pandemic",     cohort = lang_cat_5_arf_pandemic_cohort,
       cohort_name = "lang_cat_5_arf_pandemic_cohort",
       model_name  = "lang_cat_5_arf_pandemic_deep_sedation",
       out_file    = "_lang_cat_5_arf_pandemic_deep_sedation.csv"),
  list(period = "endemic",      cohort = lang_cat_5_arf_endemic_cohort,
       cohort_name = "lang_cat_5_arf_endemic_cohort",
       model_name  = "lang_cat_5_arf_endemic_deep_sedation",
       out_file    = "_lang_cat_5_arf_endemic_deep_sedation.csv")
)

for (spec in period_specs_5) {
  make_table1_pair(
    dt = spec$cohort, by = "lang_cat_5", reference_level = "english",
    cat_vars = cat_vars, cont_vars = cont_vars, site_name = institution,
    tables_dir = arf_tables_dir, institution_prefix = institution,
    cohort_name = spec$cohort_name, file_stem = spec$cohort_name,
    project = current_project
  )
  
  fit <- fit_model_safe(
    outcome     = "percent_deep_sedation_48",
    exposure    = "lang_cat_5",
    covariates  = arf_covariates,
    data        = spec$cohort,
    model_name  = spec$model_name,
    cohort_name = spec$cohort_name,
    project     = current_project
  )
  if (!is.null(fit)) {
    fwrite(extract_lm_results(fit),
           file.path(arf_final_data, paste0(institution, spec$out_file)))
  }
}
```

# Step 2: Explore lang_cat_6 group - all ARF, pandemic groupings, no paralytics
```{r}
################################################################################
# lang_cat_6 - All ARF Patients
################################################################################
make_table1_pair(
  dt = lang_cat_6_arf_cohort, by = "lang_cat_6", reference_level = "english",
  cat_vars = cat_vars, cont_vars = cont_vars, site_name = institution,
  tables_dir = arf_tables_dir, institution_prefix = institution,
  cohort_name = "lang_cat_6_arf_cohort", file_stem = "lang_cat_6_arf_cohort",
  project = current_project
)

lang_cat_6_arf_all_deep_sedation <- fit_model_safe(
  outcome     = "percent_deep_sedation_48",
  exposure    = "lang_cat_6",
  covariates  = arf_covariates,
  data        = lang_cat_6_arf_cohort,
  model_name  = "lang_cat_6_arf_all_deep_sedation",
  cohort_name = "lang_cat_6_arf_cohort",
  project     = current_project
)
if (!is.null(lang_cat_6_arf_all_deep_sedation)) {
  fwrite(extract_lm_results(lang_cat_6_arf_all_deep_sedation),
         file.path(arf_final_data, paste0(institution, "_lang_cat_6_arf_all_deep_sedation.csv")))
}

################################################################################
# lang_cat_6 - No Continuous Paralytics
################################################################################
lang_cat_6_arf_no_cont_nmba_cohort <- relevel_arf_subgroup(
  lang_cat_6_arf_cohort[continuous_nmba_48 == 0]
)
lang_cat_6_arf_no_cont_nmba_cohort$lang_cat_6 <- relevel(
  as.factor(lang_cat_6_arf_no_cont_nmba_cohort$lang_cat_6), ref = "english"
)

make_table1_pair(
  dt = lang_cat_6_arf_no_cont_nmba_cohort, by = "lang_cat_6", reference_level = "english",
  cat_vars = cat_vars, cont_vars = cont_vars, site_name = institution,
  tables_dir = arf_tables_dir, institution_prefix = institution,
  cohort_name = "lang_cat_6_arf_no_cont_nmba_cohort",
  file_stem   = "lang_cat_6_arf_no_cont_nmba_cohort",
  project = current_project
)

sensitivity_model_arf_no_cont_nmba_deep_sedation_6 <- fit_model_safe(
  outcome     = "percent_deep_sedation_48",
  exposure    = "lang_cat_6",
  covariates  = arf_covariates,
  data        = lang_cat_6_arf_no_cont_nmba_cohort,
  model_name  = "sensitivity_model_arf_no_cont_nmba_deep_sedation_6",
```
