```{r}
  cohort_name = "lang_cat_6_arf_no_cont_nmba_cohort",
  project     = current_project
)
if (!is.null(sensitivity_model_arf_no_cont_nmba_deep_sedation_6)) {
  fwrite(extract_lm_results(sensitivity_model_arf_no_cont_nmba_deep_sedation_6),
         file.path(arf_final_data, paste0(institution, "_sensitivity_analysis_lang_cat_6_arf_no_cont_nmba.csv")))
}

################################################################################
# lang_cat_6 - No Continuous or Push Paralytics
################################################################################
lang_cat_6_arf_no_nmba_cohort <- relevel_arf_subgroup(
  lang_cat_6_arf_cohort[continuous_nmba_48 == 0][push_paralytics == 0]
)
lang_cat_6_arf_no_nmba_cohort$lang_cat_6 <- relevel(
  as.factor(lang_cat_6_arf_no_nmba_cohort$lang_cat_6), ref = "english"
)

make_table1_pair(
  dt = lang_cat_6_arf_no_nmba_cohort, by = "lang_cat_6", reference_level = "english",
  cat_vars = cat_vars, cont_vars = cont_vars, site_name = institution,
  tables_dir = arf_tables_dir, institution_prefix = institution,
  cohort_name = "lang_cat_6_arf_no_nmba_cohort",
  file_stem   = "lang_cat_6_arf_no_nmba_cohort",
  project = current_project
)

sensitivity_model_lang_cat_6_arf_no_nmba_cohort <- fit_model_safe(
  outcome     = "percent_deep_sedation_48",
  exposure    = "lang_cat_6",
  covariates  = arf_covariates,
  data        = lang_cat_6_arf_no_nmba_cohort,
  model_name  = "sensitivity_model_lang_cat_6_arf_no_nmba_cohort",
  cohort_name = "lang_cat_6_arf_no_nmba_cohort",
  project     = current_project
)
if (!is.null(sensitivity_model_lang_cat_6_arf_no_nmba_cohort)) {
  fwrite(extract_lm_results(sensitivity_model_lang_cat_6_arf_no_nmba_cohort),
         file.path(arf_final_data, paste0(institution, "_sensitivity_analysis_lang_cat_6_arf_no_nmba.csv")))
}

################################################################################
# lang_cat_6 - Pre-Pandemic / Pandemic / Endemic
################################################################################
period_specs_6 <- list(
  list(cohort = lang_cat_6_arf_pre_pandemic_cohort,
       cohort_name = "lang_cat_6_arf_pre_pandemic_cohort",
       model_name  = "lang_cat_6_arf_pre_pandemic_deep_sedation",
       out_file    = "_lang_cat_6_arf_pre_pandemic_deep_sedation.csv"),
  list(cohort = lang_cat_6_arf_pandemic_cohort,
       cohort_name = "lang_cat_6_arf_pandemic_cohort",
       model_name  = "lang_cat_6_arf_pandemic_deep_sedation",
       out_file    = "_lang_cat_6_arf_pandemic_deep_sedation.csv"),
  list(cohort = lang_cat_6_arf_endemic_cohort,
       cohort_name = "lang_cat_6_arf_endemic_cohort",
       model_name  = "lang_cat_6_arf_endemic_deep_sedation",
       out_file    = "_lang_cat_6_arf_endemic_deep_sedation.csv")
)

for (spec in period_specs_6) {
  make_table1_pair(
    dt = spec$cohort, by = "lang_cat_6", reference_level = "english",
    cat_vars = cat_vars, cont_vars = cont_vars, site_name = institution,
    tables_dir = arf_tables_dir, institution_prefix = institution,
    cohort_name = spec$cohort_name, file_stem = spec$cohort_name,
    project = current_project
  )
  
  fit <- fit_model_safe(
    outcome     = "percent_deep_sedation_48",
    exposure    = "lang_cat_6",
    covariates  = arf_covariates,
    data        = spec$cohort,
    model_name  = spec$model_name,
    cohort_name = spec$cohort_name,
    project     = current_project
  )
  if (!is.null(fit)) {
    fwrite(extract_lm_results(fit),
           file.path(arf_final_data, paste0(institution, spec$out_file)))
  }
}
```

# Step 3: Explore lang_cat_7 group - all ARF, pandemic groupings, no paralytics
```{r}
################################################################################
# lang_cat_7 - All ARF Patients
################################################################################
make_table1_pair(
  dt = lang_cat_7_arf_cohort, by = "lang_cat_7", reference_level = "english",
  cat_vars = cat_vars, cont_vars = cont_vars, site_name = institution,
  tables_dir = arf_tables_dir, institution_prefix = institution,
  cohort_name = "lang_cat_7_arf_cohort", file_stem = "lang_cat_7_arf_cohort",
  project = current_project
)

lang_cat_7_arf_all_deep_sedation <- fit_model_safe(
  outcome     = "percent_deep_sedation_48",
  exposure    = "lang_cat_7",
  covariates  = arf_covariates,
  data        = lang_cat_7_arf_cohort,
  model_name  = "lang_cat_7_arf_all_deep_sedation",
  cohort_name = "lang_cat_7_arf_cohort",
  project     = current_project
)
if (!is.null(lang_cat_7_arf_all_deep_sedation)) {
  fwrite(extract_lm_results(lang_cat_7_arf_all_deep_sedation),
         file.path(arf_final_data, paste0(institution, "_lang_cat_7_arf_all_deep_sedation.csv")))
}

################################################################################
# lang_cat_7 - No Continuous Paralytics
################################################################################
lang_cat_7_arf_no_cont_nmba_cohort <- relevel_arf_subgroup(
  lang_cat_7_arf_cohort[continuous_nmba_48 == 0]
)
lang_cat_7_arf_no_cont_nmba_cohort$lang_cat_7 <- relevel(
  as.factor(lang_cat_7_arf_no_cont_nmba_cohort$lang_cat_7), ref = "english"
)

make_table1_pair(
  dt = lang_cat_7_arf_no_cont_nmba_cohort, by = "lang_cat_7", reference_level = "english",
  cat_vars = cat_vars, cont_vars = cont_vars, site_name = institution,
  tables_dir = arf_tables_dir, institution_prefix = institution,
  cohort_name = "lang_cat_7_arf_no_cont_nmba_cohort",
  file_stem   = "lang_cat_7_arf_no_cont_nmba_cohort",
  project = current_project
)

sensitivity_model_arf_no_cont_nmba_deep_sedation_7 <- fit_model_safe(
  outcome     = "percent_deep_sedation_48",
  exposure    = "lang_cat_7",
  covariates  = arf_covariates,
  data        = lang_cat_7_arf_no_cont_nmba_cohort,
  model_name  = "sensitivity_model_arf_no_cont_nmba_deep_sedation_7",
  cohort_name = "lang_cat_7_arf_no_cont_nmba_cohort",
  project     = current_project
)
if (!is.null(sensitivity_model_arf_no_cont_nmba_deep_sedation_7)) {
  fwrite(extract_lm_results(sensitivity_model_arf_no_cont_nmba_deep_sedation_7),
         file.path(arf_final_data, paste0(institution, "_sensitivity_analysis_lang_cat_7_arf_no_cont_nmba.csv")))
}

################################################################################
# lang_cat_7 - No Continuous or Push Paralytics
################################################################################
lang_cat_7_arf_no_nmba_cohort <- relevel_arf_subgroup(
  lang_cat_7_arf_cohort[continuous_nmba_48 == 0][push_paralytics == 0]
)
lang_cat_7_arf_no_nmba_cohort$lang_cat_7 <- relevel(
  as.factor(lang_cat_7_arf_no_nmba_cohort$lang_cat_7), ref = "english"
)

make_table1_pair(
  dt = lang_cat_7_arf_no_nmba_cohort, by = "lang_cat_7", reference_level = "english",
  cat_vars = cat_vars, cont_vars = cont_vars, site_name = institution,
  tables_dir = arf_tables_dir, institution_prefix = institution,
  cohort_name = "lang_cat_7_arf_no_nmba_cohort",
  file_stem   = "lang_cat_7_arf_no_nmba_cohort",
  project = current_project
)

sensitivity_model_lang_cat_7_arf_no_nmba_cohort <- fit_model_safe(
  outcome     = "percent_deep_sedation_48",
  exposure    = "lang_cat_7",
  covariates  = arf_covariates,
  data        = lang_cat_7_arf_no_nmba_cohort,
  model_name  = "sensitivity_model_lang_cat_7_arf_no_nmba_cohort",
  cohort_name = "lang_cat_7_arf_no_nmba_cohort",
  project     = current_project
)
if (!is.null(sensitivity_model_lang_cat_7_arf_no_nmba_cohort)) {
  fwrite(extract_lm_results(sensitivity_model_lang_cat_7_arf_no_nmba_cohort),
         file.path(arf_final_data, paste0(institution, "_sensitivity_analysis_lang_cat_7_arf_no_nmba.csv")))
}

################################################################################
# lang_cat_7 - Pre-Pandemic / Pandemic / Endemic
################################################################################
period_specs_7 <- list(
  list(cohort = lang_cat_7_arf_pre_pandemic_cohort,
       cohort_name = "lang_cat_7_arf_pre_pandemic_cohort",
       model_name  = "lang_cat_7_arf_pre_pandemic_deep_sedation",
       out_file    = "_lang_cat_7_arf_pre_pandemic_deep_sedation.csv"),
  list(cohort = lang_cat_7_arf_pandemic_cohort,
       cohort_name = "lang_cat_7_arf_pandemic_cohort",
       model_name  = "lang_cat_7_arf_pandemic_deep_sedation",
       out_file    = "_lang_cat_7_arf_pandemic_deep_sedation.csv"),
  list(cohort = lang_cat_7_arf_endemic_cohort,
       cohort_name = "lang_cat_7_arf_endemic_cohort",
       model_name  = "lang_cat_7_arf_endemic_deep_sedation",
       out_file    = "_lang_cat_7_arf_endemic_deep_sedation.csv")
)

for (spec in period_specs_7) {
  make_table1_pair(
    dt = spec$cohort, by = "lang_cat_7", reference_level = "english",
    cat_vars = cat_vars, cont_vars = cont_vars, site_name = institution,
    tables_dir = arf_tables_dir, institution_prefix = institution,
    cohort_name = spec$cohort_name, file_stem = spec$cohort_name,
    project = current_project
  )
  
  fit <- fit_model_safe(
    outcome     = "percent_deep_sedation_48",
    exposure    = "lang_cat_7",
    covariates  = arf_covariates,
    data        = spec$cohort,
    model_name  = spec$model_name,
    cohort_name = spec$cohort_name,
    project     = current_project
  )
  if (!is.null(fit)) {
    fwrite(extract_lm_results(fit),
           file.path(arf_final_data, paste0(institution, spec$out_file)))
  }
}
```

# Step 4: Explore lang_cat_1 group - all ARF, pandemic groupings, no paralytics
```{r}
################################################################################
# lang_cat_1 - All ARF Patients
################################################################################
make_table1_pair(
  dt = lang_cat_1_2_arf_cohort, by = "lang_cat_1", reference_level = "english",
  cat_vars = cat_vars, cont_vars = cont_vars, site_name = institution,
  tables_dir = arf_tables_dir, institution_prefix = institution,
  cohort_name = "lang_cat_1_2_arf_cohort", file_stem = "lang_cat_1_arf_cohort",
  project = current_project
)

lang_cat_1_arf_all_deep_sedation <- fit_model_safe(
  outcome     = "percent_deep_sedation_48",
  exposure    = "lang_cat_1",
  covariates  = arf_covariates,
  data        = lang_cat_1_2_arf_cohort,
  model_name  = "lang_cat_1_arf_all_deep_sedation",
  cohort_name = "lang_cat_1_2_arf_cohort",
  project     = current_project
)
if (!is.null(lang_cat_1_arf_all_deep_sedation)) {
  fwrite(extract_lm_results(lang_cat_1_arf_all_deep_sedation),
         file.path(arf_final_data, paste0(institution, "_lang_cat_1_arf_all_deep_sedation.csv")))
}

################################################################################
# lang_cat_1 - No Continuous Paralytics
################################################################################
lang_cat_1_arf_no_cont_nmba_cohort <- relevel_arf_subgroup(
  lang_cat_1_2_arf_cohort[continuous_nmba_48 == 0]
)
lang_cat_1_arf_no_cont_nmba_cohort$lang_cat_1 <- relevel(
  as.factor(lang_cat_1_arf_no_cont_nmba_cohort$lang_cat_1), ref = "english"
)

make_table1_pair(
  dt = lang_cat_1_arf_no_cont_nmba_cohort, by = "lang_cat_1", reference_level = "english",
  cat_vars = cat_vars, cont_vars = cont_vars, site_name = institution,
  tables_dir = arf_tables_dir, institution_prefix = institution,
  cohort_name = "lang_cat_1_arf_no_cont_nmba_cohort",
  file_stem   = "lang_cat_1_arf_no_cont_nmba_cohort",
  project = current_project
)

sensitivity_model_arf_no_cont_nmba_deep_sedation_1 <- fit_model_safe(
  outcome     = "percent_deep_sedation_48",
  exposure    = "lang_cat_1",
  covariates  = arf_covariates,
  data        = lang_cat_1_arf_no_cont_nmba_cohort,
  model_name  = "sensitivity_model_arf_no_cont_nmba_deep_sedation_1",
  cohort_name = "lang_cat_1_arf_no_cont_nmba_cohort",
  project     = current_project
)
if (!is.null(sensitivity_model_arf_no_cont_nmba_deep_sedation_1)) {
  fwrite(extract_lm_results(sensitivity_model_arf_no_cont_nmba_deep_sedation_1),
         file.path(arf_final_data, paste0(institution, "_sensitivity_analysis_lang_cat_1_arf_no_cont_nmba.csv")))
}

################################################################################
# lang_cat_1 - No Continuous or Push Paralytics
################################################################################
lang_cat_1_arf_no_nmba_cohort <- relevel_arf_subgroup(
  lang_cat_1_2_arf_cohort[continuous_nmba_48 == 0][push_paralytics == 0]
)
lang_cat_1_arf_no_nmba_cohort$lang_cat_1 <- relevel(
  as.factor(lang_cat_1_arf_no_nmba_cohort$lang_cat_1), ref = "english"
)

make_table1_pair(
  dt = lang_cat_1_arf_no_nmba_cohort, by = "lang_cat_1", reference_level = "english",
  cat_vars = cat_vars, cont_vars = cont_vars, site_name = institution,
  tables_dir = arf_tables_dir, institution_prefix = institution,
  cohort_name = "lang_cat_1_arf_no_nmba_cohort",
  file_stem   = "lang_cat_1_arf_no_nmba_cohort",
  project = current_project
)

sensitivity_model_lang_cat_1_arf_no_nmba_cohort <- fit_model_safe(
  outcome     = "percent_deep_sedation_48",
  exposure    = "lang_cat_1",
  covariates  = arf_covariates,
  data        = lang_cat_1_arf_no_nmba_cohort,
  model_name  = "sensitivity_model_lang_cat_1_arf_no_nmba_cohort",
  cohort_name = "lang_cat_1_arf_no_nmba_cohort",
  project     = current_project
)
if (!is.null(sensitivity_model_lang_cat_1_arf_no_nmba_cohort)) {
  fwrite(extract_lm_results(sensitivity_model_lang_cat_1_arf_no_nmba_cohort),
         file.path(arf_final_data, paste0(institution, "_sensitivity_analysis_lang_cat_1_arf_no_nmba.csv")))
}

################################################################################
# lang_cat_1 - Pre-Pandemic / Pandemic / Endemic
################################################################################
period_specs_1 <- list(
  list(cohort = lang_cat_1_arf_pre_pandemic_cohort,
       cohort_name = "lang_cat_1_arf_pre_pandemic_cohort",
       model_name  = "lang_cat_1_arf_pre_pandemic_deep_sedation",
       out_file    = "_lang_cat_1_arf_pre_pandemic_deep_sedation.csv"),
  list(cohort = lang_cat_1_arf_pandemic_cohort,
       cohort_name = "lang_cat_1_arf_pandemic_cohort",
       model_name  = "lang_cat_1_arf_pandemic_deep_sedation",
       out_file    = "_lang_cat_1_arf_pandemic_deep_sedation.csv"),
  list(cohort = lang_cat_1_arf_endemic_cohort,
       cohort_name = "lang_cat_1_arf_endemic_cohort",
       model_name  = "lang_cat_1_arf_endemic_deep_sedation",
       out_file    = "_lang_cat_1_arf_endemic_deep_sedation.csv")
)

for (spec in period_specs_1) {
  make_table1_pair(
    dt = spec$cohort, by = "lang_cat_1", reference_level = "english",
    cat_vars = cat_vars, cont_vars = cont_vars, site_name = institution,
    tables_dir = arf_tables_dir, institution_prefix = institution,
    cohort_name = spec$cohort_name, file_stem = spec$cohort_name,
    project = current_project
  )
  
  fit <- fit_model_safe(
    outcome     = "percent_deep_sedation_48",
    exposure    = "lang_cat_1",
    covariates  = arf_covariates,
    data        = spec$cohort,
    model_name  = spec$model_name,
    cohort_name = spec$cohort_name,
    project     = current_project
  )
  if (!is.null(fit)) {
    fwrite(extract_lm_results(fit),
           file.path(arf_final_data, paste0(institution, spec$out_file)))
  }
}
```


# Step 5: Explore lang_cat_2 group - all ARF, pandemic groupings, no paralytics
```{r}
################################################################################
# lang_cat_2 - All ARF Patients
################################################################################
make_table1_pair(
  dt = lang_cat_1_2_arf_cohort, by = "lang_cat_2", reference_level = "english",
  cat_vars = cat_vars, cont_vars = cont_vars, site_name = institution,
  tables_dir = arf_tables_dir, institution_prefix = institution,
  cohort_name = "lang_cat_2_arf_cohort", file_stem = "lang_cat_2_arf_cohort",
  project = current_project
)

lang_cat_2_arf_all_deep_sedation <- fit_model_safe(
  outcome     = "percent_deep_sedation_48",
  exposure    = "lang_cat_2",
  covariates  = arf_covariates,
  data        = lang_cat_1_2_arf_cohort,
  model_name  = "lang_cat_2_arf_all_deep_sedation",
  cohort_name = "lang_cat_2_arf_cohort",
  project     = current_project
)
if (!is.null(lang_cat_2_arf_all_deep_sedation)) {
  fwrite(extract_lm_results(lang_cat_2_arf_all_deep_sedation),
         file.path(arf_final_data, paste0(institution, "_lang_cat_2_arf_all_deep_sedation.csv")))
}

################################################################################
# lang_cat_2 - No Continuous Paralytics
################################################################################
lang_cat_2_arf_no_cont_nmba_cohort <- relevel_arf_subgroup(
  lang_cat_1_2_arf_cohort[continuous_nmba_48 == 0]
)
lang_cat_2_arf_no_cont_nmba_cohort$lang_cat_2 <- relevel(
  as.factor(lang_cat_2_arf_no_cont_nmba_cohort$lang_cat_2), ref = "english"
)

make_table1_pair(
  dt = lang_cat_2_arf_no_cont_nmba_cohort, by = "lang_cat_2", reference_level = "english",
  cat_vars = cat_vars, cont_vars = cont_vars, site_name = institution,
  tables_dir = arf_tables_dir, institution_prefix = institution,
  cohort_name = "lang_cat_2_arf_no_cont_nmba_cohort",
  file_stem   = "lang_cat_2_arf_no_cont_nmba_cohort",
  project = current_project
)

sensitivity_model_arf_no_cont_nmba_deep_sedation_2 <- fit_model_safe(
  outcome     = "percent_deep_sedation_48",
  exposure    = "lang_cat_2",
  covariates  = arf_covariates,
  data        = lang_cat_2_arf_no_cont_nmba_cohort,
  model_name  = "sensitivity_model_arf_no_cont_nmba_deep_sedation_2",
  cohort_name = "lang_cat_2_arf_no_cont_nmba_cohort",
  project     = current_project
)
if (!is.null(sensitivity_model_arf_no_cont_nmba_deep_sedation_2)) {
  fwrite(extract_lm_results(sensitivity_model_arf_no_cont_nmba_deep_sedation_2),
         file.path(arf_final_data, paste0(institution, "_sensitivity_analysis_lang_cat_2_arf_no_cont_nmba.csv")))
}

################################################################################
# lang_cat_2 - No Continuous or Push Paralytics
################################################################################
lang_cat_2_arf_no_nmba_cohort <- relevel_arf_subgroup(
  lang_cat_1_2_arf_cohort[continuous_nmba_48 == 0][push_paralytics == 0]
)
lang_cat_2_arf_no_nmba_cohort$lang_cat_2 <- relevel(
  as.factor(lang_cat_2_arf_no_nmba_cohort$lang_cat_2), ref = "english"
)

make_table1_pair(
  dt = lang_cat_2_arf_no_nmba_cohort, by = "lang_cat_2", reference_level = "english",
  cat_vars = cat_vars, cont_vars = cont_vars, site_name = institution,
  tables_dir = arf_tables_dir, institution_prefix = institution,
  cohort_name = "lang_cat_2_arf_no_nmba_cohort",
  file_stem   = "lang_cat_2_arf_no_nmba_cohort",
  project = current_project
)

sensitivity_model_lang_cat_2_arf_no_nmba_cohort <- fit_model_safe(
  outcome     = "percent_deep_sedation_48",
  exposure    = "lang_cat_2",
  covariates  = arf_covariates,
  data        = lang_cat_2_arf_no_nmba_cohort,
  model_name  = "sensitivity_model_lang_cat_2_arf_no_nmba_cohort",
  cohort_name = "lang_cat_2_arf_no_nmba_cohort",
  project     = current_project
)
if (!is.null(sensitivity_model_lang_cat_2_arf_no_nmba_cohort)) {
  fwrite(extract_lm_results(sensitivity_model_lang_cat_2_arf_no_nmba_cohort),
         file.path(arf_final_data, paste0(institution, "_sensitivity_analysis_lang_cat_2_arf_no_nmba.csv")))
}

################################################################################
# lang_cat_2 - Pre-Pandemic / Pandemic / Endemic
################################################################################
period_specs_2 <- list(
  list(period = "pre_pandemic", cohort = lang_cat_2_arf_pre_pandemic_cohort,
       cohort_name = "lang_cat_2_arf_pre_pandemic_cohort",
       model_name  = "lang_cat_2_arf_pre_pandemic_deep_sedation",
       out_file    = "_lang_cat_2_arf_pre_pandemic_deep_sedation.csv"),
  list(period = "pandemic", cohort = lang_cat_2_arf_pandemic_cohort,
       cohort_name = "lang_cat_2_arf_pandemic_cohort",
       model_name  = "lang_cat_2_arf_pandemic_deep_sedation",
       out_file    = "_lang_cat_2_arf_pandemic_deep_sedation.csv"),
  list(period = "endemic", cohort = lang_cat_2_arf_endemic_cohort,
       cohort_name = "lang_cat_2_arf_endemic_cohort",
       model_name  = "lang_cat_2_arf_endemic_deep_sedation",
       out_file    = "_lang_cat_2_arf_endemic_deep_sedation.csv")
)

for (spec in period_specs_2) {
  make_table1_pair(
    dt = spec$cohort, by = "lang_cat_2", reference_level = "english",
    cat_vars = cat_vars, cont_vars = cont_vars, site_name = institution,
    tables_dir = arf_tables_dir, institution_prefix = institution,
    cohort_name = spec$cohort_name, file_stem = spec$cohort_name,
    project = current_project
  )
  
  fit <- fit_model_safe(
    outcome     = "percent_deep_sedation_48",
    exposure    = "lang_cat_2",
    covariates  = arf_covariates,
    data        = spec$cohort,
    model_name  = spec$model_name,
    cohort_name = spec$cohort_name,
    project     = current_project
  )
  if (!is.null(fit)) {
    fwrite(extract_lm_results(fit),
           file.path(arf_final_data, paste0(institution, spec$out_file)))
  }
}
```

# Step 6: Explore lang_cat_3 group - all ARF, pandemic groupings, no paralytics
```{r}
################################################################################
# lang_cat_3 - All ARF Patients
################################################################################
make_table1_pair(
  dt = lang_cat_3_arf_cohort, by = "lang_cat_3", reference_level = "english",
  cat_vars = cat_vars, cont_vars = cont_vars, site_name = institution,
  tables_dir = arf_tables_dir, institution_prefix = institution,
  cohort_name = "lang_cat_3_arf_cohort", file_stem = "lang_cat_3_arf_cohort",
  project = current_project
)

lang_cat_3_arf_all_deep_sedation <- fit_model_safe(
  outcome     = "percent_deep_sedation_48",
  exposure    = "lang_cat_3",
  covariates  = arf_covariates,
  data        = lang_cat_3_arf_cohort,
  model_name  = "lang_cat_3_arf_all_deep_sedation",
  cohort_name = "lang_cat_3_arf_cohort",
  project     = current_project
)
if (!is.null(lang_cat_3_arf_all_deep_sedation)) {
  fwrite(extract_lm_results(lang_cat_3_arf_all_deep_sedation),
         file.path(arf_final_data, paste0(institution, "_lang_cat_3_arf_all_deep_sedation.csv")))
}

################################################################################
# lang_cat_3 - No Continuous Paralytics
################################################################################
lang_cat_3_arf_no_cont_nmba_cohort <- relevel_arf_subgroup(
  lang_cat_3_arf_cohort[continuous_nmba_48 == 0]
)
lang_cat_3_arf_no_cont_nmba_cohort$lang_cat_3 <- relevel(
  as.factor(lang_cat_3_arf_no_cont_nmba_cohort$lang_cat_3), ref = "english"
)

make_table1_pair(
  dt = lang_cat_3_arf_no_cont_nmba_cohort, by = "lang_cat_3", reference_level = "english",
  cat_vars = cat_vars, cont_vars = cont_vars, site_name = institution,
  tables_dir = arf_tables_dir, institution_prefix = institution,
  cohort_name = "lang_cat_3_arf_no_cont_nmba_cohort",
  file_stem   = "lang_cat_3_arf_no_cont_nmba_cohort",
  project = current_project
)

sensitivity_model_arf_no_cont_nmba_deep_sedation_3 <- fit_model_safe(
  outcome     = "percent_deep_sedation_48",
  exposure    = "lang_cat_3",
  covariates  = arf_covariates,
  data        = lang_cat_3_arf_no_cont_nmba_cohort,
  model_name  = "sensitivity_model_arf_no_cont_nmba_deep_sedation_3",
  cohort_name = "lang_cat_3_arf_no_cont_nmba_cohort",
  project     = current_project
)
if (!is.null(sensitivity_model_arf_no_cont_nmba_deep_sedation_3)) {
  fwrite(extract_lm_results(sensitivity_model_arf_no_cont_nmba_deep_sedation_3),
         file.path(arf_final_data, paste0(institution, "_sensitivity_analysis_lang_cat_3_arf_no_cont_nmba.csv")))
}

################################################################################
# lang_cat_3 - No Continuous or Push Paralytics
################################################################################
lang_cat_3_arf_no_nmba_cohort <- relevel_arf_subgroup(
  lang_cat_3_arf_cohort[continuous_nmba_48 == 0][push_paralytics == 0]
)
lang_cat_3_arf_no_nmba_cohort$lang_cat_3 <- relevel(
  as.factor(lang_cat_3_arf_no_nmba_cohort$lang_cat_3), ref = "english"
)

make_table1_pair(
  dt = lang_cat_3_arf_no_nmba_cohort, by = "lang_cat_3", reference_level = "english",
  cat_vars = cat_vars, cont_vars = cont_vars, site_name = institution,
  tables_dir = arf_tables_dir, institution_prefix = institution,
  cohort_name = "lang_cat_3_arf_no_nmba_cohort",
  file_stem   = "lang_cat_3_arf_no_nmba_cohort",
  project = current_project
)

sensitivity_model_lang_cat_3_arf_no_nmba_cohort <- fit_model_safe(
  outcome     = "percent_deep_sedation_48",
  exposure    = "lang_cat_3",
  covariates  = arf_covariates,
  data        = lang_cat_3_arf_no_nmba_cohort,
  model_name  = "sensitivity_model_lang_cat_3_arf_no_nmba_cohort",
  cohort_name = "lang_cat_3_arf_no_nmba_cohort",
  project     = current_project
)
if (!is.null(sensitivity_model_lang_cat_3_arf_no_nmba_cohort)) {
  fwrite(extract_lm_results(sensitivity_model_lang_cat_3_arf_no_nmba_cohort),
         file.path(arf_final_data, paste0(institution, "_sensitivity_analysis_lang_cat_3_arf_no_nmba.csv")))
}

################################################################################
# lang_cat_3 - Pre-Pandemic / Pandemic / Endemic
################################################################################
period_specs_3 <- list(
  list(period = "pre_pandemic", cohort = lang_cat_3_arf_pre_pandemic_cohort,
       cohort_name = "lang_cat_3_arf_pre_pandemic_cohort",
       model_name  = "lang_cat_3_arf_pre_pandemic_deep_sedation",
       out_file    = "_lang_cat_3_arf_pre_pandemic_deep_sedation.csv"),
  list(period = "pandemic", cohort = lang_cat_3_arf_pandemic_cohort,
       cohort_name = "lang_cat_3_arf_pandemic_cohort",
       model_name  = "lang_cat_3_arf_pandemic_deep_sedation",
       out_file    = "_lang_cat_3_arf_pandemic_deep_sedation.csv"),
  list(period = "endemic", cohort = lang_cat_3_arf_endemic_cohort,
       cohort_name = "lang_cat_3_arf_endemic_cohort",
       model_name  = "lang_cat_3_arf_endemic_deep_sedation",
       out_file    = "_lang_cat_3_arf_endemic_deep_sedation.csv")
)

for (spec in period_specs_3) {
  make_table1_pair(
    dt = spec$cohort, by = "lang_cat_3", reference_level = "english",
    cat_vars = cat_vars, cont_vars = cont_vars, site_name = institution,
    tables_dir = arf_tables_dir, institution_prefix = institution,
    cohort_name = spec$cohort_name, file_stem = spec$cohort_name,
    project = current_project
  )
  
  fit <- fit_model_safe(
    outcome     = "percent_deep_sedation_48",
    exposure    = "lang_cat_3",
    covariates  = arf_covariates,
    data        = spec$cohort,
    model_name  = spec$model_name,
    cohort_name = spec$cohort_name,
    project     = current_project
  )
  if (!is.null(fit)) {
    fwrite(extract_lm_results(fit),
           file.path(arf_final_data, paste0(institution, spec$out_file)))
  }
}
```

# Step 7: Explore lang_cat_4 group - all ARF, pandemic groupings, no paralytics
```{r}
################################################################################
# lang_cat_4 - All ARF Patients
################################################################################
make_table1_pair(
  dt = lang_cat_4_arf_cohort, by = "lang_cat_4", reference_level = "english",
  cat_vars = cat_vars, cont_vars = cont_vars, site_name = institution,
  tables_dir = arf_tables_dir, institution_prefix = institution,
  cohort_name = "lang_cat_4_arf_cohort", file_stem = "lang_cat_4_arf_cohort",
  project = current_project
)

lang_cat_4_arf_all_deep_sedation <- fit_model_safe(
  outcome     = "percent_deep_sedation_48",
  exposure    = "lang_cat_4",
  covariates  = arf_covariates,
  data        = lang_cat_4_arf_cohort,
  model_name  = "lang_cat_4_arf_all_deep_sedation",
  cohort_name = "lang_cat_4_arf_cohort",
  project     = current_project
)
if (!is.null(lang_cat_4_arf_all_deep_sedation)) {
  fwrite(extract_lm_results(lang_cat_4_arf_all_deep_sedation),
         file.path(arf_final_data, paste0(institution, "_lang_cat_4_arf_all_deep_sedation.csv")))
}

################################################################################
# lang_cat_4 - No Continuous Paralytics
################################################################################
lang_cat_4_arf_no_cont_nmba_cohort <- relevel_arf_subgroup(
  lang_cat_4_arf_cohort[continuous_nmba_48 == 0]
)
lang_cat_4_arf_no_cont_nmba_cohort$lang_cat_4 <- relevel(
  as.factor(lang_cat_4_arf_no_cont_nmba_cohort$lang_cat_4), ref = "english"
)

make_table1_pair(
  dt = lang_cat_4_arf_no_cont_nmba_cohort, by = "lang_cat_4", reference_level = "english",
  cat_vars = cat_vars, cont_vars = cont_vars, site_name = institution,
  tables_dir = arf_tables_dir, institution_prefix = institution,
  cohort_name = "lang_cat_4_arf_no_cont_nmba_cohort",
  file_stem   = "lang_cat_4_arf_no_cont_nmba_cohort",
  project = current_project
)

sensitivity_model_arf_no_cont_nmba_deep_sedation_4 <- fit_model_safe(
  outcome     = "percent_deep_sedation_48",
  exposure    = "lang_cat_4",
  covariates  = arf_covariates,
  data        = lang_cat_4_arf_no_cont_nmba_cohort,
  model_name  = "sensitivity_model_arf_no_cont_nmba_deep_sedation_4",
  cohort_name = "lang_cat_4_arf_no_cont_nmba_cohort",
  project     = current_project
)
if (!is.null(sensitivity_model_arf_no_cont_nmba_deep_sedation_4)) {
  fwrite(extract_lm_results(sensitivity_model_arf_no_cont_nmba_deep_sedation_4),
         file.path(arf_final_data, paste0(institution, "_sensitivity_analysis_lang_cat_4_arf_no_cont_nmba.csv")))
}

################################################################################
# lang_cat_4 - No Continuous or Push Paralytics
################################################################################
lang_cat_4_arf_no_nmba_cohort <- relevel_arf_subgroup(
  lang_cat_4_arf_cohort[continuous_nmba_48 == 0][push_paralytics == 0]
)
lang_cat_4_arf_no_nmba_cohort$lang_cat_4 <- relevel(
  as.factor(lang_cat_4_arf_no_nmba_cohort$lang_cat_4), ref = "english"
)

make_table1_pair(
  dt = lang_cat_4_arf_no_nmba_cohort, by = "lang_cat_4", reference_level = "english",
  cat_vars = cat_vars, cont_vars = cont_vars, site_name = institution,
  tables_dir = arf_tables_dir, institution_prefix = institution,
  cohort_name = "lang_cat_4_arf_no_nmba_cohort",
  file_stem   = "lang_cat_4_arf_no_nmba_cohort",
  project = current_project
)

sensitivity_model_lang_cat_4_arf_no_nmba_cohort <- fit_model_safe(
  outcome     = "percent_deep_sedation_48",
  exposure    = "lang_cat_4",
  covariates  = arf_covariates,
  data        = lang_cat_4_arf_no_nmba_cohort,
  model_name  = "sensitivity_model_lang_cat_4_arf_no_nmba_cohort",
  cohort_name = "lang_cat_4_arf_no_nmba_cohort",
  project     = current_project
)
if (!is.null(sensitivity_model_lang_cat_4_arf_no_nmba_cohort)) {
  fwrite(extract_lm_results(sensitivity_model_lang_cat_4_arf_no_nmba_cohort),
         file.path(arf_final_data, paste0(institution, "_sensitivity_analysis_lang_cat_4_arf_no_nmba.csv")))
}

################################################################################
# lang_cat_4 - Pre-Pandemic / Pandemic / Endemic
################################################################################
period_specs_4 <- list(
  list(period = "pre_pandemic", cohort = lang_cat_4_arf_pre_pandemic_cohort,
       cohort_name = "lang_cat_4_arf_pre_pandemic_cohort",
       model_name  = "lang_cat_4_arf_pre_pandemic_deep_sedation",
       out_file    = "_lang_cat_4_arf_pre_pandemic_deep_sedation.csv"),
  list(period = "pandemic", cohort = lang_cat_4_arf_pandemic_cohort,
       cohort_name = "lang_cat_4_arf_pandemic_cohort",
       model_name  = "lang_cat_4_arf_pandemic_deep_sedation",
       out_file    = "_lang_cat_4_arf_pandemic_deep_sedation.csv"),
  list(period = "endemic", cohort = lang_cat_4_arf_endemic_cohort,
       cohort_name = "lang_cat_4_arf_endemic_cohort",
       model_name  = "lang_cat_4_arf_endemic_deep_sedation",
       out_file    = "_lang_cat_4_arf_endemic_deep_sedation.csv")
)

for (spec in period_specs_4) {
  make_table1_pair(
    dt = spec$cohort, by = "lang_cat_4", reference_level = "english",
    cat_vars = cat_vars, cont_vars = cont_vars, site_name = institution,
    tables_dir = arf_tables_dir, institution_prefix = institution,
    cohort_name = spec$cohort_name, file_stem = spec$cohort_name,
    project = current_project
  )
  
  fit <- fit_model_safe(
    outcome     = "percent_deep_sedation_48",
    exposure    = "lang_cat_4",
    covariates  = arf_covariates,
    data        = spec$cohort,
    model_name  = spec$model_name,
    cohort_name = spec$cohort_name,
    project     = current_project
  )
  if (!is.null(fit)) {
    fwrite(extract_lm_results(fit),
           file.path(arf_final_data, paste0(institution, spec$out_file)))
  }
}
```


# MEASUREMENTS PROJECT
# Step 1: Define the Cohort
```{r}
current_project <- "measurements"
################################################################################
# Override cat_vars for the measurements project (the original code redefined
# this here)
################################################################################
cat_vars <- c("sex_category", "ethnicity_category_final", "race_category",
              "hospital_id", "lang_cat_1", "location_of_intubation",
              "admission_type_category")

measurements_project_cohort_24      <- total_cohort[imv_duration_hours_final >= 24]
measurements_project_cohort_no_neuro <- measurements_project_cohort_24[
  !icu_imv %in% c("mixed_neuro_icu", "neuro_icu", "neurosurgical_icu")
]
measurements_project_cohort <- measurements_project_cohort_no_neuro[
  continuous_nmba_48 == 0 & push_paralytics == 0
]

# Relevel
measurements_project_cohort$sex_category             <- relevel(as.factor(measurements_project_cohort$sex_category),             ref = "male")
measurements_project_cohort$race_category            <- relevel(as.factor(measurements_project_cohort$race_category),            ref = "white")
measurements_project_cohort$ethnicity_category       <- relevel(as.factor(measurements_project_cohort$ethnicity_category),       ref = "non-hispanic")
measurements_project_cohort$ethnicity_category_final <- relevel(as.factor(measurements_project_cohort$ethnicity_category_final), ref = "non-hispanic/unknown")
measurements_project_cohort$lang_cat_1               <- relevel(as.factor(measurements_project_cohort$lang_cat_1),               ref = "english")
measurements_project_cohort$ethnicity_category_final <- relevel(as.factor(measurements_project_cohort$ethnicity_category_final), ref = "non-hispanic/unknown")


make_table1_pair(
  dt = measurements_project_cohort, by = "icu_imv", reference_level = "medical_icu",
  cat_vars = cat_vars, cont_vars = cont_vars, site_name = institution,
  tables_dir = measurements_tables_dir, institution_prefix = institution,
  cohort_name = "measurements_project_cohort", file_stem = "measurements_cohort",
  project = current_project
)

################################################################################
# Helper for the measurements project
#
# For a given outcome, fits a reference model with the standard adjustment set
# (no sedation predictor), then 7 candidate models that each ADD one sedation
# summary measure as a predictor. Compares each candidate to the reference
# with an F-test (lm) or LRT (glm) and writes a summary comparison table.
#
# The point of this whole project is to identify which sedation measure best
# predicts each outcome — so the sedation measure is the variable of interest,
# not the language category.
################################################################################

# The 7 sedation summary measures, in order
sedation_measures <- c(
  "percent_deep_sedation_48",
  "deep_sedation_count_total_48",
  "median_rass_cont",
  "median_rass_binary",
  "rass_weighted_avg",
  "deep_sedation_weighted",
  "sedation_index_score",
  "sedation_index_tertiles"
)

sedation_measure_labels <- c(
  "Proportion of Time Deep Sedation (48hr)",
  "Total Hours Deep Sedation (48hr)",
  "Median RASS (Continuous)",
  "Median RASS (Binary)",
  "Time-Weighted RASS (Continuous)",
  "Time-Weighted RASS (Binary, <= -3)",
  "Sedation Index Score",
  "Sedation Index Tertiles"
)

# Tidy an lm with R-squared appended as a final row
tidy_lm_with_r2 <- function(model) {
  df <- broom::tidy(model)
  rsq <- summary(model)$r.squared
  rbind(
    df,
    data.frame(term = "R-squared", estimate = rsq,
               std.error = NA, statistic = NA, p.value = NA)
  )
}

# Safely compute McFadden's pseudo-R^2; return NA if pR2 fails
safe_pseudo_r2 <- function(model) {
  if (is.null(model)) return(NA_real_)
  tryCatch({
    p2 <- pscl::pR2(model)
    unname(p2["McFadden"])
  }, error = function(e) {
    message("pseudo-R^2 calculation failed: ", conditionMessage(e))
    NA_real_
  })
}

# Tidy a glm with McFadden pseudo-R^2 appended (safely)
tidy_glm_with_pseudo_r2 <- function(model) {
  df <- broom::tidy(model)
  pseudo <- safe_pseudo_r2(model)
  rbind(
    df,
    data.frame(term = "Pseudo-R-squared (McFadden)", estimate = pseudo,
               std.error = NA, statistic = NA, p.value = NA)
  )
}

run_measurements_outcome <- function(outcome,
                                     family = NULL,
                                     outcome_short,           # used in filenames, e.g. "vfd"
                                     summary_table_path,
                                     data,
                                     project = current_project) {
  
  is_glm <- !is.null(family)
  
  # --------------------------------------------------------------------------
  # Reference model: no sedation predictor, full standard adjustment set
  # (which already includes lang_cat_1, race_category, etc.). We need an
  # "exposure" for fit_model_safe's interface, so we pass lang_cat_1 — but
  # this is just structural; conceptually the reference model has no sedation
  # variable in it at all.
  # --------------------------------------------------------------------------
  ref_model_name <- paste0("reference_model_", outcome_short)
  ref_fit <- fit_model_safe(
    outcome     = outcome,
    # NO exposure argument — reference model has no exposure of interest
    covariates  = measurements_covariates,
    data        = data,
    model_name  = ref_model_name,
    cohort_name = "measurements_project_cohort",
    project     = project,
    family      = family
  )
  
  if (is.null(ref_fit)) {
    message("Reference model for ", outcome_short, " failed; skipping comparison table")
    return(invisible(NULL))
  }
  
  # Write tidied reference
  ref_tidy <- if (is_glm) tidy_glm_with_pseudo_r2(ref_fit) else tidy_lm_with_r2(ref_fit)
  fwrite(ref_tidy,
         file.path(measurements_model_data,
                   paste0(institution, "_reference_model_", outcome_short, ".csv")))
  
  # --------------------------------------------------------------------------
  # 7 candidate models: each ADDS one sedation measure to the standard
  # adjustment set. The sedation measure is the exposure (variable of
  # interest); lang_cat_1 stays in the covariates as a confounder.
  # --------------------------------------------------------------------------
  rsq_or_pseudo <- numeric(length(sedation_measures))
  test_stat     <- numeric(length(sedation_measures))
  test_pvalue   <- numeric(length(sedation_measures))
  
  for (i in seq_along(sedation_measures)) {
    measure <- sedation_measures[i]
    
    cand_fit <- fit_model_safe(
      outcome     = outcome,
      exposure    = measure,                            # <-- sedation measure is exposure
      covariates  = measurements_covariates,            # <-- full standard set, including lang_cat_1
      data        = data,
      model_name  = paste0(outcome_short, "_model_", i, "_", measure),
      cohort_name = "measurements_project_cohort",
      project     = project,
      family      = family
    )
    
    if (is.null(cand_fit)) {
      rsq_or_pseudo[i] <- NA_real_
      test_stat[i]     <- NA_real_
      test_pvalue[i]   <- NA_real_
      next
    }
    
    # Write tidied output
    cand_tidy <- if (is_glm) tidy_glm_with_pseudo_r2(cand_fit) else tidy_lm_with_r2(cand_fit)
    fwrite(cand_tidy,
           file.path(measurements_model_data,
                     paste0(institution, "_", outcome_short, "_", i, ".csv")))
    
    # R^2 (or pseudo-R^2) for summary table
    rsq_or_pseudo[i] <- if (is_glm) safe_pseudo_r2(cand_fit) else summary(cand_fit)$r.squared
    
    # Comparison vs reference
    test_result <- tryCatch({
      if (is_glm) anova(ref_fit, cand_fit, test = "LRT") else anova(ref_fit, cand_fit)
    }, error = function(e) {
      message("Comparison test for ", outcome_short, " model ", i,
              " failed: ", conditionMessage(e))
      NULL
    })
    
    if (is.null(test_result)) {
      test_stat[i]   <- NA_real_
      test_pvalue[i] <- NA_real_
    } else if (is_glm) {
      # anova.glm column names vary by R version: Pr(>Chi) vs Pr(>Chisq),
      # Deviance vs Chisq. Use whichever is present.
      pval_col <- intersect(c("Pr(>Chi)", "Pr(>Chisq)", "Pr(Chi)"), names(test_result))
      stat_col <- intersect(c("Deviance", "Chisq"), names(test_result))
      test_stat[i]   <- if (length(stat_col)) test_result[[stat_col[1]]][2] else NA_real_
      test_pvalue[i] <- if (length(pval_col)) test_result[[pval_col[1]]][2] else NA_real_
    } else {
      pval_col <- intersect(c("Pr(>F)", "Pr(F)"), names(test_result))
      stat_col <- intersect(c("F"), names(test_result))
      test_stat[i]   <- if (length(stat_col)) test_result[[stat_col[1]]][2] else NA_real_
      test_pvalue[i] <- if (length(pval_col)) test_result[[pval_col[1]]][2] else NA_real_
    }
  }
  
  # --------------------------------------------------------------------------
  # Build summary comparison table
  # --------------------------------------------------------------------------
  ref_rsq <- if (is_glm) safe_pseudo_r2(ref_fit) else summary(ref_fit)$r.squared
  
  if (is_glm) {
    summary_dt <- data.table(
      model                     = c(sedation_measure_labels, "Reference Model"),
      pseudo_r_squared_mcfadden = c(rsq_or_pseudo, ref_rsq),
      lrt_chi_sq                = c(test_stat,    NA_real_),
      lrt_p_value               = c(test_pvalue,  NA_real_)
    )
  } else {
    summary_dt <- data.table(
      model       = c(sedation_measure_labels, "Reference Model"),
      r_squared   = c(rsq_or_pseudo, ref_rsq),
      f_statistic = c(test_stat,     NA_real_),
      f_p_value   = c(test_pvalue,   NA_real_)
    )
  }
  
  fwrite(summary_dt, summary_table_path)
  invisible(summary_dt)
}
```

# Step 2-7: Create R-Squared, F-Test Tables for All Outcomes
```{r}
################################################################################
# Step 2: 28-Day VFDs
################################################################################
run_measurements_outcome(
  outcome            = "vent_free_days_28_alt",
  family             = NULL,
  outcome_short      = "28dvfd",
  summary_table_path = file.path(measurements_final_data,
                                 paste0(institution, "_vfd_models_rsquared_table.csv")),
  data               = measurements_project_cohort
)

################################################################################
# Step 3: 28-Day ICUFDs
################################################################################
run_measurements_outcome(
  outcome            = "icu_free_days_28",
  family             = NULL,
  outcome_short      = "28dicufd",
  summary_table_path = file.path(measurements_final_data,
                                 paste0(institution, "_icufd_models_rsquared_table.csv")),
  data               = measurements_project_cohort
)

################################################################################
# Step 4: 28-Day Hospital Free Days
################################################################################
run_measurements_outcome(
  outcome            = "hospital_free_days_28",
  family             = NULL,
  outcome_short      = "28dhfd",
  summary_table_path = file.path(measurements_final_data,
                                 paste0(institution, "_hfd_models_rsquared_table.csv")),
  data               = measurements_project_cohort
)

################################################################################
# Step 5: Tracheostomy Incidence
################################################################################
run_measurements_outcome(
  outcome            = "trached",
  family             = binomial(link = "logit"),
  outcome_short      = "trach",
  summary_table_path = file.path(measurements_final_data,
                                 paste0(institution, "_trach_models_pseudo_r_squared_table.csv")),
  data               = measurements_project_cohort
)

################################################################################
# Step 6: In-Hospital Mortality
################################################################################
run_measurements_outcome(
  outcome            = "death_during_admission",
  family             = binomial(link = "logit"),
  outcome_short      = "mortality",
  summary_table_path = file.path(measurements_final_data,
                                 paste0(institution, "_mortality_models_pseudo_r_squared_table.csv")),
  data               = measurements_project_cohort
)

################################################################################
# Step 7: Reintubation Incidence
################################################################################
run_measurements_outcome(
  outcome            = "reintubation_final",
  family             = binomial(link = "logit"),
  outcome_short      = "reintubation",
  summary_table_path = file.path(measurements_final_data,
                                 paste0(institution, "_reintubation_models_pseudo_r_squared_table.csv")),
  data               = measurements_project_cohort
)

```

# Step 8: Data Cleaning Summary
```{r}
# Step 0: initial count
n_start <- nrow(total_cohort)

# Step 1: Remove Patients intubated for less than 24 hours
n_after_step1 <- nrow(measurements_project_cohort_24)
n_removed_step1 <- n_start - n_after_step1

# Step 2: remove neuro, neurosurg, neuro mixed patients
n_after_step2 <- nrow(measurements_project_cohort_no_neuro)
n_removed_step2 <- n_after_step1 - n_after_step2

# Step 3: remove patients who received continuous or push paralytics
n_after_step3 <- nrow(measurements_project_cohort)
n_removed_step3 <- n_after_step2 - n_after_step3

# Tabulation of exclusions
filter_tab_measurements_project <- data.table(
  step = c(
    "Total IMV Patients",
    "Removed for IMV duration < 24 hours",
    "Removed for admission to neuro ICU",
    "Removed for receiving continuous or push paralytics",
    "Final"
  ),
  n_remaining = c(
    n_start,
    n_after_step1,
    n_after_step2,
    n_after_step3,
    n_after_step3
  ),
  n_removed_this_step = c(
    0,
    n_removed_step1,
    n_removed_step2,
    n_removed_step3,
    0
  )
)

filter_tab_measurements_project

fwrite(filter_tab_measurements_project, 
       file.path(measurements_tables_dir, paste0(institution, "_01_analysis_cleaning_summary.csv")))

```
  
# Write Final Missingness Logs for Dropped Covariates and Table 1 Problems
```{r}
# Model Dropped Terms
fwrite(
  model_dropped_terms_log,
  file.path(cohort_characteristics, paste0(institution, "_model_dropped_terms_log.csv"))
)

# Table 1 Problems
fwrite(
  table1_log,
  file.path(cohort_characteristics, paste0(institution, "_table1_log.csv"))
)

```
